# Part III ŌĆö Feature requirements (platform & FleetOps)


### Feature spec: AUTH-SHELL

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 05ŌĆō09, 17 |
| **Screens** | ,  |

---

#### 1. Scope

##### 1.1 Authentication routes (unauthenticated)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| A1 | Login | `/auth/` or `/auth/login` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A2 | Forgot password | `/auth/forgot-password` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A3 | Reset password | `/auth/reset-password/:id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A4 | Two-FA | `/auth/two-fa` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A5 | Verification | `/auth/verification` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A6 | Portal / SSO | `/auth/portal` | Extension-only slot |

##### 1.2 Public setup routes

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| P1 | Install | `/install` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| P2 | Onboard | `/onboard/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| P3 | Verify email (onboard) | `/onboard/verify-email` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| P4 | User invite | `/join/org/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| P5 | Driver invite | `/join/fleet/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |

##### 1.3 Authenticated shell

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| S1 | Console shell | all routes under `/` post-login | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Home (no sidebar) | `/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | Notifications (no sidebar) | `/notifications` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. Global auth UX (all auth pages)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| AUTH-UX-001 | Centered card layout, max-width 640px, brand logo top |
| AUTH-UX-002 | Full viewport height; no app shell chrome |
| AUTH-UX-003 | Focus first field on load |
| AUTH-UX-004 | Submit on Enter in single-column forms |
| AUTH-UX-005 | Loading: disable form + spinner on primary button |
| AUTH-UX-006 | Errors: inline under field + optional toast for server errors |
| AUTH-UX-007 | Extension SSO buttons below primary form (`auth:login` registry) |
| AUTH-UX-008 | RTL: mirror card alignment for `ar-ae` |

---

#### 3. Login (LLR-AUTH-LOGIN)

**URL:** `/auth/`  
**Services:** `session`, `fetch`, `notifications`, `intl`, `router`

##### 3.1 Fields

| Element | Binding | Type | Validation | a11y |
|---------|---------|------|------------|------|
| Logo | brand | image | ŌĆö | alt from brand |
| Title | i18n `auth.login.title` | h1 | ŌĆö |
| Failed-attempt banner | `failedAttempts >= 3` | Alert + link | ŌĆö | role=alert |
| Email | `identity` | email | required | autocomplete=username |
| Password | `password` | password | required | autocomplete=current-password |
| Remember me | `rememberMe` | checkbox | ŌĆö |
| Forgot password | action `forgotPassword` | link | ŌĆö |
| Sign in | action `login` | submit | ŌĆö | loading=`isLoading` |
| Create account | `transitionToOnboard` | button secondary | ŌĆö |
| Extension buttons | RegistryYield `auth:login` | per menuItem | ŌĆö | aria-label=title |

##### 3.2 Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  A[Submit login] --> B{Credentials valid?}
  B -->|No| C[Increment failedAttempts]
  C --> D{failedAttempts >= 3?}
  D -->|Yes| E[Show banner + forgot link]
  B -->|Yes| F{2FA required?}
  F -->|Yes| G[/auth/two-fa]
  F -->|No| H{Email verified?}
  H -->|No| I[/auth/verification]
  H -->|Yes| J[Console /]
```

**API:** Ember Simple Auth authenticate endpoint (via ember-core session adapter).

##### 3.3 Test cases

| TC ID | Steps | Expected |
|-------|-------|----------|
| TC-AUTH-001 | Valid login | Redirect home |
| TC-AUTH-002 | Invalid password 3├Ś | Banner visible |
| TC-AUTH-003 | Remember me checked | Session persists |
| TC-AUTH-004 | Extension SSO click | Provider flow starts |

---

#### 4. Forgot password (LLR-AUTH-FORGOT)

**URL:** `/auth/forgot-password`  
**Task:** `sendSecureLink`  
**Query param:** `email` (pre-fill from link)

##### 4.1 States

| State | UI |
|-------|-----|
| `!isSent` | InfoBlock + email input + Submit + ŌĆ£NevermindŌĆØ ŌåÆ login |
| `isSent` | Success InfoBlock + Continue ŌåÆ login |

**API:** `POST auth/get-magic-reset-link`

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-AUTH-010 | Submit valid email ŌåÆ success state |
| TC-AUTH-011 | Nevermind ŌåÆ login route |

---

#### 5. Reset password (LLR-AUTH-RESET)

**URL:** `/auth/reset-password/:id`

| Field | Validation |
|-------|------------|
| password | required, policy |
| password_confirmation | must match |

**API:** `POST auth/reset-password`

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-AUTH-020 | Mismatch confirm ŌåÆ inline error |
| TC-AUTH-021 | Success ŌåÆ login with toast |

---

#### 6. Two-FA (LLR-AUTH-2FA)

**URL:** `/auth/two-fa`  
**Query params:** `token`, `clientToken`

##### 6.1 Components

| Element | Behavior |
|---------|----------|
| OtpInput | 6 digits; `handleOtpInput`; paste support |
| Countdown | `countdownReady`; session expiry timer |
| Expired block | `isCodeExpired` ŌåÆ InfoBlock + resend |
| Verify | submit `verifyCode`; loading state |
| Resend | `resendCode` |
| Cancel | `cancelTwoFactor` ŌåÆ login |

**APIs:** `POST two-fa/validate`, `verify`, `resend`, `invalidate`

**Error routes:** failure ŌåÆ redirect `auth.login`

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-AUTH-030 | Valid OTP ŌåÆ console |
| TC-AUTH-031 | Expired ŌåÆ resend enabled |
| TC-AUTH-032 | Cancel ŌåÆ login |

---

#### 7. Email verification (LLR-AUTH-VERIFY)

**URL:** `/auth/verification`

| Field | Behavior |
|-------|----------|
| Code | tel InputGroup; `validateInput` |
| Verify | disabled until `isReadyToSubmit` |
| Resend email/SMS | when `stillWaiting` |

**APIs:** `POST auth/verify-email`, `create-verification-session`, `validate-verification-session`

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-AUTH-040 | Valid code ŌåÆ console |
| TC-AUTH-041 | Resend ŌåÆ toast confirmation |

---

#### 8. Install, onboard & invites

Expanded requirements (journeys, field-level detail, `TC-CON-*` tests): **this document**.

Summary: `/install` (createdb ŌåÆ migrate ŌåÆ seed), `/onboard/` + `/onboard/verify-email`, `/invite/for-user`, `/invite/for-driver`. Boot gate redirects in ┬¦10.7.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-AUTH-050 | Full install ŌåÆ redirect onboard or login |
| TC-AUTH-051 | Failed step ŌåÆ retry CTA |
| TC-CON-INST-* | See CONSOLE-INSTALL-ONBOARD |

---

#### 10. Console shell (LLR-SHELL)

**URL:** wraps all authenticated routes  
**Route:** `console` ŌĆö requires session; loads `brand` id `1`

##### 10.1 Component tree

| Component | Responsibility |
|-----------|----------------|
| Layout::Container | Root flex layout |
| Layout::Header | Brand, smart nav, trays, user menu |
| Layout::Main | Sidebar + Section outlet + ResourceContextPanel |
| Layout::Sidebar | `#sidebar-menu-items` per-route |
| Layout::MobileNavbar | Bottom nav + extension overflow |
| ChatContainer | Chat UI |
| ConsoleWormhole | Portal targets |
| ImpersonatorTray | Admin impersonation exit |
| RegistryYield | `@fleetbase/console` extension slot |
| ResourceContextPanel | Right inspector |

##### 10.2 Header ŌĆö left

| # | Element | Action |
|---|---------|--------|
| 1 | Logo | ŌåÆ `/` |
| 2 | Sidebar toggle | desktop collapse |
| 3 | Smart nav | engine menu items (Fleet-Ops, Storefront, ŌĆ”) |
| 4 | Wormholes | `view-header-left-content-a/b` |

##### 10.3 Header ŌĆö right

| # | Element | Action |
|---|---------|--------|
| 1 | Global loading | async indicator |
| 2 | Actions wormhole | page-injected CTAs |
| 3 | Locale tray | change locale |
| 4 | Notifications tray | recent + link `/notifications` |
| 5 | Chat tray | open chat |
| 6 | Organization menu | switch / create / join org |
| 7 | User menu | account, settings, logout |

##### 10.4 Controller actions (shell)

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| onSidebarToggle | collapse/expand sidebar |
| setSidebarContext | engine-specific sidebar items |
| switchOrganization | `POST auth/switch-organization` + refresh |
| createOrJoinOrg | modals for org create/join |
| viewChangelog | modal or external link |

**Injected services:** `currentUser`, `session`, `universe`, `abilities`, `sidebar`, `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `intl`, `fetch`, `router`

##### 10.5 Sidebar visibility rules

| Route pattern | Sidebar |
|---------------|---------|
| `console.home` | Hidden |
| `console.notifications` | Hidden |
| `console.virtual` | Hidden |
| Account, settings, admin, engines | Visible |
| FleetOps order detail | Hidden (engine overrides) |
| FleetOps driver detail | Visible (panel layout) |

**REQ-SHELL-SIDEBAR-001** `hiddenSidebarRoutes` enforced in console controller; engines may call `sidebar.hideNow()` on enter.

##### 10.6 Shell UX requirements

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| SH-UX-001 | Active engine link highlighted in smart nav |
| SH-UX-002 | Org name truncated with tooltip if long |
| SH-UX-003 | Unsaved work: confirm on org switch |
| SH-UX-004 | Impersonation tray always visible when impersonating |
| SH-UX-005 | Mobile: hamburger opens drawer; bottom nav for engines |
| SH-UX-006 | Keyboard: `/` focuses search where present |

##### 10.7 Boot gate (application route)

| Order | Check | Redirect |
|------:|-------|----------|
| 1 | Installer not complete | `/install` |
| 2 | Onboard required | `/onboard` |
| 3 | Session setup + extensions boot | splash |
| 4 | Theme + locale | apply tokens |

---

#### 11. Home & notifications (shell children)

##### Home `/`

- `TwoFaEnforcementAlert` if policy requires enrollment
- Dashboard widget grid (edit mode: drag-resize)
- Wormhole `#console-home-wormhole`
- **Sidebar hidden**

##### Notifications `/notifications`

- Bulk: select all, mark read, delete
- Row click marks read
- Pagination `page` param
- **Sidebar hidden**

---

#### 12. Test cases (shell)

| TC ID | Area | Expected |
|-------|------|----------|
| TC-SHELL-001 | Login ŌåÆ home | Shell renders; brand logo |
| TC-SHELL-002 | Home route | No sidebar |
| TC-SHELL-003 | Navigate to settings | Sidebar visible |
| TC-SHELL-004 | Org switch | API called; data refreshes |
| TC-SHELL-005 | Mobile width | Bottom navbar visible |
| TC-SHELL-006 | Logout | Session cleared; auth login |
| TC-SHELL-007 | Extension slot | RegistryYield renders plugin |
| TC-SHELL-008 | Notifications | Full page inbox works |
| TC-SHELL-009 | 2FA alert on home | Banner when policy enforced |
| TC-SHELL-010 | Impersonation | Tray visible; exit works |

---

#### 13. Security requirements

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| SEC-001 | Auth pages no-cache headers |
| SEC-002 | Password fields masked; toggle show optional |
| SEC-003 | Rate-limit feedback via failed-attempt banner |
| SEC-004 | 2FA session timeout enforced client-side |
| SEC-005 | Reset password token single-use (server); invalid token message |
| SEC-006 | CSRF/session cookies per existing API contract |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `LLR-AUTH-*`, `LLR-SHELL-*`, `TC-AUTH-*`, `TC-SHELL-*`*


### Feature spec: CONSOLE-INSTALL-ONBOARD

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 05ŌĆō07, 17 |
| **Related** | AUTH-SHELL (auth routes + shell boot gate) |

> Deep dive for first-run and invitation flows. Login, 2FA, and shell chrome remain in AUTH-SHELL.

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Flow | URL | Spec |
|---|------|-----|------|
| I1 | Install wizard | `/install` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| O1 | Onboard parent | `/onboard` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| O2 | Onboard steps | `/onboard/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| O3 | Verify email (onboard) | `/onboard/verify-email` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| V1 | Invite parent | `/invite` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| V2 | User org invite | `/invite/for-user` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| V3 | Driver fleet invite | `/invite/for-driver` | (screen spec in this volume) |

**Layout:** All use auth-style centered card (max 640px) ŌĆö no app shell. See AUTH-UX-001ŌĆ”008 in AUTH-SHELL.

---

#### 2. Boot gate integration (LLR-BOOT-GATE)

**REQ-CON-BOOT-001** Application route checks (from AUTH-SHELL ┬¦10.7):

| Order | Condition | Redirect |
|------:|-----------|----------|
| 1 | Installer incomplete | `/install` |
| 2 | Onboarding required | `/onboard` |
| 3 | No session (protected route) | `/auth/login` |
| 4 | Extensions + theme load | splash ŌåÆ destination |

Install and onboard routes must **not** require session; hide sidebar globally.

---

#### 3. User journeys

##### J-CON-INST-1 ŌĆö Fresh deployment install

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Hit app URL | `GET installer/initialize` ŌåÆ `/install` |
| 2 | Start install | `startInstall` runs task pipeline |
| 3 | Steps complete | createdb ŌåÆ migrate ŌåÆ seed |
| 4 | Done | `onInstallCompleted` ŌåÆ `/onboard` or `/auth/login` |

##### J-CON-ONB-1 ŌĆö New company signup

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Login ŌåÆ Create account | ŌåÆ `/onboard` |
| 2 | Onboarding wizard | `Onboarding::Yield` multi-step |
| 3 | Verify email | `/onboard/verify-email` |
| 4 | Enter code / resend | APIs below |
| 5 | Complete | Session ŌåÆ console home |

##### J-CON-INV-1 ŌĆö Employee accepts org invite

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open invite link | Load invite token from URL |
| 2 | Enter code + set password | `acceptInvite`, `setPassword` |
| 3 | Authenticate | Redirect to console |

---

#### 4. Install wizard (LLR-CON-INSTALL)

**REQ-CON-INSTALL-001**  
**URL:** `/install`  
**Services:** `fetch`, `notifications`, `router`  
**Tasks:** `createdb`, `migrate`, `seed` (ember-concurrency)

##### 4.1 Step pipeline UI

| Step key | Label (i18n) | Task | Status visuals |
|----------|----------------|------|----------------|
| createdb | install.steps.createdb | `createdb.perform()` | pending / in_progress / completed / failed |
| migrate | install.steps.migrate | `migrate.perform()` | Ōåæ |
| seed | install.steps.seed | `seed.perform()` | Ōåæ |

**Template conditionals:** `eq step.status 'in_progress'`, `this.error`

##### 4.2 Actions

| Label | Handler | When |
|-------|---------|------|
| install.start-install | `startInstall` | Initial / retry after reset |
| install.retry-install | `startInstall` | `this.error` true |
| (implicit) | `reset` | Between retries |
| (implicit) | `onInstallCompleted` | All steps completed |
| (implicit) | `updateTask` | Progress callback from API |

##### 4.3 API sequence

| Order | Endpoint | Purpose |
|------:|----------|---------|
| 1 | `POST installer/createdb` | Create database |
| 2 | `POST installer/migrate` | Run migrations |
| 3 | `POST installer/seed` | Seed data |

**Error handling:** `serverError` toast; failed step shows red border; retry enabled.

##### 4.4 Install UX (FO-CON-INSTALL-001ŌĆ”004)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-CON-INSTALL-001 | Vertical step list; only one step in_progress at a time |
| FO-CON-INSTALL-002 | Disable start while any task running |
| FO-CON-INSTALL-003 | Completed install not revisitable without admin reset |
| FO-CON-INSTALL-004 | Full-page centered layout; no navigation away mid-install without confirm |

##### 4.5 Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-CON-INST-001 | Install page loads three steps |
| TC-CON-INST-002 | startInstall runs sequence |
| TC-CON-INST-003 | Step failure shows error + retry |
| TC-CON-INST-004 | Success redirects onboard/login |
| TC-CON-INST-005 | Tasks show isRunning spinner |

---

#### 5. Onboard wizard (LLR-CON-ONBOARD)

**REQ-CON-ONBOARD-001**  
**URL:** `/onboard/`  
**Component:** `Onboarding::Yield` (registry-driven steps)

##### 5.1 Typical steps (verify against source when available)

| Step | Content |
|------|---------|
| Welcome | Brand + get started |
| Company / profile | Org name, user details |
| Plan / preferences | Optional SKU selection |
| Complete | Transition to verify-email or console |

**Parent route:** (screen spec in this volume) ŌĆö outlet only.

##### 5.2 Onboard UX

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-CON-ONB-001 | Progress indicator across steps |
| FO-CON-ONB-002 | Back button preserves entered data |
| FO-CON-ONB-003 | Final step triggers verify-email route if email unverified |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-CON-ONB-001 | Wizard renders Onboarding::Yield |
| TC-CON-ONB-002 | Can navigate steps forward/back |
| TC-CON-ONB-003 | Complete routes to verify-email |

---

#### 6. Verify email ŌĆö onboard (LLR-CON-VERIFY-ONB)

**REQ-CON-VERIFY-ONB-001**  
**URL:** `/onboard/verify-email`

##### 6.1 Fields & actions

| Element | i18n / label | Behavior |
|---------|--------------|----------|
| Info text | auth.verification.* | Instructions |
| Code input | verification code | Required before submit |
| Resend email | auth.verification.not-sent.resend-email | When `stillWaiting` |
| Send SMS | auth.verification.not-sent.send-by-sms | Alternative channel |
| Verify & Continue | primary CTA | Submit code |

**Conditional:** `{{#if this.stillWaiting}}` ŌĆö show resend options.

##### 6.2 APIs

| Action | Endpoint |
|--------|----------|
| Verify | `POST onboard/verify-email` |
| Resend email | `POST onboard/send-verification-email` |
| Resend SMS | `POST onboard/send-verification-sms` |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-CON-VER-001 | Valid code ŌåÆ console |
| TC-CON-VER-002 | Invalid code ŌåÆ inline error |
| TC-CON-VER-003 | Resend email toast |
| TC-CON-VER-004 | stillWaiting shows resend UI |

---

#### 7. User invite (LLR-CON-INV-USER)

**REQ-CON-INV-USER-001**  
**URL:** `/invite/for-user` (org invite ŌĆö confirm param name in deploy)  
**Services:** `fetch`, `session`, `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `router`

##### 7.1 Fields

| Field | Required | Notes |
|-------|----------|-------|
| Invitation code | yes | From email link or manual entry |
| Password | yes (new users) | `setPassword` |
| Confirm password | yes | Match validation |
| Accept terms | if shown | checkbox |

##### 7.2 Actions

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| Accept invite | `acceptInvite` |
| Set password | `setPassword` |

##### 7.3 APIs

| Action | Endpoint |
|--------|----------|
| Accept | `POST users/accept-company-invite` |
| Password | `POST users/set-password` + authenticate |

**Loading:** `@isLoading` on primary buttons.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-CON-INV-001 | Valid invite + password ŌåÆ login state |
| TC-CON-INV-002 | Invalid code ŌåÆ error |
| TC-CON-INV-003 | Password mismatch blocked |

---

#### 8. Driver invite (LLR-CON-INV-DRIVER)

**REQ-CON-INV-DRIVER-001**  
**URL:** `/invite/for-driver`  
**Note:** Minimal template in current spec ŌĆö align with FleetOps driver portal onboarding.

##### 8.1 Expected fields

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Invite code | From fleet invite link |
| Driver profile basics | name, phone, license if required |
| Accept | Join fleet |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-CON-INV-010 | Driver invite page loads |
| TC-CON-INV-011 | Accept redirects to driver app or console |

---

#### 9. Security & permissions

| Route | Session required |
|-------|----------------|
| `/install` | no |
| `/onboard/*` | no (pre-auth) |
| `/invite/*` | no |
| Post-complete | yes |

**REQ-CON-SEC-001:** Invite tokens single-use; expired token shows dedicated error card.

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-CON-INST-*` / `REQ-CON-ONB-*` / `REQ-CON-INV-*` / `TC-CON-*`*


### Feature spec: ADMIN-PANEL

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 14ŌĆō15 |
| **Screens** |  (18 files) |

---

#### 1. Scope

##### 1.1 Access control

| REQ | Rule |
|-----|------|
| REQ-ADM-ACCESS-001 | Only `is_admin` (or equivalent) users may enter `/admin/*` |
| REQ-ADM-ACCESS-002 | Non-admin: warning toast + redirect to `/` |
| REQ-ADM-ACCESS-003 | All admin API calls return 403 ŌåÆ same UX as console permission pattern |

##### 1.2 Admin shell

**URL prefix:** `/admin`  
**Template:** (screen spec in this volume)

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö¼ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé Admin        Ōöé  Page header + actions                  Ōöé
Ōöé sidebar      Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé (built-in +  Ōöé  {{outlet}} ŌĆö page content              Ōöé
Ōöé  extensions) Ōöé                                         Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö┤ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

**Sidebar sections (built-in):**

| # | Label | Route | Spec |
|---|-------|-------|------|
| 1 | Overview | `/admin/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 2 | Organizations | `/admin/organizations` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 3 | Branding | `/admin/branding` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 4 | 2FA Config | `/admin/two-fa-settings` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 5 | Schedule Monitor | `/admin/schedule-monitor` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 6 | System Config | panel with children | (screen spec in this volume) |

**Extension items:** `menuService.adminMenuItems` + `adminMenuPanels` after built-in entries.  
**Virtual:** `/admin/:slug?view=` ŌåÆ (screen spec in this volume)

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-ADM-1 ŌĆö System admin: monitor platform health

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open `/admin/` | Stat widgets load |
| 2 | Review totals | users, orgs, transactions |
| 3 | Drill to organizations | If needed |

##### J-ADM-2 ŌĆö Support: impersonate org user

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Organizations ŌåÆ select org | Table row |
| 2 | Users sub-route or overlay | 800px right panel |
| 3 | Impersonate | `POST auth/impersonate` + ImpersonatorTray |

##### J-ADM-3 ŌĆö Branding: update logo

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Branding page | brand id 1 |
| 2 | Upload logo + icon | Spinner on upload |
| 3 | Save + set theme | `theme` service updates globally |

##### J-ADM-4 ŌĆö DevOps: fix failed cron

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Schedule monitor | Task list |
| 2 | Click failed task | Logs overlay |
| 3 | Refresh logs | `GET schedule-monitor/:id/logs` |

---

#### 3. Overview `/admin/` (LLR-ADM-OVERVIEW)

**API:** `GET settings/overview`

##### 3.1 Stat widgets

| Key | Label | UX |
|-----|-------|-----|
| `total_users` | Total Users | StatWidget, click ŌåÆ drill if linked |
| `total_organizations` | Total Organizations | link to org list |
| `total_transactions` | Total Transactions | optional drill |

**Layout:** `Layout::Section::Header` + `Layout::Section::Body` + grid of `StatWidget` + `Spacer`

**UX:** Skeleton cards while loading; error banner with retry on API fail.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-001 | Three stats render with numbers |
| TC-ADM-002 | Non-admin blocked |

---

#### 4. Organizations `/admin/organizations` (LLR-ADM-ORGS)

**API:** `GET companies?view=admin`  
**Store:** `store.query('company')`

##### 4.1 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `name`, `country`

##### 4.2 Table columns

| Column | Path |
|--------|------|
| name | `name` |
| owner.name | `owner.name` |
| owner.email | `owner.email` |
| owner.phone | `owner.phone` |
| users_count | `users_count` |
| createdAt | `createdAt` |

##### 4.3 Actions

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| Search | `search` ŌĆö updates `query` |
| Export | `exportOrganization` |
| Row click | `goToCompany` ŌåÆ users or detail |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-010 | Table paginates |
| TC-ADM-011 | Search filters URL |
| TC-ADM-012 | Export downloads file |

---

#### 5. Organization users `/admin/organizations/:public_id/users` (LLR-ADM-ORG-USERS)

**API:** `GET companies/:id/users`  
**Layout:** Main table + **right overlay 800px** when user selected

##### 5.1 Nested query params

`nestedPage`, `nestedLimit`, `nestedSort`, `nestedQuery`

##### 5.2 Columns

| Column | Path |
|--------|------|
| name | `name` |
| roleName | `roleName` |
| phone | `phone` |
| email | `email` |
| status | `status` |

##### 5.3 Row actions

| Action | API | UX |
|--------|-----|-----|
| Impersonate | `POST auth/impersonate` | Confirm modal; ImpersonatorTray appears |
| Change password | modal `changeUserPassword` | Admin sets new password |

##### 5.4 Overlay UX (FO-ADM-OVERLAY-001)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-ADM-OVERLAY-001 | Overlay slides from right; ESC closes |
| FO-ADM-OVERLAY-002 | `onPressClose` clears overlay context |
| FO-ADM-OVERLAY-003 | Pagination footer when `meta.total > nestedLimit` |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-020 | Overlay opens on row |
| TC-ADM-021 | Impersonate shows tray |
| TC-ADM-022 | Change password modal works |

---

#### 6. Branding `/admin/branding` (LLR-ADM-BRAND)

**Model:** `brand` id `1`  
**Services:** `fetch`, `notifications`, `theme`

##### 6.1 Fields

| Field | Control | Actions |
|-------|---------|---------|
| icon | FileUpload image/* | uploadIcon, unsetIcon |
| logo | FileUpload image/* | uploadLogo, unsetLogo |
| default_theme | Select | setTheme on save |

##### 6.2 Actions

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Save | PATCH brand + apply theme |
| Reset icon / logo | unset helpers |
| Upload | Spinner while `queue.files.length` |

**UX:** Live preview of logo in header mock; theme preview swatch.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-030 | Upload shows spinner |
| TC-ADM-031 | Save applies theme globally |
| TC-ADM-032 | Reset logo restores default |

---

#### 7. Two-FA settings `/admin/two-fa-settings` (LLR-ADM-2FA)

**API:** `GET/POST two-fa/config`  
**Component:** `TwoFaSettings` with `@twoFaMethods`, `@enforce`, `@selectedMethod`

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Save | POST config; toast success |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-040 | Load current config |
| TC-ADM-041 | Save persists enforce flag |

---

#### 8. Schedule monitor (LLR-ADM-SCHEDULE)

##### 8.1 Task list `/admin/schedule-monitor`

**API:** `GET schedule-monitor/tasks`

| Column | Notes |
|--------|-------|
| Name | link to logs route |
| Type | |
| Timezone | |
| Last Started | |
| Last Finished | |
| Last Failure | red if recent failure |

##### 8.2 Logs `/admin/schedule-monitor/:id/logs`

**API:** `GET schedule-monitor/:id`, `GET .../logs`  
**Layout:** Right overlay `true`  
**Actions:** Refresh

| Log field | Display |
|-----------|---------|
| date | timestamp |
| memory | formatted |
| runtime | duration |
| output | monospace pre-wrap |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-050 | Task list loads |
| TC-ADM-051 | Name links to logs |
| TC-ADM-052 | Refresh updates log entries |

---

#### 9. System config `/admin/config/*` (LLR-ADM-CONFIG)

| URL | Component | Header title |
|-----|-----------|--------------|
| `/admin/config/database` | `Configure::Database` | Database Configuration |
| `/admin/config/cache` | outlet placeholder | Cache |
| `/admin/config/filesystem` | `Configure::Filesystem` | Filesystem Configuration |
| `/admin/config/mail` | `Configure::Mail` | Mail Configuration |
| `/admin/config/queue` | `Configure::Queue` | Queue Configuration |
| `/admin/config/services` | `Configure::Services` | Services Configuration |
| `/admin/config/socket` | `Configure::Socket` | Socket Configuration |
| `/admin/config/push-notifications` | `Configure::NotificationChannels` | Push Notifications Configuration |

**REQ-ADM-CONFIG-001:** Each configure component renders env-key form fields from  ŌĆö implement field-for-field when rebuilding.

**UX patterns (all config pages):**

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-ADM-CFG-001 | Dangerous keys (passwords) masked with reveal toggle |
| FO-ADM-CFG-002 | Save tests connection where applicable (DB, mail) |
| FO-ADM-CFG-003 | Success/error toasts; do not clear form on error |
| FO-ADM-CFG-004 | Section headers group related keys |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-060 | Database page renders fields |
| TC-ADM-061 | Mail save shows toast |
| TC-ADM-062 | Cache placeholder shows title + outlet |

---

#### 10. Extension admin pages (LLR-ADM-EXT)

**Route:** `/admin/:slug?view=`  
**Mechanism:** `menuService.lookupMenuItem` ŌåÆ LazyEngineComponent

| REQ | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| REQ-ADM-EXT-001 | Sidebar shows extension items after System Config |
| REQ-ADM-EXT-002 | `?view=` switches sub-panel within multi-view extensions |
| REQ-ADM-EXT-003 | Permission on menu item hides entry |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-ADM-070 | Extension route renders component |
| TC-ADM-071 | view query changes sub-view |

---

#### 11. Admin UX & security

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| ADM-UX-001 | Destructive actions (impersonate, password reset) require confirm |
| ADM-UX-002 | Impersonation banner always visible until exit |
| ADM-UX-003 | Config pages: warn on navigate away if dirty |
| ADM-UX-004 | Tables: sticky header, export doesn't block UI |
| ADM-SEC-001 | Audit log entry for impersonate (if API provides) |
| ADM-SEC-002 | Rate-limit sensitive endpoints client feedback |

### Feature spec: FLEETOPS-ORDERS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Doc 36, 42, 46 |
| **Screens** | 6 specs under  |
| 
---

#### Table of contents

1. Scope & screens
2. User journeys & success criteria
3. Orders list ŌĆö map / table / kanban
4. Order detail ŌĆö full specification
5. Create order ŌĆö form specification
6. Data model & API
7. Modals catalog
8. Realtime & sockets
9. Extension slots
10. Test cases

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec file |
|---|--------|-----|-----------|
| S1 | Orders list | `/fleet-ops/operations/orders` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Order detail | `/fleet-ops/operations/orders/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | Order overview tab | `.../orders/:public_id` (default) | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | Order extension tab | `.../orders/:public_id/:slug` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S5 | Create order | `/fleet-ops/operations/orders/new` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S6 | Parent layout | `/fleet-ops/operations/orders/*` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys & success criteria

##### Journey J-D1 ŌĆö Dispatcher: find and open order

| Step | User action | System response | UX requirement |
|------|-------------|-----------------|----------------|
| 1 | Opens orders list | Loads orders; restores last `layout` (map/table/kanban) | Skeleton <1s; layout persisted in URL `?layout=` |
| 2 | Filters by status ŌĆ£pendingŌĆØ | Table/map updates | Debounced filter; ŌĆ£Clear filtersŌĆØ when empty |
| 3 | Clicks row / marker | Navigates to detail | Row highlight; back returns to same filter/page |
| 4 | Views map on detail | Route + markers visible | Sidebar hidden; full-width map |

**Success:** Ōēż3 clicks from list to assign-ready detail; filters survive back navigation.

##### Journey J-D2 ŌĆö Dispatcher: bulk dispatch

| Step | User action | System response |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| 1 | Selects 5 rows in table mode | Bulk toolbar shows ŌĆ£5 selectedŌĆØ |
| 2 | Clicks ŌĆ£Dispatch ordersŌĆØ | Confirm modal |
| 3 | Confirms | Loading on modal ŌåÆ API ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ selection cleared ŌåÆ list refresh |

##### Journey J-D3 ŌĆö Dispatcher: cancel order

| Step | User action | System response |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| 1 | Opens order detail | Header actions visible per permission |
| 2 | Clicks Cancel | Confirm modal `order.prompts.cancel-title` |
| 3 | Confirms | Status ŌåÆ canceled; Edit/Update/Unassign/Cancel disabled |

##### Journey J-D4 ŌĆö Create order

| Step | User action | System response |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| 1 | Clicks New on list | Navigate to create form |
| 2 | Fills Details + Route + Payload | Validation inline |
| 3 | Saves | Loader on save ŌåÆ redirect to detail or list |

---

#### 3. Orders list ŌĆö map / table / kanban

**REQ-FO-ORD-LIST-001** Route: `/fleet-ops/operations/orders`  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops view order` (route gate)

##### 3.1 Layout modes

| Mode | Query `layout` | Visible UI | REQ ID |
|------|----------------|------------|--------|
| Map | `map` (default recommended) | `MapContainer::Topbar`, `Map`, `Map.OrderList`, `Map.Drawer`, view switch | FO-L-001 |
| Table | `table` | `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö filters + table + pagination | FO-L-002 |
| Kanban | `kanban` | `Order::Kanban` ŌĆö columns by status, order-config filter | FO-L-003 |

**FO-L-001 Map mode UX**

- Topbar: search, filters, view switch (map | table | kanban)
- Live map: markers for orders; cluster when dense
- Order list overlay: scrollable; sync selection with map marker
- Drawer: `drawerOpen`, `drawerTab` query params ŌĆö quick preview without full navigation
- **Performance:** Progressive tile load ŌåÆ markers ŌåÆ list (UX-072)

**FO-L-002 Table mode UX**

- 18 columns (all sortable + filterable per spec)
- Sticky header; horizontal scroll on mobile
- Row click ŌåÆ detail route (checkbox column excluded from click)

**FO-L-003 Kanban mode UX**

- Columns from order statuses API (`orders/statuses`)
- Drag card between columns only if API supports status transition (confirm if destructive)
- Filter by order-config via `ModelSelect`

##### 3.2 Table columns (field-level)

| # | i18n key | valuePath | Display format | Sort | Filter QP |
|---|----------|-----------|----------------|------|-----------|
| 1 | column.id | `public_id` | monospace link | yes | `public_id` |
| 2 | column.internal-id | `internal_id` | text | yes | `internal_id` |
| 3 | column.payload | `payload.public_id` | link | yes | `payload` |
| 4 | column.driver-assigned | `driver_assigned` | name or ŌĆ£ŌĆöŌĆØ | yes | `driver` |
| 5 | column.pickup | `pickupName` | truncated 40ch | yes | `pickup` |
| 6 | column.dropoff | `dropoffName` | truncated 40ch | yes | `dropoff` |
| 7 | column.customer | `customer.name` | text | yes | `customer` |
| 8 | column.vehicle-assigned | `vehicle_assigned.display_name` | text | yes | `vehicle` |
| 9 | column.facilitator | `facilitator.name` | text | yes | `facilitator` |
| 10 | column.scheduled-at | `scheduledAt` | locale datetime | yes | `scheduled_at` |
| 11 | column.items | `item_count` | number | yes | ŌĆö |
| 12 | column.transaction | `transaction_amount` | currency | yes | ŌĆö |
| 13 | column.tracking | `tracking_number.tracking_number` | text | yes | `tracking_number` |
| 14 | column.type | `type` | badge | yes | `type` |
| 15 | column.status | `status` | colored badge | yes | `status` |
| 16 | column.created-at | `createdAt` | relative + tooltip absolute | yes | `created_at` |
| 17 | column.updated-at | `updatedAt` | relative + tooltip | yes | `updated_at` |
| 18 | column.created-by | `created_by_name` | text | yes | `created_by` |
| 19 | column.updated-by | `updated_by_name` | text | yes | `updated_by` |

##### 3.3 Query parameters (URL-synced)

| Param | Type | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `page`, `limit`, `sort` | pagination | Table/kanban list |
| `query` | string | Global search |
| `layout` | `map` \| `table` \| `kanban` | View mode |
| `drawerOpen`, `drawerTab` | boolean/string | Map drawer |
| `orderPanelOpen` | boolean | Side panel |
| `public_id`, `internal_id`, `payload`, `tracking_number` | filters | Column filters |
| `facilitator`, `customer`, `driver`, `vehicle` | UUID/slug | Relation filters |
| `pickup`, `dropoff` | place | Location filters |
| `created_by`, `updated_by` | user | Audit filters |
| `created_at`, `updated_at`, `scheduled_at` | date range | Date filters |
| `status`, `type` | enum/multi | Status/type |
| `without_driver` | boolean | Unassigned only |
| `bulk_query` | string | Bulk search mode |

**REQ:** Changing filter updates URL; shareable link restores state.

##### 3.4 Header actions (list)

| Label (i18n) | Handler | Permission | UX |
|--------------|---------|------------|-----|
| common.refresh | `orderActions.refresh` | view order | Icon button; spinner while running |
| common.new | `orderActions.transition` ŌåÆ create | create order | Primary CTA |
| common.export | `orderActions.export` | export permission | Download file or async job toast |
| common.import | `orderActions.importOrders` | import | Opens orchestrator-import modal |

##### 3.5 Bulk actions (table selection)

| Label | Handler | Permission | Confirm |
|-------|---------|------------|---------|
| common.cancel-resource | `bulkCancel` | cancel order | Yes ŌĆö count in title |
| common.delete-resource | `bulkDelete` | delete order | Yes ŌĆö destructive |
| common.dispatch-orders | `bulkDispatch` | dispatch order | Yes |
| common.assign-drivers | `bulkAssignDriver` | assign driver | Modal picker |

**UX:** Toolbar fixed above table when selection > 0; `untoggleSelectAll` after success.

##### 3.6 List data load

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| API | `GET orders` (paginated query) |
| Store | `store.query('order', { page, limit, sort, ...filters })` |
| Socket | `orderSocketEvents.start(model)` on enter; `stop` on leave |
| Empty | ŌĆ£No ordersŌĆØ + Create order CTA |
| Error | Banner + retry |

---

#### 4. Order detail ŌĆö full specification

**REQ-FO-ORD-DETAIL-001** URL: `/fleet-ops/operations/orders/:public_id`

##### 4.1 Route lifecycle

| Hook | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `beforeModel` | `abilities.cannot('fleet-ops view order')` ŌåÆ warning toast ŌåÆ redirect list |
| `model` | `queryRecord('order', { single: true, with: [...] })` |
| `afterModel` | `order.loadTrackingActivity()`; conditional `reload()` if `meta._index_resource` |
| `error` | `serverError` + redirect `/fleet-ops/operations/orders` |
| `willTransition` | Cleanup map, sockets, `sidebar` restore |

**Model includes (eager load):**

`payload`, `driverAssigned`, `orderConfig`, `customer`, `facilitator`, `trackingStatuses`, `trackingNumber`, `purchaseRate`, `comments`, `files`


**REQ-FO-ORD-DETAIL-002** On enter: `sidebar.hideNow()` ŌĆö FleetOps sidebar hidden, map uses full width.

##### 4.3 Header summary fields (read-only)

| Field | Source | Display |
|-------|--------|---------|
| Status | `order.status` | Badge (color by status) |
| Order ID | `order.public_id` | Copy button |
| Internal ID | `order.internal_id` | Secondary text |
| Customer | `order.customer_name` / `customer` | Link to customer |
| Driver | `order.driver_name` / `driverAssigned` | Avatar + name or ŌĆ£UnassignedŌĆØ |
| Vehicle | `driverAssigned.vehicle` | If present |
| Scheduled | `order.scheduled_at` | Locale datetime |
| ETA | `order.eta` | If tracking active |
| Type | `order.type` | Badge |

##### 4.4 Action menu (header)

| Action | Handler | Disabled when | Permission |
|--------|---------|---------------|------------|
| Edit details | `editOrderDetails` | `status === 'canceled'` | update order |
| Update activity | `updateActivity` | `status === 'canceled'` | update order |
| Unassign driver | `unassignDriver` | `canceled` OR no driver | assign |
| View order label | `viewLabel` | ŌĆö | view order |
| View metadata | `viewMetadata` | ŌĆö | view order |
| Cancel order | `cancel` | `status === 'canceled'` | cancel order |
| Delete order | `delete` | ŌĆö | delete order |
| Dispatch | `dispatch` | per business rules | dispatch order |
| Assign driver | `assignDriver` | per business rules | assign driver |

**UX:** Group destructive actions at bottom of menu with divider; confirm all destructive ops.

##### 4.5 Tabs

| Tab | Route child | Component |
|-----|-------------|-----------|
| Overview | `details.index` | `Order::Details` |
| Extension | `details.virtual` | `LazyEngineComponent` from `fleet-ops:component:order:details` |

**REQ:** Extension tabs render only if `abilities.can` on tab `@permission`.

##### 4.6 Order::Details child panels

Implement each as collapsible section or sub-tab within Overview:

| Panel | Component | Content | UX |
|-------|-----------|---------|-----|
| Activity | `Order::Details::Activity` | Timeline / list toggle | Persist layout `fleetops:order:activity:layout` in user prefs |
| Detail | `Order::Details::Detail` | Core order fields | Inline edit where supported |
| Custom fields | `Order::Details::CustomFields` | Org custom fields | Dynamic schema |
| Purchase rate | `Order::Details::PurchaseRate` | Pricing breakdown | Currency format |
| Tracking | `Order::Details::Tracking` | Tracking statuses | Live updates via socket |
| Proof | `Order::Details::Proof` | POD images/signatures | Gallery lightbox |
| Notes | `Order::Details::Notes` | Internal notes | Add note CTA |
| Integrated vendor | `Order::Details::IntegratedVendorDetails` | Vendor sync state | Status badges |
| Route | `Order::Details::Route` | Waypoints map + list | Edit route action |
| Payload | `Order::Details::Payload` | Entities, quantities | Expand rows |
| Documents | `Order::Details::Documents` | File list | Upload + download |
| Comments | `Order::Details::Comments` | Thread | @mention if API supports |
| Metadata | `Order::Details::Metadata` | JSON key-values | View/edit modal |

**Activity panel UX (FO-D-ACT-001)**

| Mode | UI |
|------|-----|
| timeline | Vertical timeline with icons per event type |
| list | Compact table: time, type, description, actor |

Toggle persists via `appCache` key `fleetops:order:activity:layout`.

##### 4.7 Map on detail

| Element | Requirement |
|---------|-------------|
| Pickup marker | Distinct icon/color |
| Dropoff marker | Distinct icon/color |
| Driver position | Live if socket provides |
| Route polyline | Leaflet routing control; replace on `order.updated` |
| Layer toggle | Driver / places visibility |

---

#### 5. Create order ŌĆö form specification

**REQ-FO-ORD-CREATE-001** URL: `/fleet-ops/operations/orders/new`  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops create order`

##### 5.1 Layout

`Layout::Resource::Panel` wrapping `Order::Form` with sections:

##### 5.2 Order::Form::Details

| Field (i18n key) | Binding | Control | Required | Validation |
|------------------|---------|---------|----------|------------|
| order.fields.order-type | `order.type` | Select / order-config | yes | ŌĆö |
| order.fields.internal-id | `order.internal_id` | Text | no | unique per org if API enforces |
| order.fields.customer | `order.customer` | ModelSelect customer | yes | ŌĆö |
| order.fields.facilitator | `order.facilitator` | ModelSelect | no | ŌĆö |
| order.fields.service-type | service type | Select | per config | ŌĆö |
| order.fields.assign-driver | `order.driver_assigned` | ModelSelect driver | no | ŌĆö |
| order.fields.assign-vehicle | vehicle | ModelSelect | no | ŌĆö |
| order.fields.proof-delivery | `order.pod_required` | Toggle | no | ŌĆö |
| order.fields.adhoc-ping | adhoc flag | Toggle | no | ŌĆö |
| Time Window Start | `order.time_window_start` | datetime | conditional | end > start |
| Time Window End | `order.time_window_end` | datetime | conditional | ŌĆö |
| Required Skills | `order.orchestrator_priority` / skills | multi | no | ŌĆö |
| Scheduled at | `order.scheduled_at` | datetime | no | ŌĆö |

##### 5.3 Order::Form::Route

- Waypoint picker (places)
- Map preview of route
- Adhoc distance calculation display

##### 5.4 Order::Form::Payload

| Field | Binding | Control |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Entity name | `entity.name` | Text per line item |
| (+ quantity, weight, etc.) | entity attrs | per fleetops-data `entity` model |

##### 5.5 Order::Form::ServiceRate

| Field | Binding |
|-------|---------|
| order.fields.select-service-rate | `purchase_rate` / service quote |

##### 5.6 Order::Form::Notes / Documents / Metadata

- Notes: textarea `order.notes`
- Documents: multi FileUpload
- Metadata: key-value editor ŌåÆ `order.meta`

##### 5.7 Create actions

| Action | Handler | UX |
|--------|---------|-----|
| Save | `save` task | Primary; disabled while `.isRunning` |
| Import | `orderImport.promptImport` | Secondary ŌĆö opens order-import modal |
| Cancel | navigate back | Confirm if dirty |

**API:** `POST orders` ŌåÆ redirect to `.../orders/:public_id`

---

#### 6. Data model & API

##### 6.1 Order entity (primary fields)

See Doc 33 ŌĆö implement serializers for all fields used in UI:

| Category | Fields |
|----------|--------|
| Identity | `public_id`, `internal_id`, `type`, `status` |
| Parties | `customer_*`, `facilitator_*`, `driver_*`, `created_by_name`, `updated_by_name` |
| Locations | `pickup_name`, `dropoff_name` |
| Scheduling | `scheduled_at`, `time_window_start`, `time_window_end`, `eta` |
| Financial | `transaction_amount`, `purchase_rate_uuid` |
| Flags | `dispatched`, `started`, `pod_required`, `has_driver_assigned`, `adhoc` |
| Meta | `meta`, `options`, `tracker_data`, `notes` |

##### 6.2 API endpoints (orders feature)

| Operation | Method | Endpoint pattern |
|-----------|--------|------------------|
| List | GET | `/orders` |
| Detail | GET | `/orders/:id` |
| Create | POST | `/orders` |
| Update | PATCH | `/orders/:id` |
| Delete | DELETE | `/orders/:id` |
| Dispatch | POST | `/orders/:id/dispatch` (or adapter action) |
| Cancel | POST | `/orders/:id/cancel` |
| Bulk dispatch | POST | `/orders/bulk-dispatch` |
| Bulk cancel | POST | `/orders/bulk-cancel` |
| Bulk delete | DELETE | `/orders/bulk-delete` |
| Assign driver | POST | `/orders/:id/assign-driver` |
| Export | GET | `/orders/export` |
| Import | POST | `/orders/import` |
| Statuses lookup | GET | `/orders/statuses` |

*Exact paths ŌĆö verify against Doc 34 / adapter map during implementation.*

---

#### 7. Modals catalog

| Modal ID | Trigger | Type | On confirm | On error |
|----------|---------|------|------------|----------|
| `order.prompts.dispatch-title` | dispatch / bulkDispatch | confirm | API dispatch, toast, close | stopLoading, stay open |
| `order.prompts.cancel-title` | cancel / bulkCancel | confirm | API cancel, toast, close | stopLoading |
| confirm delete | delete / bulkDelete | confirm | DELETE, redirect/list refresh | stopLoading |
| `modals/update-order-activity` | updateActivity | show | save activity | stopLoading |
| `modals/view-metadata` | viewMetadata | show | read-only | ŌĆö |
| `modals/edit-metadata` | editMetadata | show | PATCH meta | stopLoading |
| `modals/view-label` | viewLabel | show | print/PDF | ŌĆö |
| `modals/orchestrator-import` | importOrders | show | import job | stopLoading |
| `modals/order-import` | promptImport (create) | show | import into form | stopLoading |
| `common.continue-without-saving` | route leave dirty | confirm | discard changes | ŌĆö |

**Global modal contract:** `startLoading()` ŌåÆ API ŌåÆ `done()` | `stopLoading()` + `serverError()`.

---

#### 8. Realtime & sockets

| Item | Specification |
|------|---------------|
| Channel | `order.{public_id}` |
| Subscribe | On detail enter: `orderSocketEvents.start(model)` |
| Unsubscribe | On leave: `orderSocketEvents.stop(model)` |
| Events | `order.created`, `order.completed`, `order.updated`, `waypoint.activity`, `entity.activity` |
| UI effect | Debounced `hostRouter.refresh()`; replace map routing control |
| Indicator | Subtle ŌĆ£UpdatedŌĆØ badge when visible fields change (UX-091) |

**List page:** socket subscription on index controller for live marker/status updates.

---

#### 9. Extension slots

| Registry | Inject into |
|----------|-------------|
| `fleet-ops:component:order:details` | Detail tabs (Storefront, Ledger, custom) |
| `fleet-ops:component:order:form` | Create/edit form shell |
| `fleet-ops:component:map:drawer` | Map drawer panels on list |

**REQ:** Custom tabs must declare `@permission`; hide tab and block route if unauthorized.

---

#### 10. Test cases

| TC ID | REQ | Steps | Expected |
|-------|-----|-------|----------|
| TC-FO-001 | FO-L-001 | Open list default map | Map + list visible; sockets start |
| TC-FO-002 | FO-L-002 | Switch to table | 18 columns; pagination works |
| TC-FO-003 | FO-L-003 | Switch to kanban | Columns per status |
| TC-FO-004 | FO-L-002 | Filter status=pending | URL updates; rows filtered |
| TC-FO-005 | FO-L-002 | Select 3 rows ŌåÆ bulk dispatch | Confirm ŌåÆ toast ŌåÆ selection cleared |
| TC-FO-006 | FO-L-001 | Click marker | Navigates or opens drawer per `drawerOpen` |
| TC-FO-007 | 4.1 | Open detail without permission | Warning toast; redirect list |
| TC-FO-008 | 4.1 | Open invalid public_id | serverError; redirect list |
| TC-FO-009 | 4.4 | Cancel active order | Status canceled; actions disabled |
| TC-FO-010 | 4.4 | Cancel already canceled | Button disabled/hidden |
| TC-FO-011 | 4.6 | Toggle activity timeline/list | Preference persists on reload |
| TC-FO-012 | 8 | Socket `order.updated` | Map route refreshes; no full page flash |
| TC-FO-013 | 5 | Create order valid | POST success ŌåÆ detail page |
| TC-FO-014 | 5 | Create required missing | Inline errors; no submit |
| TC-FO-015 | 7 | Delete confirm decline | Modal closes; no API call |
| TC-FO-016 | 7 | Delete confirm accept | Record removed; toast; list |

---

*Traceability: see this document rows `REQ-FO-ORD-*`.*


### Feature spec: FLEETOPS-DRIVERS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Doc 37 (Management) |
| **MASTER** | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 
---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec file |
|---|--------|-----|-----------|
| S1 | Drivers list | `/fleet-ops/management/drivers` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Driver detail | `/fleet-ops/management/drivers/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | Overview tab | (default detail) | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | Positions tab | detail / positions | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S5 | Schedule tab | detail / schedule | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S6 | Orders tab | detail / orders | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S7 | Extension tab | detail / virtual | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S8 | Create driver | `/fleet-ops/management/drivers/new` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S9 | Edit driver | `/fleet-ops/management/drivers/:id/edit` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-DRV-1 ŌĆö Fleet manager: onboard driver

| Step | Action | System | UX |
|------|--------|--------|-----|
| 1 | Open drivers list | Table loads | Skeleton rows |
| 2 | Click New | Navigate to create form | Primary CTA visible |
| 3 | Fill form + avatar | Validation inline | Avatar crop preview |
| 4 | Save | POST driver ŌåÆ detail | Toast + redirect to detail |

##### J-DRV-2 ŌĆö Dispatcher: assign vehicle from list

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Row action ŌĆ£Assign vehicleŌĆØ | Modal `modals/driver-assign-vehicle` |
| 2 | Select vehicle + confirm | PATCH driver; toast |
| 3 | Row updates | `vehicle.display_name` column refreshes |

##### J-DRV-3 ŌĆö Ops: review driver location history

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open driver detail | Panel layout, sidebar visible |
| 2 | Positions tab | `PositionsReplay` map/timeline |
| 3 | Scrub timeline | Marker moves on map |

##### J-DRV-4 ŌĆö Scheduler: view driver schedule

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Schedule tab | `Driver::Schedule` calendar |
| 2 | Click slot | Detail or edit per API |

---

#### 3. Drivers list (LLR-DRV-LIST)

**REQ-FO-DRV-LIST-001** URL: `/fleet-ops/management/drivers`  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops list driver` (route gate)

##### 3.1 Layout

- `Layout::Resource::Tabular`: header, filters, table, pagination
- No map/kanban on drivers list (table only)

##### 3.2 Table columns

| # | i18n key | valuePath | Format | Sort | Filter QP |
|---|----------|-----------|--------|------|-----------|
| 1 | column.name | `name` | text + avatar thumb | yes | `name` |
| 2 | column.id | `public_id` | monospace link | yes | `public_id` |
| 3 | column.internal-id | `internal_id` | text | yes | `internal_id` |
| 4 | column.vendor | `vendor.name` | text | yes | `vendor` |
| 5 | column.vehicle | `vehicle.display_name` | text | yes | `vehicle` |
| 6 | column.fleet | `fleets` | tags/chips | yes | `fleet` |
| 7 | column.license | `drivers_license_number` | text | yes | `drivers_license_number` |
| 8 | column.phone | `phone` | tel link | yes | `phone` |
| 9 | column.country | `country` | text | yes | `country` |
| 10 | column.status | `status` | badge + online dot if `online` | yes | `status` |
| 11 | column.created-at | `createdAt` | relative | yes | `created_at` |
| 12 | column.updated-at | `updatedAt` | relative | yes | `updated_at` |

##### 3.3 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `name`, `drivers_license_number`, `vehicle`, `fleet`, `vendor`, `phone`, `country`, `public_id`, `internal_id`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `status`

##### 3.4 Header actions

| Label | Handler | Permission |
|-------|---------|------------|
| common.refresh | `driverActions.refresh` | list driver |
| common.new | `driverActions.transition` ŌåÆ create | create driver |
| common.import | `driverActions.import` | import |
| common.export | `driverActions.export` | export |

##### 3.5 Row / bulk actions

| Action | Handler | Modal | Permission |
|--------|---------|-------|------------|
| Assign order | `assignOrder` | `modals/driver-assign-order` | assign-order-for driver |
| Assign vehicle | `assignVehicle` | `modals/driver-assign-vehicle` | assign-vehicle-for driver |
| Locate | `locate` | ŌĆö (map focus) | view driver |
| Delete | `delete` | confirm | delete driver |
| Bulk delete | `bulkDelete` | confirm + count | delete driver |

##### 3.6 Data load

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| API | `GET drivers` (paginated) |
| Store | `store.query('driver', {...})` |
| Row click | ŌåÆ detail route |

**UX:** Online drivers show green presence indicator; empty state ŌĆ£Add driverŌĆØ CTA.

---

#### 4. Driver detail (LLR-DRV-DETAIL)

**REQ-FO-DRV-DETAIL-001** URL: `/fleet-ops/management/drivers/:public_id`

##### 4.1 Route lifecycle

| Hook | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `beforeModel` | `cannot('fleet-ops view driver')` ŌåÆ warning ŌåÆ list |
| `model` | `findRecord('driver', public_id)` |
| `error` | `serverError`; if ŌĆ£not foundŌĆØ ŌåÆ redirect list |

**Unlike order detail:** sidebar is **not** hidden (`Layout::Resource::Panel`).

##### 4.3 Tabs

| Tab | Route | Component | UX |
|-----|-------|-----------|-----|
| Overview | `details.index` | `Driver::Details` | Field-info panels |
| Positions | `details.positions` | `PositionsReplay` | Map + time scrubber |
| Schedule | `details.schedule` | `Driver::Schedule` | Calendar week/month |
| Orders | `details.orders` | nested outlet | DriverŌĆÖs orders table |
| Extension | `details.virtual` | LazyEngineComponent | Registry tabs |

**Registry:** `fleet-ops:component:driver:details`

##### 4.4 Overview panel fields

| Section | Fields |
|---------|--------|
| Skills & certifications | skills list |
| Limits | Max driving time (`max_travel_time`), max distance (`max_distance` metres) |
| User account | linked user name, email, phone |
| Driver details | `public_id`, `internal_id`, `drivers_license_number` |
| Location | city, country, coordinates (map link) |
| Metadata | key-value `meta` |

##### 4.5 Header actions

| Action | Handler | Notes |
|--------|---------|-------|
| Edit | transition to edit route | Pencil icon |
| Back / Cancel | `onPressCancel` ŌåÆ list | Breadcrumb alternative |

Row-level actions from list also available via `driver-actions` on detail where applicable.

##### 4.6 Positions tab UX (FO-DRV-POS-001)

| Element | Requirement |
|---------|-------------|
| Map | Replay path for selected date range |
| Timeline | Scrubber syncs map marker |
| Empty | ŌĆ£No position dataŌĆØ when no GPS history |
| Loading | Skeleton map container |

##### 4.7 Schedule tab UX (FO-DRV-SCH-001)

| Element | Requirement |
|---------|-------------|
| Calendar | Week/month toggle |
| Events | Shifts, availability, assignments (per API) |
| Mobile | Agenda list fallback |

---

#### 5. Create / edit driver (LLR-DRV-FORM)

**Permission create:** `fleet-ops create driver`  
**Permission update:** `fleet-ops update driver`

##### 5.1 Driver::Form fields

| Field (i18n) | Binding | Control | Required |
|--------------|---------|---------|----------|
| driver.fields.user-account | `user` / link user | User picker or inline | conditional |
| common.name | `name` | text | yes |
| common.email | `email` | email | yes |
| common.phone | `phone` | PhoneInput | no |
| common.internal-id | `internal_id` | text | no |
| driver.fields.driver-license | `drivers_license_number` | text | per policy |
| driver.fields.vendor | `vendor` | ModelSelect | no |
| resource.vehicle | `vehicle` | ModelSelect | no |
| common.city | `city` | text | no |
| common.country | `country` | country select | no |
| common.status | `status` | select | yes |
| common.coordinates | `location` | map picker | no |
| Driver Skills | skills | multi | no |
| Max Distance | `max_distance` | number (metres) | no |
| Max travel time | `max_travel_time` | duration | no |
| Avatar | `photo` / `avatar_value` | AvatarPicker | no |

**Layout:** Collapsible content panels; extension slot on form registry `fleet-ops:component:driver:form`.

**API:** `POST drivers` (create) | `PATCH drivers/:id` (edit)

---

#### 6. Data model (driver)

| Field | Type | UI use |
|-------|------|--------|
| public_id | string | ID column, header |
| name, email, phone | string | list, form |
| internal_id | string | list, form |
| drivers_license_number | string | list, form |
| status, online | string/boolean | badge, presence |
| vehicle_uuid, vendor_uuid | FK | selects |
| location, heading | point/number | positions tab |
| city, country | string | form, overview |
| meta | raw | overview |
| max_travel_time, max_distance | limits | form, overview |

---

#### 7. Modals catalog

| Modal | Trigger | Type |
|-------|---------|------|
| confirm delete | delete / bulkDelete | confirm |
| `modals/driver-assign-order` | assignOrder | show |
| `modals/driver-assign-vehicle` | assignVehicle | show |
| `common.continue-without-saving` | dirty navigation | confirm |
| panel.create / panel.edit | quick create from map | side panel |

---

#### 8. Test cases

| TC ID | Requirement | Steps | Expected |
|-------|-------------|-------|------------|
| TC-DRV-001 | FO-DRV-LIST | Open list | 12 columns; pagination |
| TC-DRV-002 | FO-DRV-LIST | Filter by status | URL + rows update |
| TC-DRV-003 | FO-DRV-LIST | Bulk delete 2 rows | Confirm ŌåÆ toast ŌåÆ cleared selection |
| TC-DRV-004 | FO-DRV-LIST | Assign vehicle modal | Vehicle saved on driver |
| TC-DRV-005 | REQ-FO-DRV-DETAIL | No permission | Redirect + warning |
| TC-DRV-006 | REQ-FO-DRV-DETAIL | Invalid id | Redirect list |
| TC-DRV-007 | FO-DRV-POS | Positions tab | Map replay renders |
| TC-DRV-008 | FO-DRV-SCH | Schedule tab | Calendar renders |
| TC-DRV-009 | LLR-DRV-FORM | Create valid | POST ŌåÆ detail |
| TC-DRV-010 | LLR-DRV-FORM | Missing name | Validation error |
| TC-DRV-011 | LLR-DRV-DETAIL | Edit from header | Edit route loads |
| TC-DRV-012 | Extension tab | Registry tab | Renders if permitted |

---

### Feature spec: FLEETOPS-VEHICLES

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **MASTER** | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 
---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| S1 | Vehicles list | `/fleet-ops/management/vehicles` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Vehicle detail | `/fleet-ops/management/vehicles/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | Overview | detail default | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | Positions | detail / positions | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S5 | Devices | detail / devices | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S6 | Schedules | detail / schedules | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S7 | Work orders | detail / work-orders | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S8 | Maintenance | detail / maintenance-history | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S9 | Equipment | detail / equipment | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S10 | Create / edit | `new`, `edit` | (screen spec in this volume), (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-VEH-1 ŌĆö Fleet manager: register vehicle

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | New vehicle | `Vehicle::Form` |
| 2 | Enter VIN, make, model, year, plate | Validation |
| 3 | Save | POST ŌåÆ detail |

##### J-VEH-2 ŌĆö Maintenance: log service from detail

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open vehicle | Load driver via `afterModel: loadDriver()` |
| 2 | Action ŌĆ£Log maintenanceŌĆØ | `vehicleActions.logMaintenance` |
| 3 | Submit | Entry in Maintenance tab history |

##### J-VEH-3 ŌĆö Dispatcher: locate on map

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | List or detail ŌåÆ Locate | `vehicleActions.locate` |
| 2 | Map focuses vehicle | Uses `location`, `heading` |

##### J-VEH-4 ŌĆö Telematics: manage devices

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Devices tab | `Device::Manager` |
| 2 | Pair / unlink device | Per device API |

---

#### 3. Vehicles list (LLR-VEH-LIST)

**REQ-FO-VEH-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops list vehicle`

##### 3.1 Layout modes

| Mode | Query | UI |
|------|-------|-----|
| Table | `layout=table` (default) | Tabular + filters |
| Grid | optional grid toggle | Card grid per `appCache` (if enabled in controller) |

##### 3.2 Table columns (12)

| # | i18n | valuePath | Notes |
|---|------|-----------|-------|
| 1 | column.name | `displayName` | Primary link |
| 2 | column.plate-number | `plate_number` | |
| 3 | column.internal-id | `internal_id` | |
| 4 | column.driver-assigned | `driver_name` | ŌĆ£ŌĆöŌĆØ if empty |
| 5 | column.id | `public_id` | |
| 6 | column.make | `make` | |
| 7 | column.model | `model` | |
| 8 | column.year | `year` | |
| 9 | column.vendor | `vendor_name` | |
| 10 | column.status | `status` | badge |
| 11 | column.created-at | `createdAt` | |
| 12 | column.updated-at | `updatedAt` | |

##### 3.3 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `status`, `name`, `plate_number`, `year`, `vehicle_make`, `vehicle_model`, `display_name`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `created_by`, `updated_by`

##### 3.4 Actions

| Label | Handler |
|-------|---------|
| common.new | `vehicleActions.transition` |
| common.import | `vehicleActions.import` |
| common.export | `vehicleActions.export` |
| Bulk delete | `vehicleActions.bulkDelete` |

**UX:** Optional table/grid toggle persists in `appCache`; grid cards show photo, plate, driver.

---

#### 4. Vehicle detail (LLR-VEH-DETAIL)

**REQ-FO-VEH-DETAIL-001** URL: `/fleet-ops/management/vehicles/:public_id`  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops view vehicle`

##### 4.1 Route lifecycle

| Hook | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `beforeModel` | Permission gate |
| `model` | `findRecord('vehicle')` |
| `afterModel` | `model.loadDriver()` |
| `error` | not found ŌåÆ redirect list |

##### 4.2 Tabs

| Tab | Component | Content |
|-----|-----------|---------|
| Overview | `Vehicle::Details` | Specs panels (see ┬¦4.3) |
| Positions | `PositionsReplay` | GPS history |
| Devices | `Device::Manager` | Telematics devices |
| Schedules | `Vehicle::Details::Schedules` | Maintenance schedules |
| Work Orders | `Vehicle::Details::WorkOrders` | Linked WOs table |
| Maintenance | `Vehicle::Details::MaintenanceHistory` | Service log |
| Equipment | nested outlet | Attached equipment |
| Extension | registry | `fleet-ops:component:vehicle:details` |

##### 4.3 Overview ŌĆö specification fields (grouped)

| Group | Fields |
|-------|--------|
| Identity | Trim, Color, Serial Number, Class, Call Sign |
| Measurement | System of Measurement, Fuel Volume Unit, Odometer Unit, Odometer at Purchase |
| Body | Body Type, Body Subtype, Usage Type, Ownership Type |
| Engine | Engine Number/Make/Model/Family/Configuration, Cylinder Arrangement, Number of Cylinders, Size, Displacement, Horsepower (+ RPM), Torque (+ RPM) |
| Capacity | Fuel Capacity, Payload/Towing/Seating Capacity, Weight, L├ŚW├ŚH, Cargo/Payload/Passenger/Interior Volume, Ground Clearance, Bed Length |
| Compliance | Emission Standard, DPF/SCR Equipped, GVWR, GCWR |
| Financial | Acquisition Cost |

**UX:** Collapse groups by default except ŌĆ£IdentityŌĆØ; search within long spec list on mobile.

##### 4.4 Header actions

| Action (i18n) | Handler | Permission |
|---------------|---------|------------|
| Edit | ŌåÆ edit route | update vehicle |
| Locate vehicle | `locate` | view vehicle |
| Schedule maintenance | `scheduleMaintenance` | maintenance perms |
| Create work order | `createWorkOrder` | work-order create |
| Log maintenance | `logMaintenance` | maintenance log |
| Delete | `delete` | delete vehicle |

---

#### 5. Create / edit ŌĆö Vehicle::Form (LLR-VEH-FORM)

**Permission:** `fleet-ops create vehicle` | `fleet-ops update vehicle`

| Field (i18n) | Binding | Control |
|--------------|---------|---------|
| common.name | `name` | text |
| common.internal-id | `internal_id` | text |
| vehicle.fields.plate-number | `plate_number` | text |
| vehicle.fields.vin-number | `vin` | text |
| vehicle.fields.make | `make` | text/select |
| vehicle.fields.model | `model` | text/select |
| vehicle.fields.year | `year` | number |
| vehicle.fields.driver-assigned | driver | ModelSelect |
| common.status | `status` | select |
| common.coordinates | `location` | map picker |
| Odometer / engine / capacity fields | per model | collapsible sections |

**Registry:** `fleet-ops:component:vehicle:form`

---

#### 6. Modals & APIs

| Modal / action | Type |
|----------------|------|
| delete / bulkDelete | confirm |
| scheduleMaintenance | show / flow |
| createWorkOrder | navigate or modal |
| logMaintenance | form modal |
| continue-without-saving | confirm |

| Operation | API pattern |
|-----------|-------------|
| List | GET vehicles |
| Detail | GET vehicles/:id |
| Create | POST vehicles |
| Update | PATCH vehicles/:id |
| Delete | DELETE vehicles/:id |

---

#### 7. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-VEH-001 | List 12 columns load |
| TC-VEH-002 | Grid/table toggle persists |
| TC-VEH-003 | Create vehicle ŌåÆ detail |
| TC-VEH-004 | Detail loads driver after model |
| TC-VEH-005 | Devices tab shows Device::Manager |
| TC-VEH-006 | Locate focuses map |
| TC-VEH-007 | Log maintenance adds history row |
| TC-VEH-008 | Create work order from header |
| TC-VEH-009 | Bulk delete with confirm |
| TC-VEH-010 | No permission ŌåÆ redirect |
| TC-VEH-011 | Positions replay tab |
| TC-VEH-012 | Extension tab from registry |

---

### Feature spec: FLEETOPS-PLACES

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **MASTER** | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 
---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-PL-1 ŌĆö Ops: add pickup location

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | New place | `Place::Form` |
| 2 | Address autocomplete or map pin | geocode ŌåÆ coordinates |
| 3 | Save | POST ŌåÆ detail with Map tab |

##### J-PL-2 ŌĆö Dispatcher: verify place on map

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open place detail | Header = name or street1 |
| 2 | Map tab | Full-width marker + geofence if rules exist |
| 3 | Copy coordinates | One-click copy |

##### J-PL-3 ŌĆö Manager: configure place rules

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Rules tab | Operating hours, constraints |
| 2 | Save | PATCH place rules payload |

##### J-PL-4 ŌĆö Analyst: review performance

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Performance tab | KPI charts (dwell time, volume) |
| 2 | Date range filter | Query params on tab |

#### 3. Places list (LLR-PL-LIST)

**REQ-FO-PL-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops list place`

##### 3.1 Table columns (11)

| # | i18n | valuePath |
|---|------|-----------|

| Label | Handler |
|-------|---------|

### Feature spec: FLEETOPS-FLEETS

| Property | Value |

| | **MASTER** | (screen spec in this volume) |
| 
---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| S1 | Fleets list | `/fleet-ops/management/fleets` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Fleet detail | `/fleet-ops/management/fleets/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | Overview | detail / index | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | Vehicles tab | detail / vehicles | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S5 | Drivers tab | detail / drivers | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S6 | Create / edit | new, edit | (screen spec in this volume), (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-FLT-1 ŌĆö Ops manager: create sub-fleet

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | New fleet | `Fleet::Form` |
| 2 | Set parent fleet, service area, zone | Validates relationships |
| 3 | Save | POST ŌåÆ detail with empty drivers/vehicles tabs |

##### J-FLT-2 ŌĆö Dispatcher: assign drivers to fleet

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open fleet detail ŌåÆ Drivers tab | `Fleet::DriverListing` |
| 2 | Add drivers | `fleet-ops assign-driver-for fleet` |
| 3 | Save | `drivers_count` / `drivers_online_count` update |

##### J-FLT-3 ŌĆö Fleet health check

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | List view | Compare manpower vs active-manpower columns |
| 2 | Filter low online ratio | Custom filter or sort |
| 3 | Drill into fleet | Vehicles tab for asset list |

---

#### 3. Fleets list (LLR-FLT-LIST)

**REQ-FO-FLT-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops list fleet`

##### 3.1 Table columns (11)

| # | i18n | valuePath | UX |
|---|------|-----------|-----|
| 1 | column.name | `name` | Primary link |
| 2 | column.service-area | `service_area.name` | |
| 3 | column.parent-fleet | `parent_fleet.name` | breadcrumb hint for hierarchy |
| 4 | column.vendor | `vendor.name` | |
| 5 | column.zone | `zone.name` | |
| 6 | column.id | `public_id` | |
| 7 | column.manpower | `drivers_count` | total drivers |
| 8 | column.active-manpower | `drivers_online_count` | green if > 0 |
| 9 | column.task | `task` | mission label |
| 10 | column.status | `status` | badge |
| 11 | column.created-at / updated-at | `createdAt`, `updatedAt` | |

##### 3.2 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `zone`, `service_area`, `parent_fleet`, `vendor`, `status`, `task`, `name`, `created_by`, `updated_by`

##### 3.3 Actions

| Label | Handler |
|-------|---------|
| common.refresh | `fleetActions.refresh` |
| common.new | `fleetActions.transition` |
| common.import | `fleetActions.import` |
| common.export | `fleetActions.export` |

**UX:** Show `drivers_online_count / drivers_count` as mini progress in manpower column optional enhancement.

---

#### 4. Fleet detail (LLR-FLT-DETAIL)

**REQ-FO-FLT-DETAIL-001**  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops view fleet`

##### 4.1 Route lifecycle

| Hook | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `beforeModel` | Permission gate |
| `model` | `queryRecord('fleet', { with: [parent_fleet, service_area, zone] })` |
| `error` | Redirect list |

##### 4.2 Layout

Panel + tabs (sidebar visible). Header: fleet name + color swatch if `color` set.

##### 4.3 Tabs

| Tab | Component | Content |
|-----|-----------|---------|
| Overview | `Fleet::Details` | name, task, active manpower, date created |
| Vehicles | `Fleet::VehicleListing` | Assign/remove vehicles table |
| Drivers | `Fleet::DriverListing` | Assign/remove drivers table |
| Extension | registry | `fleet-ops:component:fleet:details` |

##### 4.4 Overview fields

| Field (i18n) | Model |
|--------------|-------|
| common.name | `name` |
| fleet.fields.task | `task` |
| fleet.fields.active-manpower | `drivers_online_count` / `drivers_count` |
| common.date-created | `created_at` |
| Service area | `service_area` |
| Zone | `zone` |
| Parent fleet | `parent_fleet` |
| Vendor | `vendor` |
| Status | `status` |

##### 4.5 Drivers / Vehicles tab UX (FO-FLT-ASSIGN-001)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-FLT-ASSIGN-001 | Inline table with add/remove actions |
| FO-FLT-ASSIGN-002 | Add opens ModelSelect modal (drivers or vehicles) |
| FO-FLT-ASSIGN-003 | Remove requires confirm if driver has active orders |
| FO-FLT-ASSIGN-004 | Row link navigates to driver/vehicle detail |

##### 4.5 Header actions

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| Edit | ŌåÆ edit route |
| Delete | `fleet.delete` confirm |

---

#### 5. Create / edit ŌĆö Fleet::Form (LLR-FLT-FORM)

**Permission:** `fleet-ops create fleet` | `fleet-ops update fleet`

| Field (i18n) | Binding | Control |
|--------------|---------|---------|
| fleet.fields.fleet-name | `name` | text |
| fleet.fields.parent-fleet | `parent_fleet` | ModelSelect (self-exclude on edit) |
| resource.vendor | `vendor` | ModelSelect |
| fleet.fields.service-title | `service_area` | ModelSelect |
| fleet.fields.zone-title | `zone` | ModelSelect |
| common.status | `status` | select |
| fleet.fields.task-mission-title | `task` | text |

**Registry:** `fleet-ops:component:fleet:form`

**Validation:** Prevent circular parent_fleet reference.

---

#### 6. Data model (fleet)

| Field | UI use |
|-------|--------|
| name, status, task, color | list, form |
| drivers_count, drivers_online_count | list, overview |
| vehicles_count, vehicles_online_count | overview (if exposed) |
| parent_fleet_uuid, service_area_uuid, zone_uuid, vendor_uuid | form selects |
| slug, public_id | URLs |

**Relations:** hasMany drivers, vehicles via fleet-driver / fleet-vehicle join tables.

---

#### 7. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-FLT-001 | List 11 columns |
| TC-FLT-002 | Create sub-fleet with parent |
| TC-FLT-003 | Detail loads with includes |
| TC-FLT-004 | Add driver on Drivers tab |
| TC-FLT-005 | Add vehicle on Vehicles tab |
| TC-FLT-006 | Delete fleet confirm |
| TC-FLT-007 | No permission redirect |
| TC-FLT-008 | Export fleets |
| TC-FLT-009 | Manpower columns show counts |
| TC-FLT-010 | Extension tab renders |

| Step | Action | System |

| 1 | Telematics ŌåÆ New | `telematicActions.transition` ŌåÆ new form |

| Step | Action | System |

| 2 | Link to telematic + vehicle | Associations |

| Step | Action | System |

#### A3. Devices list (LLR-FO-DEV-LIST)

**REQ-FO-CONN-DEV-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops list device`  
**Service:** `deviceActions`

##### A3.1 Query params

`name`, `page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

##### A3.2 Table columns (typical)

| # | Column | Notes |
|---|--------|-------|
| 1 | Device name | link to detail |
| 2 | Telematic | provider integration |
| 3 | Type | device-type enum |
| 4 | Serial number | |
| 5 | Status | online/offline badge |
| 6 | Last seen | relative time |
| 7 | Vehicle link | if assigned |

##### A3.3 Bulk actions

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| Delete selected | `deviceActions.bulkDelete` + confirm |

##### A3.4 Header actions

Refresh, New, Import, Export ŌĆö via `deviceActions.*`

#### A4. Device detail (LLR-FO-DEV-DETAIL)

| Tab | Route | Content |
|-----|-------|---------|
| Overview | `details.index` | `Device::Details` ŌĆö metadata |
| Events | `details.events` | Event log table |
| Virtual | registry | Extension components |

##### A4.2 Overview fields

Internal ID, telematic, data frequency, device name/type/id, provider, model, manufacturer, serial number, location, installation date, last maintenance date, online/offline, last seen, signal strength, status, warranty, notes.

| Action | Permission | Handler |
|--------|------------|---------|
| Edit | update device | `hostRouter.transitionTo` edit route |
| Delete | delete device | confirm modal ŌåÆ `deviceActions.delete` |

#### B6. Maintenances (service records) (LLR-FO-MNT-REC)

**REQ-FO-MNT-REC-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `fleet-ops view maintenance` (list may use `list maintenance`)

##### B6.1 Detail fields (from MASTER)

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| ID, Type, Status, Priority | |
| Maintainable Asset | polymorphic ŌĆö vehicle, equipment |
| Performed By | user/vendor |
| Linked Work Order | optional link |
| Scheduled / Started / Completed At | |
| Overdue, Days Until Due | computed |
| Odometer, Engine Hours, Duration | |

##### B6.2 CRUD

Create/Edit via `Maintenance::Form` components (`fleet-ops:component:maintenance:form` registry).  
Delete ŌåÆ confirm modal per `maintenance-actions.delete`.

---

#### B7. Equipment & parts

**REQ-FO-MNT-EQP-001** ŌĆö Equipment list/detail; link to schedules and work orders.  
**REQ-FO-MNT-PART-001** ŌĆö Parts catalog with qty, SKU, supplier, reorder level.

| Resource | Permission (view) |
|----------|-------------------|
| equipment | `fleet-ops view equipment` |
| part | `fleet-ops view part` |

---

#### B8. Integration with Vehicles

Vehicle detail includes tabs (see this document):

| Tab | Links to |
|-----|----------|
| Devices | Connectivity devices |
| Work orders | Maintenance WOs for vehicle |
| Maintenance history | Completed maintenances |
| Equipment | Attached equipment records |

**REQ:** Cross-links preserve `public_id` context; back navigation returns to vehicle detail.

---

#### B9. Modal & action contract (both modules)

Per platform patterns:

1. User confirms destructive action  
2. `modal.startLoading()`  
3. API call via `*Actions` service  
4. Success ŌåÆ toast + `modal.done()` + `router.refresh()` or transition  
5. Failure ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` + `modal.stopLoading()`

Unsaved form navigation ŌåÆ `confirmContinueWithUnsavedChanges`.

---

#### B10. Permissions summary

##### Connectivity

| Action | Slug |
|--------|------|
| List/view device | `fleet-ops list device`, `fleet-ops view device` |
| CRUD device | create/update/delete device |

| Sensors / events | list/view per resource |

|--------|------|

| Schedules | list/view/create/update/delete maintenance-schedule |
| Maintenances | view/create/update/delete maintenance |
