### Feature spec: IAM

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 53ŌĆō54 |
| **Mount** | `/iam` |

---

#### 1. Scope

| Area | URL | Spec |
|------|-----|------|
| Home | `/iam/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Users (tabbed) | `/iam/users` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Users list | `/iam/users/index` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Drivers view | `/iam/users/drivers` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Customers view | `/iam/users/customers` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Groups | `/iam/groups` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Roles | `/iam/roles` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Policies | `/iam/policies` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. Global IAM UX

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| IAM-UX-001 | All IAM pages use engine sidebar under `/iam` |
| IAM-UX-002 | Tables: `FiltersPicker` + `VisibleColumnPicker` + bulk toolbar when rows selected |
| IAM-UX-003 | Permission matrix UI: searchable tree, expand all/collapse |
| IAM-UX-004 | Never show action user cannot perform ŌĆö hide vs disable |
| IAM-UX-005 | Destructive: delete/deactivate require confirm with resource name |
| IAM-UX-006 | Export shows progress for large datasets |

---

#### 3. Users module (LLR-IAM-USERS)

**REQ-IAM-USERS-001**  
**Permission:** `iam list user`

##### 3.1 Tab navigation (parent )

| Tab | Route | Audience filter |
|-----|-------|-------------------|
| Users | `users.index` | type = admin/operator |
| Drivers | `users.drivers` | linked drivers |
| Customers | `users.customers` | storefront customers |

**Component:** `TabNavigation` + `Layout::Resource::Tabular` outlet per tab.

##### 3.2 Users table (standard columns ŌĆö implement per API)

| Column | Path | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| Name | `name` | avatar + name |
| Email | `email` | |
| Phone | `phone` | |
| Role | `role.name` or roles[] | chips |
| Status | `status` | active/inactive/pending |
| Verified | `email_verified_at` | icon |
| Last login | `last_login_at` | relative |
| Created | `createdAt` | |

##### 3.3 Row actions

| Action | Permission | Behavior |
|--------|------------|----------|
| Edit | `iam update user` | modal or panel form |
| Deactivate | `iam deactivate user` | confirm |
| Activate | `iam activate user` | confirm |
| Verify | `iam verify user` | admin verify email |
| Delete | `iam delete user` | confirm destructive |
| Resend invite | create user flow | if pending |

##### 3.4 Header / bulk actions

| Action | Permission |
|--------|------------|
| New user | `iam create user` |
| Export | `iam export user` |
| Bulk delete | `iam delete user` (if supported) |

##### 3.5 User form (create/edit modal)

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| name | yes |
| email | yes |
| phone | no |
| role(s) | yes |
| password | create only / optional invite flow |
| status | yes |

**UX:** Invite flow sends email instead of setting password inline.

##### 3.6 Journeys

**J-IAM-U1:** Admin invites user ŌåÆ pending status ŌåÆ user accepts invite.  
**J-IAM-U2:** Deactivate compromised account ŌåÆ cannot login.  
**J-IAM-U3:** Switch to Drivers tab ŌåÆ filter fleet drivers only.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-IAM-U-001 | Three tabs navigate |
| TC-IAM-U-002 | Create user invite |
| TC-IAM-U-003 | Deactivate user |
| TC-IAM-U-004 | Export users |
| TC-IAM-U-005 | Drivers tab filtered |

---

#### 4. Roles module (LLR-IAM-ROLES)

**REQ-IAM-ROLES-001**  
**Permission:** `iam list role`

##### 4.1 Layout

`Layout::Section::Header` + filters + `Table` + pagination

##### 4.2 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `service`, `type`

##### 4.3 Table columns

| Column | Path | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| Name | `name` | link to permissions view |
| Service | `service` | fleet-ops, storefront, iam, ŌĆ” |
| Type | `type` | admin, custom, system |
| Description | `description` | truncated |
| Users count | `users_count` | optional |
| Created | `createdAt` | |

##### 4.4 Actions

| Action | Handler | Permission |
|--------|---------|------------|
| New | `createRole` | `iam create role` |
| Edit | `editRole` | `iam update role` |
| View permissions | `viewRolePermissions` | `iam view role` |
| Delete | `deleteRole` | `iam delete role` |
| Bulk delete | `bulkDeleteRoles` | delete |
| Export | `exportRoles` | export |
| Reload | `reload` | list |

**Template conditional:** bulk toolbar when `table.selectedRows` present.

##### 4.5 Permissions matrix UI (FO-IAM-RBAC-001)

Opened from `viewRolePermissions` / `editRole`:

| Element | Requirement |
|---------|-------------|
| Tree | Service ŌåÆ resource ŌåÆ actions (view, create, update, delete, ŌĆ”) |
| Search | Filter nodes by label |
| Toggles | Check/uncheck permission; indeterminate for partial |
| Save | PATCH role permissions; toast |
| Preview | ŌĆ£Effective permissionsŌĆØ read-only summary |

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-IAM-RBAC-001 | Matrix loads <2s for 500 nodes; virtualize if needed |
| FO-IAM-RBAC-002 | System roles: warn before edit |
| FO-IAM-RBAC-003 | Unsaved changes guard |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-IAM-R-001 | Role list loads |
| TC-IAM-R-002 | Create role |
| TC-IAM-R-003 | Permissions matrix save |
| TC-IAM-R-004 | Bulk delete roles |
| TC-IAM-R-005 | Filter by service |

---

#### 5. Groups module (LLR-IAM-GROUPS)

**REQ-IAM-GROUPS-001**  
**Permission:** `iam list group`

##### 5.1 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `type`, `created_by`, `updated_by`, `status`

##### 5.2 Table columns

| Column | Path |
|--------|------|
| Name | `name` |
| Type | `type` |
| Members | `users_count` |
| Description | `description` |
| Status | `status` |
| Created | `createdAt` |

##### 5.3 Actions

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| New | `createGroup` |
| Edit | `editGroup` |
| Delete | `deleteGroup` |
| Bulk delete | `bulkDeleteGroups` |
| Export | `exportGroups` |

##### 5.4 Group form

| Field | Control |
|-------|---------|
| name | text |
| description | textarea |
| type | select |
| members | multi-select users |
| policies / roles | attach RBAC (per API) |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-IAM-G-001 | List + create group |
| TC-IAM-G-002 | Add members |
| TC-IAM-G-003 | Bulk delete |

---

#### 6. Policies module (LLR-IAM-POLICIES)

**REQ-IAM-POLICIES-001**  
**Permission:** `iam list policy`

##### 6.1 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `type`, `service`, `status`, `created_by`, `updated_by`

##### 6.2 Table columns

| Column | Path |
|--------|------|
| Name | `name` |
| Service | `service` |
| Type | `type` |
| Description | `description` |
| Status | `status` |
| Created | `createdAt` |

##### 6.3 Actions

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| New | `createPolicy` |
| Edit | `editPolicy` |
| View permissions | `viewPolicyPermissions` |
| Delete | `deletePolicy` |
| Bulk delete | `bulkDeletePolicies` |
| Export | `exportPolicies` |
| Reload | `reload` |

##### 6.4 Policy vs role

| Concept | Use |
|---------|-----|
| Role | Bundle of permissions assigned to users |
| Policy | Reusable permission set attached to groups or roles |
| Matrix UI | Same component as roles (`viewPolicyPermissions`) |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-IAM-P-001 | Policy list |
| TC-IAM-P-002 | View policy permissions matrix |
| TC-IAM-P-003 | Export policies |

---

#### 7. RBAC evaluation (REQ-IAM-RBAC)

| REQ | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| REQ-IAM-RBAC-001 | UI gates use `abilities.can('iam <verb> <resource>')` pattern |
| REQ-IAM-RBAC-002 | User effective permissions = roles + groups + policies |
| REQ-IAM-RBAC-003 | Changes to role permissions affect users on next session refresh |
| REQ-IAM-RBAC-004 | Document matrix in org runbook; test with non-admin QA account |

---

#### 8. Security requirements

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| IAM-SEC-001 | Only `iam *` admins access `/iam` routes |
| IAM-SEC-002 | Password fields never logged or shown in toasts |
| IAM-SEC-003 | Export files expire / contain PII warning |
| IAM-SEC-004 | Cannot delete last admin role/user (API + UI) |
| IAM-SEC-005 | Impersonation not available from IAM (console admin only) |

---

#### 9. Test summary

| Module | Test IDs |
|--------|----------|
| Users | TC-IAM-U-001 ŌĆ” 005 |
| Roles | TC-IAM-R-001 ŌĆ” 005 |
| Groups | TC-IAM-G-001 ŌĆ” 003 |
| Policies | TC-IAM-P-001 ŌĆ” 003 |
| RBAC matrix | FO-IAM-RBAC-001 ŌĆ” 003 |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-IAM-*` / `TC-IAM-*`*


### Feature spec: DEVELOPERS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 55ŌĆō56 |
| **Mount** | `/developers` |
| **Focus** | API Keys (primary) + Webhooks, Sockets, Events, Logs |

---

#### 1. Scope

| Area | URL | Spec |
|------|-----|------|
| Home | `/developers/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| **API Keys** | `/developers/api-keys` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Webhooks | `/developers/webhooks` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Webhook detail | `/developers/webhooks/:id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Sockets | `/developers/sockets` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Events | `/developers/events` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| Logs | `/developers/logs` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. Global Developers UX

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| DEV-UX-001 | Engine sidebar: Home, API Keys, Webhooks, Sockets, Events, Logs |
| DEV-UX-002 | Secrets shown **once** at creation/roll ŌĆö copy button + ŌĆ£stored securelyŌĆØ message |
| DEV-UX-003 | Test mode toggle clearly labeled (banner when active) |
| DEV-UX-004 | Link from API key row ŌåÆ filtered request logs |
| DEV-UX-005 | Never log full secret in browser console or toasts |

---

#### 3. API Keys (LLR-DEV-APIKEY) ŌĆö PRIMARY

**REQ-DEV-APIKEY-001** URL: `/developers/api-keys`  
**Permission:** `developers list api-key`  
**Model:** `api-credential`

##### 3.1 Layout

| Element | Component |
|---------|-----------|
| Header | title + **Test mode** `Toggle` + New + Export |
| Body | `Table` with filters |
| Bulk bar | when rows selected |

##### 3.2 Table columns

| Column | Path | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| Name | `name` | user-defined label |
| Key ID / prefix | `key` / `public_id` | masked secret `sk_ŌĆ”****` |
| Environment | test vs live | from `isTestMode` / key flag |
| Last used | `last_used_at` | relative |
| Created | `createdAt` | |
| Status | `status` | active / revoked |

##### 3.3 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`

##### 3.4 Actions

| Action | Handler | Permission | UX |
|--------|---------|------------|-----|
| Toggle test mode | `toggleTestMode` | list | Banner: ŌĆ£Test mode activeŌĆØ |
| Toggle test key | `toggleTestKey` | ŌĆö | per-row test flag |
| New | `createApiKey` | create | modal ŌåÆ show secret once |
| Edit | `editApiKey` | update | name, scopes, expiry |
| Rename | `renameApiKey` | update | quick rename |
| Roll / rotate | `rollApiKey` | `developers roll api-key` | confirm; old key invalidated |
| Delete | `deleteApiKey` | `developers delete api-key` | confirm |
| Bulk delete | `bulkDeleteApiCredentials` | delete | count in confirm |
| View logs | `viewRequestLogs` | `developers view log` | ŌåÆ logs filtered by credential |
| Export | `exportApiKeys` | export | |
| Reload | `reload` | ŌĆö | |

##### 3.5 Create API key modal (FO-DEV-SECRET-001)

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| name | yes |
| scopes / permissions | per API design |
| expiry | optional |
| test vs production | toggle |

**On success:**

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-DEV-SECRET-001 | Full secret in monospace box; copy button; ŌĆ£wonŌĆÖt be shown againŌĆØ |
| FO-DEV-SECRET-002 | User must acknowledge before close |
| FO-DEV-SECRET-003 | Optional QR or curl example snippet |

##### 3.6 Roll key flow

1. Confirm: ŌĆ£Existing integrations will break until updatedŌĆØ
2. `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API
3. Show new secret once (same as create)
4. Toast success

##### 3.7 Journeys

**J-DEV-1:** Developer creates production key ŌåÆ copies to `.env` ŌåÆ tests with curl.  
**J-DEV-2:** Key leaked ŌåÆ roll key ŌåÆ update deployments.  
**J-DEV-3:** Debug failing calls ŌåÆ view request logs for key.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-DEV-001 | List loads |
| TC-DEV-002 | Test mode toggle |
| TC-DEV-003 | Create shows secret once |
| TC-DEV-004 | Copy secret works |
| TC-DEV-005 | Roll key invalidates old |
| TC-DEV-006 | Delete confirm |
| TC-DEV-007 | View logs navigates with filter |
| TC-DEV-008 | Bulk delete |
| TC-DEV-009 | Export keys |
| TC-DEV-010 | No permission redirect |

---

#### 4. Webhooks (LLR-DEV-WEBHOOK)

**REQ-DEV-WEBHOOK-001** `/developers/webhooks`  
**Permission:** `developers list webhook`

##### 4.1 Table columns

| Column | Path |
|--------|------|
| URL | `url` |
| Events | subscribed events |
| Status | active / disabled |
| Created | `createdAt` |

##### 4.2 Actions

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| New | `createWebhook` |
| View | `viewWebhook` ŌåÆ detail with delivery log |
| Delete | `deleteWebhook` |
| Reload | `reload` |

**Detail view:** delivery attempts, response codes, retry, secret for signature verification.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-DEV-W-001 | Create webhook |
| TC-DEV-W-002 | View delivery history |

---

#### 5. Sockets (LLR-DEV-SOCKET)

**REQ-DEV-SOCKET-001** `/developers/sockets`

| Column | Path |
|--------|------|
| Channel name | `name` |
| Subscribers | count |
| Status | |

**View route:** channel details, subscribe/unsubscribe test client.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-DEV-S-001 | List channels |
| TC-DEV-S-002 | View channel detail |

---

#### 6. Events (LLR-DEV-EVENT)

**REQ-DEV-EVENT-001** `/developers/events`

Catalog of platform events available for webhooks/API subscriptions.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-DEV-E-001 | Event catalog loads |
| TC-DEV-E-002 | Event detail shows payload schema |

---

#### 7. Request logs (LLR-DEV-LOG)

**REQ-DEV-LOG-001** `/developers/logs`

| Column | Path |
|--------|------|
| Time | `created_at` |
| Method | `method` |
| Path | `path` |
| Status | `status_code` |
| API key | credential name |

**View:** request/response headers (redact auth), body preview.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-DEV-L-001 | Logs list paginates |
| TC-DEV-L-002 | Filter by API key from key row action |

---

#### 8. Security requirements

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| DEV-SEC-001 | Secrets never in URL query params |
| DEV-SEC-002 | Roll/delete require confirm + permission |
| DEV-SEC-003 | Logs redact `Authorization` header |
| DEV-SEC-004 | Test keys cannot access production data (API enforced; UI labels clearly) |

### Feature spec: REGISTRY

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 57ŌĆō58 |
| **Mount** | `/extensions` |
| **Screens** | 21 files under screen specifications in this volume |

---

#### 1. Scope & navigation

##### 1.1 Engine sidebar (typical)

| Section | Route | Audience |
|---------|-------|----------|
| Explore | `/extensions/` or `/extensions/explore` | All users ŌĆö marketplace |
| Installed | `/extensions/installed` | Org admin ŌĆö manage installs |
| Purchased | `/extensions/purchased` | Billing history |
| Developers | `/extensions/developers/*` | Publishers ŌĆö publish extensions |

##### 1.2 Route tree (from Doc 57)

```
/extensions
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ explore/              # marketplace (default)
Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ index
Ōöé   ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ category/:slug
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ installed
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ purchased
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ developers/
    Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ extensions/       # publisher's extensions
    Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ index
    Ōöé   Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ new
    Ōöé   ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ edit/:id/     # details, bundles, monetize
    Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ analytics
    Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ payments/         # onboard, settings
    ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ credentials
```

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-REG-1 ŌĆö Admin: install FleetOps add-on

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Explore marketplace | `ExtensionCard` grid |
| 2 | Open extension detail | permissions list |
| 3 | Install | API install ŌåÆ appears in Installed |
| 4 | Reload console | New menu items from extension |

##### J-REG-2 ŌĆö Admin: uninstall extension

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Installed list | per extension row |
| 2 | About | `about` modal ŌĆö version, author |
| 3 | Uninstall | confirm ŌåÆ `uninstall` ŌåÆ rebuild may be required |

##### J-REG-3 ŌĆö Publisher: submit new extension

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Developers ŌåÆ New extension | wizard |
| 2 | Details + bundles + monetize tabs | multi-step edit |
| 3 | Submit for review | status pending |

---

#### 3. Explore marketplace (LLR-REG-EXPLORE)

**REQ-REG-EXPLORE-001**  
**URLs:** `/extensions/explore`, `/extensions/explore/category/:slug`  
**Permission:** `registry-bridge list extension`

##### 3.1 Layout

| Element | Component |
|---------|-----------|
| Header | search + category filter |
| Body | `Layout::Resource::CardsGrid` of `ExtensionCard` |

##### 3.2 ExtensionCard

| Element | Data |
|---------|------|
| Icon | extension icon |
| Name | `name` |
| Author | publisher |
| Rating / installs | if API provides |
| Price | free / paid badge |
| CTA | Install / Buy / Installed |

##### 3.3 Search

**Query param:** `query` ŌĆö debounced search across name/description.

##### 3.4 Category browse

**Route:** `/extensions/explore/category/:slug`  
**API:** `store.queryRecord('category')` + `store.query('registry-extension')` filtered

**UX (FO-REG-CARD-001):**

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-REG-CARD-001 | Responsive grid: 1 col mobile, 2 tablet, 3+ desktop |
| FO-REG-CARD-002 | Skeleton cards while loading |
| FO-REG-CARD-003 | Empty search: ŌĆ£No extensions foundŌĆØ + clear search |
| FO-REG-CARD-004 | Paid extensions show price before install |

##### 3.5 Install flow (FO-REG-INSTALL-001)

| Step | UI |
|------|-----|
| 1 | Click Install on card | Permissions modal ŌĆö list scopes requested |
| 2 | User confirms | Progress indicator |
| 3 | Success | Toast + card shows ŌĆ£InstalledŌĆØ |
| 4 | Failure | Error message; retry |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-REG-001 | Explore grid loads |
| TC-REG-002 | Search filters cards |
| TC-REG-003 | Category page filters |
| TC-REG-004 | Install permissions modal |
| TC-REG-005 | Install success updates card state |

---

#### 4. Installed extensions (LLR-REG-INSTALLED)

**REQ-REG-INSTALLED-001** URL: `/extensions/installed`  
**Permission:** `registry-bridge list extension-install`  
**API:** `GET registry-extensions/installed`

##### 4.1 Layout

List or grid of installed extensions with actions per row.

##### 4.2 Row actions

| Action | Handler | Permission |
|--------|---------|------------|
| About | `about` | view |
| Uninstall | `uninstall` | NOT `cannot registry-bridge uninstall extension` |

##### 4.3 Uninstall UX (FO-REG-UNINSTALL-001)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-REG-UNINSTALL-001 | Confirm lists extension name + ŌĆ£may remove menu itemsŌĆØ |
| FO-REG-UNINSTALL-002 | Warn if extension provides critical functionality |
| FO-REG-UNINSTALL-003 | Success toast; suggest page reload if menus stale |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-REG-010 | Installed list loads |
| TC-REG-011 | About modal |
| TC-REG-012 | Uninstall confirm + success |
| TC-REG-013 | Uninstall disabled without permission |

---

#### 5. Purchased (LLR-REG-PURCHASED)

**URL:** `/extensions/purchased`  
Paid extension purchase history ŌĆö table: extension, date, amount, invoice link.

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-REG-020 | Purchased list loads |

---

#### 6. Publisher ŌĆö Developers area (LLR-REG-PUBLISH)

**Base:** `/extensions/developers`  
**Permission:** `registry-bridge create extension-bundle` (and related)

##### 6.1 My extensions list

**URL:** `/extensions/developers/extensions`

| Action | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| New | ŌåÆ new wizard |
| Edit | ŌåÆ distribution edit flow |

**URL:** `/extensions/developers/extensions/new`

| Step | Fields |
|------|--------|
| 1 | name, description (i18n form keys) |
| Continue | ŌåÆ edit flow |
| Cancel | back to list |

| Tab route | Content |
|-----------|---------|
| index | overview / status |
| details | metadata, screenshots, categories |
| bundles | package versions, compatibility |
| monetize | pricing, subscription |

**Statuses:** draft ŌåÆ pending review ŌåÆ published ŌåÆ deprecated

| Route | Purpose |
|-------|---------|

##### 6.5 Analytics & credentials

| `/developers/analytics` | installs, revenue charts |
| `/developers/credentials` | publisher API credentials |

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|

| TC-REG-031 | New extension wizard |
| TC-REG-032 | Edit details tab saves |
| TC-REG-033 | Bundles tab upload version |
| TC-REG-034 | Monetize pricing saved |

---

#### 7. Post-install platform behavior

| REQ | Behavior |
|-----|----------|
| REQ-REG-BOOT-001 | Installed engine registers via `setupExtension` on next boot |
| REQ-REG-BOOT-002 | `package manifest` manifest updated at build for bundled engines |
| REQ-REG-BOOT-003 | UI shows extension menu items only after `extensionManager.waitForBoot()` |

---

#### 8. UX & security

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| REG-UX-001 | Permission modal plain language (not raw policy JSON) |
| REG-UX-002 | Version compatibility warning before install |
| REG-SEC-001 | Only org admins install/uninstall |
| REG-SEC-002 | Publisher cannot self-approve without admin queue |
| REG-SEC-003 | Paid extensions use secure checkout (redirect or embedded) |

| Area | Test IDs |
|------|----------|
| Explore | TC-REG-001 ŌĆ” 005 |
| Installed | TC-REG-010 ŌĆ” 013 |
| Purchased | TC-REG-020 |
| Publish | TC-REG-030 ŌĆ” 034 |

### Feature spec: PALLET

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 59ŌĆō60 |
| **Mount** | `/pallet` |
| **Engine** | `@fleetbase/pallet-engine` (optional extension) |

> **Note:** Pallet is optional. Gate engine mount on extension install + company feature flag.

---

#### 1. Scope & route tree

| Area | Base path | Screens |
|------|-----------|--------:|
| Home | `/pallet` | 1 |
| Products | `/pallet/products` | 4 |
| Inventory | `/pallet/inventory` | 8 |
| Warehouses | `/pallet/warehouses` | 4 |
| Suppliers | `/pallet/suppliers` | 4 |
| Sales orders | `/pallet/sales-orders` | 4 |
| Purchase orders | `/pallet/purchase-orders` | 4 |
| Audits | `/pallet/audits` | 4 |
| Reports | `/pallet/reports` | 1 |
| Batch | `/pallet/batch` | route placeholder |

**Screen index:**  (34 files)

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-PALLET-1 ŌĆö Warehouse manager: receive stock

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Inventory ŌåÆ Add Inventory | `createInventory` |
| 2 | Select product, warehouse, batch, qty | Form |
| 3 | Save | POST inventory row ŌåÆ list refresh |

##### J-PALLET-2 ŌĆö Adjust stock after count

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Make Stock Adjustment | `makeStockAdjustment` |
| 2 | Enter delta + reason | Adjustment modal |
| 3 | Confirm | PATCH quantity; audit trail |

##### J-PALLET-3 ŌĆö Fulfillment: sales order

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Sales orders ŌåÆ New | `createSalesOrder` |
| 2 | Add line items from products | |
| 3 | Submit | Status workflow (draft ŌåÆ confirmed ŌåÆ shipped) |

##### J-PALLET-4 ŌĆö Procurement: purchase order

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Purchase orders ŌåÆ New | Select supplier |
| 2 | Line items + expected delivery | |
| 3 | Receive against PO | Updates inventory |

##### J-PALLET-5 ŌĆö Compliance: stock audit

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Audits ŌåÆ New | Define warehouse + SKU scope |
| 2 | Count entries | Compare system vs physical |
| 3 | Complete audit | Variance report |

##### J-PALLET-6 ŌĆö Alerts: low / expired stock

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Inventory sidebar links | `/inventory/low-stock`, `/inventory/expired-stock` |
| 2 | Review flagged rows | Filtered queries |
| 3 | Create PO or adjustment | Deep-link actions |

---

#### 3. Engine shell (LLR-PALLET-SHELL)

**REQ-PALLET-SHELL-001**

##### 3.1 Sidebar navigation

| Item | Route |
|------|-------|
| Home | `/pallet` |
| Products | `/pallet/products` |
| Inventory | `/pallet/inventory` |
| Warehouses | `/pallet/warehouses` |
| Suppliers | `/pallet/suppliers` |
| Sales Orders | `/pallet/sales-orders` |
| Purchase Orders | `/pallet/purchase-orders` |
| Audits | `/pallet/audits` |
| Reports | `/pallet/reports` |

##### 3.2 Global patterns (all list screens)

| Pattern | Requirement |
|---------|-------------|
| Header | `Layout::Section::Header` + primary CTA |
| Table | `Layout::Resource::Tabular` |
| Filters | `FiltersPicker` + `VisibleColumnPicker` |
| Bulk | `bulkDelete*` when `selectedRows` present |
| Export | `exportProcuts` / `exportFuelReports` (legacy naming ŌĆö map to CSV download) |
| Detail | `contextPanel` or route transition to `details/:public_id` |

---

#### 4. Products (LLR-PALLET-PR)

**REQ-PALLET-PR-LIST-001**  
**API:** `store.query('pallet-product')`  
**Spec:** (screen spec in this volume)

##### 4.1 Table columns

| # | Column | valuePath |
|---|--------|-----------|
| 1 | Product | `name` |
| 2 | ID | `public_id` |
| 3 | SKU | `sku` |
| 4 | Internal ID | `internal_id` |
| 5 | Value | `declared_value` / price |
| 6 | Date Added | `created_at` |
| 7 | Last Updated | `updated_at` |
| 8 | View | row action ŌåÆ `viewProduct` |
| 9 | Edit | `edit` route |
| 10 | Delete | `deleteProduct` + confirm |

##### 4.2 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `internal_id`, `public_id`, `sku`, `name`, `price`, `sale_price`, dimensions (`length`, `width`, `height`, `weight`), date filters

##### 4.3 Header actions

| Label | Handler |
|-------|---------|
| New | `createProduct` |
| Export | `exportProcuts` |
| Bulk delete | when rows selected |

##### 4.4 Product detail / form

| Screen | URL |
|--------|-----|
| New | `/pallet/products/new` |
| Details | `/pallet/products/:public_id` |
| Edit | `/pallet/products/edit/:public_id` |

**Form fields (typical):** name, SKU, barcode, dimensions, weight, declared value, sale price, description, images.

---

#### 5. Inventory (LLR-PALLET-INV)

**REQ-PALLET-INV-LIST-001**  
**API:** `store.query('inventory')`  
**Spec:** (screen spec in this volume)

##### 5.1 Table columns

| # | Column | valuePath |
|---|--------|-----------|
| 1 | Product | `product.name` |
| 2 | Product SKU | `product.sku` |
| 3 | Quantity | `quantity` |
| 4 | Batch | `batch` |
| 5 | Status | `status` |
| 6 | Last Stocked | `last_stocked_at` |
| 7 | Expiry Date | `expires_at` |
| 8 | Updated At | `updated_at` |
| 9 | View | `viewInventory` |
| 10 | Edit | edit route |

##### 5.2 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `product`, `warehouse`, `batch`, `status`

##### 5.3 Header actions

| Label | Handler |
|-------|---------|
| Add Inventory | `createInventory` |
| Make Stock Adjustment | `makeStockAdjustment` |

##### 5.4 Sub-routes

| Route | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `/pallet/inventory/low-stock` | SKUs below threshold |
| `/pallet/inventory/expired-stock` | Past expiry |
| `.../new-stock-adjustment` | Dedicated adjustment form |
| `.../new`, `.../edit`, `.../details` | CRUD |

##### 5.5 Stock adjustment UX (FO-PALLET-ADJ-001ŌĆ”003)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-PALLET-ADJ-001 | Show current qty read-only; delta as +/- input |
| FO-PALLET-ADJ-002 | Reason code required (damage, recount, transfer) |
| FO-PALLET-ADJ-003 | Success refreshes list; failed row stays in modal |

---

#### 6. Warehouses (LLR-PALLET-WH)

**REQ-PALLET-WH-LIST-001**  
**API:** `store.query('warehouse')` (or pallet equivalent)

##### 6.1 Table columns

| Column | Notes |
|--------|-------|
| Name | primary |
| Description | |
| Address | formatted |
| Stock Items | count |
| Country | |
| Structural / External | flags |
| Created / Updated | |
| View on Map | `viewOnMap` ŌĆö opens map modal |

##### 6.2 Actions

`createWarehouse`, `viewWarehouse`, `edit`, `deleteWarehouse`, `bulkDeleteWarehouses`, `viewOnMap`

##### 6.3 Warehouse detail tabs

Address block, contact, capacity, linked inventory summary, map pin.

---

#### 7. Suppliers (LLR-PALLET-SUP)

**REQ-PALLET-SUP-LIST-001**

Standard CRUD table: name, contact, email, phone, address, created/updated.  
Routes: list, new, details, edit ŌĆö mirror products pattern.

---

#### 8. Sales orders (LLR-PALLET-SO)

**REQ-PALLET-SO-LIST-001**  
**Spec:** (screen spec in this volume)

##### 8.1 Table columns

| Column | valuePath |
|--------|-----------|
| ID | `public_id` |
| Comments | `comments` |
| Status | `status` (badge) |
| Created At | `created_at` |
| Updated At | `updated_at` |

##### 8.2 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `status`, `created_by`, `updated_by`, `delivered_at`

##### 8.3 Actions

`createSalesOrder`, `viewSalesOrder`, `editSalesOrder`, `deleteSalesOrder`, `bulkDeleteSalesOrders`, export

##### 8.4 Detail screen

Line items table, status timeline, warehouse allocation, ship/deliver actions per API.

---

#### 9. Purchase orders (LLR-PALLET-PO)

**REQ-PALLET-PO-LIST-001**

Mirror sales orders structure with **supplier** linkage instead of customer.

| Status flow (typical) | draft ŌåÆ submitted ŌåÆ received ŌåÆ closed |
|-----------------------|----------------------------------------|

Routes: list, new, details, edit ŌĆö (screen spec in this volume)

---

#### 10. Audits (LLR-PALLET-AUD)

**REQ-PALLET-AUD-LIST-001**

| Screen | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| List | Open / completed audits |
| New | Start audit session |
| Details | Line-level variances |
| Edit | Adjust before finalize |

**UX:** Completed audits read-only; variances highlighted red/green.

---

#### 11. Reports (LLR-PALLET-RPT)

**REQ-PALLET-RPT-001**  
**URL:** `/pallet/reports`

Dashboard widgets or export tables: stock valuation, movement summary, expiry report.  
Implement per (screen spec in this volume) template.

---

#### 12. Permissions

Pallet uses Fleetbase abilities pattern (verify exact slugs in route `beforeModel`):

| Resource | Typical verbs |
|----------|---------------|
| pallet-product | list, view, create, update, delete |
| inventory | list, create, adjust |
| warehouse | list, view, create, update, delete |
| sales-order | list, create, update, delete |
| purchase-order | list, create, update, delete |

**REQ:** If engine not installed, hide `/pallet` from console nav entirely.

---

#### 13. Cross-cutting UX

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-PALLET-TABLE-001 | Horizontal scroll tables on mobile |
| FO-PALLET-TABLE-002 | Bulk actions bar appears when `selectedRows` length > 0 |
| FO-PALLET-FORM-001 | Unsaved changes guard on all edit routes |
| FO-PALLET-MODAL-001 | `startLoading` / `stopLoading` on destructive confirms |
| FO-PALLET-EMPTY-001 | Each list has empty state + primary CTA |

---

#### 14. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-PALLET-001 | Engine hidden when not installed |
| TC-PALLET-002 | Products list + create |
| TC-PALLET-003 | Product bulk delete confirm |
| TC-PALLET-004 | Inventory list filters by warehouse |
| TC-PALLET-005 | Stock adjustment updates qty |
| TC-PALLET-006 | Low-stock route shows threshold items |
| TC-PALLET-007 | Expired-stock route |
| TC-PALLET-008 | Warehouse create + map view |
| TC-PALLET-009 | Supplier CRUD |
| TC-PALLET-010 | Sales order create + status change |
| TC-PALLET-011 | Purchase order receive flow |
| TC-PALLET-012 | Audit complete locks edits |
| TC-PALLET-013 | Reports page loads |
| TC-PALLET-014 | Export downloads file |
| TC-PALLET-015 | Permission denied redirect |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-PALLET-*` / `TC-PALLET-*`*

---

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

- `willTransition`: cleanup listeners, map controls, restore sidebar
- `afterModel`: secondary loads after primary model
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `install`
- On failure redirects to `onboard`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** _(none ŌĆö presentational panel)_


##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `auth.login`
- On failure redirects to `auth.login`
- On failure redirects to `auth.login`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `router`, `fetch`, `notifications`, `session`, `intl`

**Query params:** `token`, `clientToken`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action async
- **Setup/teardown:** @action async
- **Setup/teardown:** @action cancelTwoFactor
- **Setup/teardown:** @action handleCodeExpired
- **Setup/teardown:** @action handleOtpInput

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.countdownReady}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.isCodeExpired}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Loading / empty states

- Button/component `@isLoading` binds to async task running state

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `currentUser`, `modalsManager`, `crud`, `notifications`, `intl`, `fetch`, `router`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action async
- **Setup/teardown:** @action switchOrganization
- **Setup/teardown:** @action deleteOrganization
- **Setup/teardown:** @action editOrganization
- **Setup/teardown:** @action createOrganization

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if isOwner}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- **Setup/teardown:** @action changeUserPassword
- **Setup/teardown:** @action search
- **Setup/teardown:** @action setOverlayContext
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onPressClose

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if (gt @model.meta.total this.nestedLimit)}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `fetch`, `notifications`

**Tasks:** `loadCompanyTwoFaSettings`, `loadSystemTwoFaConfig`, `loadUserTwoFaSettings`, `saveTwoFactorSettingsForCompany` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action onTwoFaToggled
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onTwoFaMethodSelected
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onTwoFaEnforceToggled
- **Setup/teardown:** @action saveTwoFactor

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.loadCompanyTwoFaSettings.isIdle}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Loading / empty states

- Button/component `@isLoading` binds to async task running state
- Spinner shown during upload/async operations
- Task `.isRunning` disables UI during ember-concurrency task
- Waits for task `.isIdle` before rendering (e.g. 2FA settings)

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Route lifecycle


##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view contact` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.contacts.customers`
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.contacts.customers`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `hostRouter`


##### Service action flows

###### `contact.create()`


###### `contact.update()`


###### `contact.delete()`

**Modal (confirm):** confirm dialog

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `contact.confirmContinueWithUnsavedChanges()`

**Modal (confirm):** common.continue-without-saving

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `contact.bulkDelete()`


###### `contact.export()`


###### `contact.import()`


###### `contact.search()`


###### `contact.refresh()`


**Navigation:**
- `router.refresh()` after success

###### `contact.transitionTo()`


###### `contact.createTask()`


###### `contact.updateTask()`


###### `contact.saveTask()`


###### `contact.modalTask()`


###### `contact.deleteTask()`


###### `contact.getRecordName()`


###### `contact.createNewInstance()`


###### `contact.can()`


###### `contact.cannot()`


###### `contact.viewPlace()`


###### `contact.editPlace()`


###### `contact.createPlace()`

| API | Details |
|-----|--------|
| SAVE | `Ember Data record.save()` |

**Local state after success:**
- set `place_uuid` = place.id

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view contact` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.contacts.customers`
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.contacts.customers`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `hostRouter`


##### Service action flows

###### `customer.create()`


###### `customer.update()`


###### `customer.delete()`

**Modal (confirm):** confirm dialog

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `customer.confirmContinueWithUnsavedChanges()`

**Modal (confirm):** common.continue-without-saving

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `customer.bulkDelete()`


###### `customer.export()`


###### `customer.import()`


###### `customer.search()`


###### `customer.refresh()`


**Navigation:**
- `router.refresh()` after success

###### `customer.transitionTo()`


###### `customer.createTask()`


###### `customer.updateTask()`


###### `customer.saveTask()`


###### `customer.modalTask()`


###### `customer.deleteTask()`


###### `customer.getRecordName()`


###### `customer.createNewInstance()`


###### `customer.can()`


###### `customer.cannot()`


##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### List screen (related)

- Spec: 
- Service:  ŌĆö create/edit via panel or modal; row click ŌåÆ detail route

#### Panel / modal flows (from *-actions service)

| Flow | Entry |
|------|-------|
| Create | `panel.create` / `modal.create` ŌåÆ form component |
| Edit | `panel.edit` / `modal.edit` ŌåÆ reload if `_index_resource` |
| Quick view | `panel.view` with `panelTabs` (driver/vehicle) or modal (place) |
| Delete | `delete(model, { onConfirm }) ŌåÆ redirect list |

#### Mobile / responsive

- `Layout::Resource::Panel` with `@bodyClass="no-scroll"` ŌĆö tab content scrolls inside panel
- Table list uses standard pagination; vehicle list supports table/grid layout toggle

- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Order detail: channel `order.{public_id}`; reloadable: `order.created`, `order.completed`, `waypoint.activity`, `entity.activity`, status change on `order.updated`
- Debounced `hostRouter.refresh()` + map routing control replace on reloadable events
- Leave route: `orderSocketEvents.stop(model)`

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### Registry

#### List screen (related)

- Spec: 
- Service:  ŌĆö create/edit via panel or modal; row click ŌåÆ detail route

#### Panel / modal flows (from *-actions service)

| Flow | Entry |
|------|-------|
| Create | `panel.create` / `modal.create` ŌåÆ form component |
| Edit | `panel.edit` / `modal.edit` ŌåÆ reload if `_index_resource` |
| Quick view | `panel.view` with `panelTabs` (driver/vehicle) or modal (place) |
| Delete | `delete(model, { onConfirm }) ŌåÆ redirect list |

#### Mobile / responsive

- `Layout::Resource::Panel` with `@bodyClass="no-scroll"` ŌĆö tab content scrolls inside panel
- Table list uses standard pagination; vehicle list supports table/grid layout toggle

| Console component | Build as |
|-------|----------|
| Place::Details | Overview tab |
| Layout::Resource::Panel | Detail page shell |
| TabNavigation | Tab bar |
| RegistryYield | Extension panels |

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view maintenance-schedule` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.schedules.index`
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.schedules.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `maintenanceScheduleActions`, `fetch`, `hostRouter`, `intl`, `abilities`, `universe/menu-service`

**Tabs:**
- route: maintenance.schedules.index.details.index
- route: maintenance.schedules.index.details.work-orders

##### Action menu / header buttons

| Action | Handler | Disabled when |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| Download .ics | `inline fn` | `ŌĆö` |
| Add to Google Calendar | `inline fn` | `ŌĆö` |

- **Setup/teardown:** @action edit
- **Setup/teardown:** @action triggerNow
- **Setup/teardown:** @action delete
- **Setup/teardown:** @action downloadIcal
- **Setup/teardown:** @action addToGoogleCalendar

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

Panel layout. Header: vehicle display name. Tabs: Overview, Positions, Devices, Schedules, Work Orders, Maintenance (+ registry).

#### Parent route ŌĆö data load

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Model | `vehicle` |
| Permission | `fleet-ops view vehicle` |
| API | `store.findRecord('vehicle', public_id)` |
| After model | `model.loadDriver()` |

**Error handling:** `notifications.serverError(error)`; if message ends with `not found` ŌåÆ redirect to list index.

**beforeModel:** `abilities.cannot('fleet-ops view vehicle')` ŌåÆ warning toast + redirect to list.

| Devices | `management.vehicles.index.details.devices` |
| Schedules | `management.vehicles.index.details.schedules` |
| Work Orders | `management.vehicles.index.details.work-orders` |
| Maintenance | `management.vehicles.index.details.maintenance-history` |
| (+ extension tabs) | `menuService.getMenuItems('fleet-ops:component:vehicle:details')` |

#### Registry

- `fleet-ops:component:vehicle:details` ŌĆö extension tabs and `RegistryYield` panels on overview component

#### List screen (related)

- Spec: 
- Service:  ŌĆö create/edit via panel or modal; row click ŌåÆ detail route

#### Panel / modal flows (from *-actions service)

| Flow | Entry |
|------|-------|
| Create | `panel.create` / `modal.create` ŌåÆ form component |
| Edit | `panel.edit` / `modal.edit` ŌåÆ reload if `_index_resource` |
| Quick view | `panel.view` with `panelTabs` (driver/vehicle) or modal (place) |
| Delete | `delete(model, { onConfirm }) ŌåÆ redirect list |

#### Mobile / responsive

- `Layout::Resource::Panel` with `@bodyClass="no-scroll"` ŌĆö tab content scrolls inside panel
- Table list uses standard pagination; vehicle list supports table/grid layout toggle

#### Custom component map

| Console component | Build as |
|-------|----------|
| Vehicle::Details | Overview tab |
| Layout::Resource::Panel | Detail page shell |
| TabNavigation | Tab bar |
| RegistryYield | Extension panels |


---


---


---

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view vehicle` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `afterModel`: secondary loads after primary model
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.vehicles.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.vehicles.index`

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `deviceActions`, `hostRouter`, `intl`, `notifications`, `events`

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action resetForm

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view sensor` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.connectivity.sensors.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.connectivity.sensors.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `universe/menu-service`, `hostRouter`

**Tabs:**
- Overview
- route: connectivity.sensors.index.details.index

###### `sensor-actions.create()`


###### `sensor-actions.update()`


###### `sensor-actions.delete()`

**Modal (confirm):** confirm dialog

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `sensor-actions.confirmContinueWithUnsavedChanges()`

**Modal (confirm):** common.continue-without-saving

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `sensor-actions.bulkDelete()`


###### `sensor-actions.export()`


###### `sensor-actions.import()`


###### `sensor-actions.search()`


###### `sensor-actions.refresh()`

- `router.refresh()` after success

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view equipment` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.equipment.index`
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.equipment.index`

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops update equipment` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.equipment.index`
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.equipment.index`

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

| (input) | `@resource.name` |

- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### List resource behavior

- Uses `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö search debounced via controller task
- Pagination: `page` query param updates model
- Bulk actions from `bulkActions` getter on controller
- Row click ŌåÆ transition to details route
- Export/import via `*Actions.export/import`

#### 17. Runtime behavior

| Permission | Effect |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.work-orders.index`
- On failure redirects to `maintenance.work-orders.index`

- route: maintenance.work-orders.index.details.index

| Action | Handler | Disabled when |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| Send to Vendor | `inline fn` | `ŌĆö` |
| (action) | `inline fn` | `ŌĆö` |
| (action) | `inline fn` | `ŌĆö` |

- **Setup/teardown:** @action edit
- **Setup/teardown:** @action delete

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width

- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### List resource behavior

- Uses `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö search debounced via controller task
- Pagination: `page` query param updates model
- Bulk actions from `bulkActions` getter on controller
- Row click ŌåÆ transition to details route
- Export/import via `*Actions.export/import`

- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### List resource behavior

- Uses `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö search debounced via controller task
- Pagination: `page` query param updates model
- Bulk actions from `bulkActions` getter on controller
- Row click ŌåÆ transition to details route
- Export/import via `*Actions.export/import`

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### List resource behavior

- Uses `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö search debounced via controller task
- Pagination: `page` query param updates model
- Bulk actions from `bulkActions` getter on controller
- Row click ŌåÆ transition to details route
- Export/import via `*Actions.export/import`

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops create issue` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.issues.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `issueActions`, `hostRouter`, `intl`, `currentUser`, `notifications`, `events`

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action resetForm

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view place` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.places.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.places.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `universe/menu-service`, `hostRouter`

**Tabs:**
- Overview
- route: management.places.index.details.index

##### Action menu / header buttons

| Action | Handler | Disabled when |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| (action) | `hostRouter.transitionTo` | `ŌĆö` |


##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

###### `place-actions.create()`

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `place-actions.confirmContinueWithUnsavedChanges()`

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

| Engine Displacement | `@resource.engine_displacement` |
| Horsepower | `@resource.horsepower` |
| Torque | `@resource.torque` |
| Fuel Capacity | `@resource.fuel_capacity` |
| Payload Capacity | `@resource.payload_capacity` |
| Towing Capacity | `@resource.towing_capacity` |
| Seating Capacity | `@resource.seating_capacity` |
| Vehicle Weight | `@resource.weight` |
| Length | `@resource.length` |
| Width | `@resource.width` |
| Height | `@resource.height` |
| Cargo Volume | `@resource.cargo_volume` |
| Payload Volume (m┬│) | `@resource.payload_capacity_volume` |
| Pallet Capacity | `@resource.payload_capacity_pallets` |
| Parcel Capacity | `@resource.payload_capacity_parcels` |
| Passenger Volume | `@resource.passenger_volume` |
| Interior Volume | `@resource.interior_volume` |
| Ground Clearance | `@resource.ground_clearance` |
| Bed Length | `@resource.bed_length` |
| GVWR (Gross Vehicle Weight Rating) | `@resource.gvwr` |
| GCWR (Gross Combined Weight Rating) | `@resource.gcwr` |
| Currency | `@resource.currency` |
| Acquisition Cost | `@resource.acquisition_cost` |
| Current Value | `@resource.current_value` |
| Insurance Value | `@resource.insurance_value` |
| Depreciation Rate (%) | `@resource.depreciation_rate` |
| Estimated Service Life (Distance) | `@resource.estimated_service_life_distance` |
| Service Life Distance Unit | `@resource.estimated_service_life_months` |
| Purchase Date | `or (format-date-fns @resource.purchased_at "dd-MM-yyyy") null` |
| Lease Expiry Date | `or (format-date-fns @resource.lease_expires_at "dd-MM-yyyy") null` |
| Loan Amount | `@resource.loan_amount` |
| First Payment Date | `or (format-date-fns @resource.loan_first_payment "dd-MM-yyyy") null` |
| Vehicle Skills | `@resource.time_window_start` |
| Available Until | `@resource.time_window_end` |
| Max Tasks | `@resource.max_tasks` |
| (input) | `@resource.name` |

###### Child: `AvatarPicker`


---


---

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops create vehicle` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.vehicles.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `store`, `hostRouter`, `intl`, `notifications`, `events`

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action resetForm

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops update vendor` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.vendors.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.management.vendors.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `hostRouter`, `intl`, `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `events`

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action cancel
- **Setup/teardown:** @action view

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops list order` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** _(none ŌĆö presentational panel)_


##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- Tables use horizontal scroll / pagination footer

---
