| Console component | Custom design system |
|-------|---------------------|
| `Layout::Resource::Panel` | _(assign in your design system)_ |
| `TabNavigation` | _(assign in your design system)_ |

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `fleet-ops view order` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**Model load:** `store.queryRecord('order', { single: true, with: [payload, driverAssigned, orderConfig, customer, facilitator, trackingStatuses, trackingNumber, purchaseRate, comments, files] })`

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `willTransition`: cleanup listeners, map controls, restore sidebar
- `afterModel`: `order.loadTrackingActivity()` then optional `order.reload()` if `meta._index_resource`
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.operations.orders.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.fleet-ops.operations.orders.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `universe/menu-service`, `orderActions`, `orderSocketEvents`, `leafletMapManager`, `leafletLayerVisibilityManager`, `hostRouter`, `universe`, `sidebar`

**Tasks:** `refresh` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

**Tabs:**
- Overview
- route: operations.orders.index.details.index

##### Action menu / header buttons

| Action | Handler | Disabled when |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| Edit details | `orderActions.editOrderDetails` | `this.model.status === 'canceled'` |
| Update activity | `orderActions.updateActivity` | `this.model.status === 'canceled'` |
| Unassign driver | `orderActions.unassignDriver` | `this.model.status === 'canceled' || !this.model.driver_assigned` |
| View order label | `orderActions.viewLabel` | `ŌĆö` |
| Listen to socket channel | `hostRouter.transitionTo` | `ŌĆö` |
| View metadata | `orderActions.viewMetadata` | `ŌĆö` |
| Cancel order | `orderActions.cancel` | `this.model.status === 'canceled'` |
| Delete order | `orderActions.delete` | `ŌĆö` |

- **Setup/teardown:** @action async
- **Setup/teardown:** `sidebar.hideNow()` on setup ŌĆö hides sidebar
- **Setup/teardown:** `orderSocketEvents.start(model)` ŌĆö realtime channel subscription

##### Service action flows

###### `order-actions.editOrderDetails()`


###### `order-actions.updateActivity()`

**Modal (show):** modals/update-order-activity

- Flow: Opens modal; confirm handler may call save/API; decline may rollback

###### `order-actions.unassignDriver()`


###### `order-actions.viewLabel()`

**Modal (show):** modal component

- Flow: Opens modal; confirm handler may call save/API; decline may rollback

###### `order-actions.viewMetadata()`

**Modal (show):** modals/view-metadata

- Flow: Opens modal; confirm handler may call save/API; decline may rollback

###### `order-actions.cancel()`

**Modal (confirm):** order.prompts.cancel-title

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

###### `order-actions.delete()`

**Modal (confirm):** confirm dialog

- Flow: User accepts ŌåÆ `modal.startLoading()` ŌåÆ API/model op ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ `modal.done()` | catch ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError` ŌåÆ `modal.stopLoading()`

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Order detail: channel `order.{public_id}`; reloadable: `order.created`, `order.completed`, `waypoint.activity`, `entity.activity`, status change on `order.updated`
- Debounced `hostRouter.refresh()` + map routing control replace on reloadable events
- Leave route: `orderSocketEvents.stop(model)`

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- **Setup/teardown:** @action addShift
- **Setup/teardown:** @action previousWeek
- **Setup/teardown:** @action nextWeek
- **Setup/teardown:** @action goToToday

- `{{#if this.loadScheduleItems.isRunning}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

- Spinner shown during upload/async operations

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action resetForm

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- **Setup/teardown:** @action didLoadMap
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onOrderSelected
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onDateRangeChanged
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onSpeedChanged
- **Setup/teardown:** @action startReplay
- **Setup/teardown:** @action pauseReplay
- **Setup/teardown:** @action stopReplay

###### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.loadPositions.isRunning}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.resource}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

- `{{#if this.hasPositions}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.loadPositions.isIdle}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

###### Loading / empty states

- Spinner shown during upload/async operations
- Task `.isRunning` disables UI during ember-concurrency task
- Waits for task `.isIdle` before rendering (e.g. 2FA settings)
- Empty state: `{{else}}` branch on `#each` when no records

- `#if this.loadPositions.isRunning`
- `#if this.resource`
- `#if (eq this.resourceType "vehicle")`
- `#if (eq this.resourceType "vehicle")`
- `#if (or this.isReplaying this.isPaused)`
- `#if this.isReplaying`
- `#if (or this.isReplaying this.isPaused)`
- `#if this.hasPositions`
- `#if this.hasPositions`
- `#if this.hasPositions`
- `#if this.loadPositions.isIdle`

###### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

###### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `orderActions`

###### Action menu / header buttons

| Action | Handler | Disabled when |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| Edit | `inline fn` | `ŌĆö` |


###### Service action flows

###### `order-actions.editMetadata()`

**Modal (show):** modals/edit-metadata

- Flow: Opens modal; confirm handler may call save/API; decline may rollback

**Local state after success:**
- set `meta` = meta

###### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

###### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

###### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

###### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

###### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

###### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

###### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `store`, `fetch`, `positionPlayback`, `notifications`, `location`

**Tasks:** `loadPositions`, `loadMetrics` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action didLoadMap
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onOrderSelected
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onDateRangeChanged
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onSpeedChanged
- **Setup/teardown:** @action startReplay
- **Setup/teardown:** @action pauseReplay
- **Setup/teardown:** @action stopReplay
- **Setup/teardown:** @action stepForward
- **Setup/teardown:** @action stepBackward
- **Setup/teardown:** @action clearFilters
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onPositionClicked
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onTrackingMarkerAdded

###### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.loadPositions.isRunning}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.resource}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if (eq this.resourceType "vehicle")}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if (eq this.resourceType "vehicle")}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if (or this.isReplaying this.isPaused)}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.isReplaying}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if (or this.isReplaying this.isPaused)}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.hasPositions}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.hasPositions}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.hasPositions}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.loadPositions.isIdle}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

###### Loading / empty states

- Spinner shown during upload/async operations
- Task `.isRunning` disables UI during ember-concurrency task
- Waits for task `.isIdle` before rendering (e.g. 2FA settings)
- Empty state: `{{else}}` branch on `#each` when no records

###### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)

- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

###### Component source


**Behavior:** GPS replay via `positionPlayback` service; date filter; map markers; play/pause; fetches positions for driver or vehicle resource.

**Branches:**
- `#if this.loadPositions.isRunning`
- `#if this.resource`
- `#if (eq this.resourceType "vehicle")`
- `#if (eq this.resourceType "vehicle")`
- `#if (or this.isReplaying this.isPaused)`
- `#if this.isReplaying`
- `#if (or this.isReplaying this.isPaused)`
- `#if this.hasPositions`
- `#if this.hasPositions`
- `#if this.hasPositions`
- `#if this.loadPositions.isIdle`

- `StatusBadge`
- `Button`
- `FaIcon`
- `Button`

###### Custom UI notes

Rebuild as a tab inside vehicle detail. Model: `vehicle` (doc 33).


---


---

###### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

###### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `workOrderActions`, `notifications`, `store`

**Tasks:** `loadWorkOrders` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`


###### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.loadWorkOrders.isRunning}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.workOrders.length}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

###### Loading / empty states

- Spinner shown during upload/async operations
- Task `.isRunning` disables UI during ember-concurrency task
- Empty state: `{{else}}` branch on `#each` when no records

###### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

###### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

###### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

###### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

###### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

###### Component source


**Branches:**
- `#if this.loadWorkOrders.isRunning`
- `#if this.workOrders.length`

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `iam see extension` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console`

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- **Setup/teardown:** @action exportPolicies
- **Setup/teardown:** @action reload

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if (safe-has this.table "selectedRows")}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- **Setup/teardown:** @action renameApiKey
- **Setup/teardown:** @action deleteApiKey
- **Setup/teardown:** @action bulkDeleteApiCredentials
- **Setup/teardown:** @action rollApiKey
- **Setup/teardown:** @action viewRequestLogs
- **Setup/teardown:** @action exportApiKeys
- **Setup/teardown:** @action reload

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.isTestMode}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if (safe-has this.table "selectedRows")}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `developers list socket` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console.developers.home`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `modalsManager`, `intl`, `notifications`, `currentUser`, `store`, `hostRouter`, `abilities`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action onRowClick
- **Setup/teardown:** @action listenOnCustomChannel
- **Setup/teardown:** @action reload

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `registry-bridge list registry-token` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `modalsManager`, `notifications`, `hostRouter`, `fetch`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action deleteCredentials
- **Setup/teardown:** @action createCredentials

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

- `{{#if queue.files.length}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.lastError}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if @model.length}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Loading / empty states

- Spinner shown during upload/async operations
- Waits for task `.isIdle` before rendering (e.g. 2FA settings)
- Empty state: `{{else}}` branch on `#each` when no records

- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

**Layout:** Right overlay panel; Collapsible content panels

| Field | Binding |
|-------|----------|
| Product | `this.inventory.quantity` |

| Batch Number | `this.inventory.batch.batch_number` |

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `store`, `hostRouter`, `modalsManager`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action setOverlayContext
- **Setup/teardown:** @action transitionBack
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onAfterSave

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)

- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `store`, `currentUser`, `hostRouter`, `modalsManager`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action setOverlayContext
- **Setup/teardown:** @action transitionBack
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onAfterSave

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

| Country | `this.warehouse.country` |
| Coordinates | `this.warehouse.location` |
| Phone | `this.warehouse.phone` |
| Description | `this.warehouse.meta.description` |
| (input) | `this.warehouse.name` |

**Buttons:** if this.warehouse.id "Save Warehouse" "Create Warehouse"

###### Child: `WarehouseEditor`

| Field | Binding |
|-------|----------|
| Name | `section.name` |
| Description | `section.description` |

| Description | `aisle.description` |

| Description | `rack.description` |

---

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `hostRouter`, `modalsManager`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action transitionBack
- **Setup/teardown:** @action setOverlayContext
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onViewDetails
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onAfterSave

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

# Part VII ŌĆö Feature requirements (Storefront & Ledger)


### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-HOME

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Doc 47 |
| **URL** | `/storefront/home` |
| 
---

#### 1. Scope

Single-screen **operations dashboard** for merchants: KPI metrics, recent orders with inline fulfillment actions, and customer snapshot. Default landing route after entering the Storefront engine.

**Components (from screen spec):**

| Widget | Source |
|--------|--------|
| `Widget::StorefrontMetrics` | KPI cards |
| `Widget::Orders` | Recent orders + fulfillment CTAs |
| `Widget::Customers` | Recent / top customers |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-SF-HOME-1 ŌĆö Morning ops check

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Land on home | Load metrics + widgets |
| 2 | Scan KPIs | Orders today, revenue, customers |
| 3 | Act on pending order | Inline accept/dispatch from Orders widget |

##### J-SF-HOME-2 ŌĆö Fulfill from dashboard (no OrderPanel)

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Orders widget row | View order summary |
| 2 | Accept order | Same flow as STOREFRONT-ORDERS |
| 3 | Assign / change driver | Modal if `has_driver_assigned` branch |
| 4 | Mark preparing ŌåÆ ready ŌåÆ completed | Status progression buttons |

##### J-SF-HOME-3 ŌĆö Drill into customers

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Customers widget | List recent customers |
| 2 | View | Navigate to customers list or `CustomerPanel` |

---

#### 3. Layout (LLR-SF-HOME-LAYOUT)

**REQ-SF-HOME-001**

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé Section header: Storefront / Home                       Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Widget::StorefrontMetrics (KPI row)                     Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö¼ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Widget::Orders           Ōöé Widget::Customers            Ōöé
Ōöé (collapsible panels)     Ōöé (collapsible panels)         Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö┤ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

##### 3.1 Responsive

| Breakpoint | Layout |
|------------|--------|
| Desktop | Metrics full width; orders + customers 2-column |
| Mobile | Stack widgets vertically; metrics 2├Ś2 grid |

---

#### 4. StorefrontMetrics widget (LLR-SF-HOME-METRICS)

**REQ-SF-HOME-METRICS-001**

Typical KPIs (verify API payload):

| Metric | Notes |
|--------|-------|
| Orders today | count |
| Revenue today | currency formatted |
| Pending orders | badge if > 0 |
| New customers | period count |

**UX (FO-SF-HOME-METRICS-001ŌĆ”003):**

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-HOME-METRICS-001 | Skeleton cards while loading |
| FO-SF-HOME-METRICS-002 | Click metric ŌåÆ filtered orders/customers route |
| FO-SF-HOME-METRICS-003 | Zero state shows "0" not empty |

---

#### 5. Orders widget (LLR-SF-HOME-ORDERS)

**REQ-SF-HOME-ORDERS-001**

Collapsible `ContentPanel` listing recent `order` records.

##### 5.1 Row actions (from template)

| Label (i18n) | Condition | Action |
|--------------|-----------|--------|
| storefront.common.view | always | Open order (panel or route) |
| assign-driver | `!order.has_driver_assigned` | Assign driver modal |
| change-driver | `order.has_driver_assigned` | Change driver modal |
| accept-order | pending accept | Accept |
| mark-as-preparing | after accept | Status update |
| mark-as-ready | pickup: `order.meta.is_pickup` | Ready for pickup |
| dispatch | delivery | Dispatch to driver |
| mark-as-completed | ŌĆö | Complete |
| cancel-order | ŌĆö | Cancel + confirm |

**Child:** `DisplayPlace` for delivery/pickup address snippet.

##### 5.2 Permission alignment

Reuse FleetOps + storefront order permissions from STOREFRONT-ORDERS:

| Action | Permissions |
|--------|-------------|
| Accept / ready / complete | storefront + fleet-ops as documented |
| Dispatch / assign driver | `fleet-ops dispatch order` |
| Cancel | `fleet-ops cancel order` |

Hide buttons when `cannot` ŌĆö do not show disabled clutter.

##### 5.3 Realtime

**REQ-SF-HOME-RT-001:** Orders widget subscribes to company channel patches (`order.driver_assigned`, status changes) and updates row without full page reload.

---

#### 6. Customers widget (LLR-SF-HOME-CUST)

**REQ-SF-HOME-CUST-001**

Collapsible panel ŌĆö recent customers with link to full customers list.

| Element | Behavior |
|---------|----------|
| Customer name | Link to `?view=` panel or customers route |
| Order count / last order | secondary text |
| View all | footer link ŌåÆ `/storefront/customers` |

---

#### 7. Navigation & permissions

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Route | `storefront.home` |
| Default engine entry | Often redirected from `/storefront` |
| Permissions | Inherits widget-level checks; no separate `list home` |

---

#### 8. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-HOME-001 | Dashboard loads all 3 widgets |
| TC-SF-HOME-002 | Metrics skeleton then data |
| TC-SF-HOME-003 | Accept order from widget |
| TC-SF-HOME-004 | Assign vs change driver branch |
| TC-SF-HOME-005 | Pickup shows mark-as-ready not dispatch |
| TC-SF-HOME-006 | Cancel confirms |
| TC-SF-HOME-007 | View opens order detail/panel |
| TC-SF-HOME-008 | Customers widget deep-link |
| TC-SF-HOME-009 | Realtime status update in widget |
| TC-SF-HOME-010 | Mobile stacked layout |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-SF-HOME-*` / `TC-SF-HOME-*`*


### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-PRODUCTS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 47ŌĆō48 |
| **Mount** | `/storefront` |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| S1 | Products hub | `/storefront/products` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | All products | `/storefront/products/` (index) | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | By category | `/storefront/products/:category_slug` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | Edit product | `/storefront/products/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S5 | New category | `.../category/new` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S6 | Edit category | `.../category/:id/edit` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-SF-PR-1 ŌĆö Merchandiser: organize catalog

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open products | Category sidebar (`AsideItemScroller`) |
| 2 | Create category | `createNewProductCategory` |
| 3 | Switch category | `switchCategory` ŌĆö product grid filters |

##### J-SF-PR-2 ŌĆö Add product with image

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | New product | `createNewProduct` |
| 2 | Upload images | Primary + gallery |
| 3 | Set price, SKU, status | Save ŌåÆ appears in grid |

##### J-SF-PR-3 ŌĆö Bulk import

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Import | `importProducts` |
| 2 | Upload CSV | Modal progress |
| 3 | Review errors | Row-level error report |

##### J-SF-PR-4 ŌĆö Manage addons

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Manage addons | `manageAddons` |
| 2 | Configure modifier groups | Linked to products |

---

#### 3. Products hub layout (LLR-SF-PR-HUB)

**REQ-SF-PR-001** URL: `/storefront/products`  
**Permission:** `storefront list product`

##### 3.1 Two-pane layout

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö¼ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé Categories     Ōöé  {{outlet}} ŌĆö product grid or edit    Ōöé
Ōöé AsideItemScrollerŌöé                                      Ōöé
Ōöé + "All"        Ōöé  Header: New | Import | Export | AddonsŌöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö┤ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

**Data:** Parent route loads `store.query('category')` for sidebar.

##### 3.2 Hub header actions

| Label (i18n) | Action | Permission |
|--------------|--------|------------|
| storefront.common.new | `createNewProduct` | create product |
| storefront.common.import | `importProducts` | import |
| storefront.common.export | export | export |
| storefront.products.index.manage-addons | `manageAddons` | update product |

##### 3.3 Category sidebar UX (FO-SF-CAT-001)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-CAT-001 | Vertical scroll category list with icons/thumbnails |
| FO-SF-CAT-002 | Active category highlighted |
| FO-SF-CAT-003 | ŌĆ£View all productsŌĆØ clears category filter (`viewAllProducts`) |
| FO-SF-CAT-004 | Long-press or context menu: edit/delete category |
| FO-SF-CAT-005 | Mobile: collapsible drawer for categories |

---

#### 4. Product grid (LLR-SF-PR-GRID)

**Routes:** `/storefront/products/` | `/storefront/products/:slug`

**API:** `store.query('product')` filtered by category when applicable

##### 4.1 Product card (grid cell)

| Element | Binding | UX |
|---------|---------|-----|
| Image | `product.image_url` | placeholder if missing |
| Name | `product.name` | 2-line clamp |
| Price | `product.price` | currency |
| Status | `product.status` | draft/active/archived badge |
| SKU | `product.sku` | secondary text |

##### 4.2 Grid behaviors

| Behavior | Requirement |
|----------|-------------|
| Click card | ŌåÆ edit route `.../index/edit/:public_id` |
| Empty category | Illustration + ŌĆ£Add productŌĆØ CTA |
| Pagination | Footer `Pagination` component |
| Search | Debounced filter on name/SKU (if controller exposes) |

##### 4.3 Query / state

- Category slug in URL selects sidebar item
- `switchCategory` updates route without full reload where possible

---

#### 5. Product edit (LLR-SF-PR-FORM)

**URL:** `/storefront/products/index/index/edit/:public_id`  
**Permissions:** `storefront create product`, `storefront update product`

##### 5.1 Form sections (implement per Product::Form pattern)

| Section | Fields |
|---------|--------|
| Basic | name, description, sku, barcode |
| Pricing | price, sale_price, compare_at, tax class |
| Inventory | track_inventory, quantity, allow_backorder |
| Organization | categories (multi), tags, sort order |
| Media | primary image, gallery uploads |
| Status | active / draft / archived |
| Variants | options, variant rows (if enabled) |
| SEO | meta title, description (if exposed) |

##### 5.2 Validation

| Field | Rule |
|-------|------|
| name | required |
| price | required, Ōēź 0 |
| sku | unique per store (API) |
| images | max size per upload policy |

##### 5.3 Actions

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| Save | PATCH product; toast; stay or back to grid |
| Save & add another | POST then new form |
| Delete | confirm ŌåÆ DELETE ŌåÆ category grid |
| Duplicate | clone product (if API supports) |

**UX:** Sticky save bar on mobile; unsaved changes guard on navigate away.

---

#### 6. Category CRUD (LLR-SF-CAT-FORM)

**New:** `products/index/category/new`  
**Edit:** `products/index/category/:public_id/edit`

| Field | Control |
|-------|---------|
| name | text |
| description | textarea |
| parent category | select (tree) |
| image | upload |
| sort | number |
| status | active/hidden |

---

#### 7. Modals

| Modal | Trigger |
|-------|---------|
| Import products | `importProducts` |
| Manage addons | `manageAddons` |
| Delete product/category | confirm |

---

#### 8. Permissions summary

| Permission | Capability |
|------------|------------|
| storefront list product | view hub + grid |
| storefront create product | new |
| storefront update product | edit, addons |
| storefront delete product | delete |
| storefront import product | import (if separate) |

---

#### 9. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-PR-001 | Categories sidebar loads |
| TC-SF-PR-002 | Switch category filters grid |
| TC-SF-PR-003 | View all products |
| TC-SF-PR-004 | Create product with image |
| TC-SF-PR-005 | Edit saves price |
| TC-SF-PR-006 | Import modal |
| TC-SF-PR-007 | Manage addons opens |
| TC-SF-PR-008 | Empty category CTA |
| TC-SF-PR-009 | Create category |
| TC-SF-PR-010 | Pagination works |
| TC-SF-PR-011 | No permission blocked |
| TC-SF-PR-012 | Mobile category drawer |

---

### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-ORDERS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Doc 49 |
| **Related** | FleetOps orders (shared `order` model) ŌĆö FLEETOPS-ORDERS |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| S1 | Orders list | `/storefront/orders` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Order view (panel) | `/storefront/orders/:public_id/view` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | New order | `/storefront/orders/new` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | Edit order | `/storefront/orders/:public_id/edit` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-SF-ORD-1 ŌĆö Store operator: fulfill incoming order

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open orders list | Filter status = pending |
| 2 | Click row | `viewOrder` ŌåÆ right `OrderPanel` overlay |
| 3 | Accept order | Status ŌåÆ accepted |
| 4 | Mark ready ŌåÆ completed | Workflow buttons |

##### J-SF-ORD-2 ŌĆö Assign driver from storefront

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Order panel open | Shows pickup/dropoff (`DisplayPlace`) |
| 2 | Assign driver | Modal if unassigned; change if assigned |
| 3 | Dispatch | `dispatchOrder` (FleetOps permission) |

##### J-SF-ORD-3 ŌĆö Bulk cancel rush hour backlog

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Multi-select rows | Bulk toolbar |
| 2 | Bulk cancel | `bulkCancelOrders` confirm |
| 3 | Toast + refresh | Selection cleared |

---

#### 3. Orders list (LLR-SF-ORD-LIST)

**REQ-SF-ORD-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront list order` (also uses FleetOps order permissions for actions)

##### 3.1 Layout

`Layout::Section::Header` + `FiltersPicker` + `VisibleColumnPicker` + `Table` + pagination

**Status tabs (enriched):** filter by fulfillment state (e.g. pending, in progress, completed)

##### 3.2 Table columns (align with FleetOps + storefront fields)

| # | i18n / label | valuePath | Notes |
|---|--------------|-----------|-------|
| 1 | Order ID | `public_id` | link ŌåÆ view |
| 2 | Internal ID | `internal_id` | |
| 3 | Customer | `customer.name` | |
| 4 | Pickup | `pickupName` | |
| 5 | Dropoff | `dropoffName` | |
| 6 | Driver | `driver_assigned` / name | |
| 7 | Status | `status` | colored badge |
| 8 | Items | `item_count` | |
| 9 | Total | `transaction_amount` | currency |
| 10 | Tracking | `tracking_number.tracking_number` | |
| 11 | Created | `createdAt` | |
| 12 | Updated | `updatedAt` | |

##### 3.3 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `internal_id`, `payload`, `tracking_number`, `facilitator`, `customer`, `driver`, `pickup`, `dropoff`, `created_by`, `updated_by`, `status`

##### 3.4 Header / row / bulk actions

| Action | Handler | Permission |
|--------|---------|------------|
| Export | export | storefront / fleet-ops |
| View | `viewOrder` | `storefront view order` |
| Cancel | `cancelOrder` | `fleet-ops cancel order` |
| Dispatch | `dispatchOrder` | `fleet-ops dispatch order` |
| Delete | `deleteOrder` | `fleet-ops delete order` |
| Bulk delete | `bulkDeleteOrders` | delete |
| Bulk cancel | `bulkCancelOrders` | cancel |
| Bulk dispatch | `bulkDispatchOrders` | dispatch |

**UX:** Bulk toolbar when `table.selectedRows` present; show selection count.

---

#### 4. Order view ŌĆö OrderPanel (LLR-SF-ORD-VIEW)

**REQ-SF-ORD-VIEW-001** URL: `/storefront/orders/:public_id/view`  
**Permission:** `storefront view order`

##### 4.1 Layout

**Right overlay panel** (`OrderPanel`) ŌĆö not full-page route; list remains visible underneath.

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö¼ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé Orders table (dimmed)         Ōöé OrderPanel       Ōöé
Ōöé                             Ōöé [X] Order #123   Ōöé
Ōöé                             Ōöé Status badge     Ōöé
Ōöé                             Ōöé Customer         Ōöé
Ōöé                             Ōöé Pickup / Dropoff Ōöé
Ōöé                             Ōöé Line items       Ōöé
Ōöé                             Ōöé [Accept][Ready]ŌĆ” Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌö┤ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

**Mobile:** Full-screen drawer from bottom.

##### 4.2 Model load

Same includes as FleetOps detail:

`payload`, `driverAssigned`, `orderConfig`, `customer`, `facilitator`, `trackingStatuses`, `trackingNumber`, `purchaseRate`, `comments`, `files`

##### 4.3 Panel sections

| Section | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Header | order #, status, close |
| Customer | name, phone, email |
| Places | `DisplayPlace` pickup + dropoff |
| Items | line items, modifiers, notes |
| Payment | total, method, paid status |
| Tracking | statuses timeline |
| Driver | assigned driver card + assign/change CTA |

##### 4.4 Fulfillment actions (i18n keys from spec)

| Button | i18n key | When |
|--------|----------|------|
| Accept order | `storefront.component.widget.orders.accept-order` | pending |
| Mark as ready | `...mark-as-ready` | accepted |
| Mark completed | `...mark-as-completed` | ready |
| Assign driver | `...assign-driver` | no driver |
| Change driver | `...change-driver` | `has_driver_assigned` |

##### 4.5 Panel UX (FO-SF-ORD-PANEL-001)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-ORD-PANEL-001 | ESC closes panel; focus trap |
| FO-SF-ORD-PANEL-002 | Realtime updates merge into open panel (socket) |
| FO-SF-ORD-PANEL-003 | Action buttons disabled for terminal statuses |
| FO-SF-ORD-PANEL-004 | `transitionBack` returns to list preserving filters |

---

#### 5. Create / edit order (LLR-SF-ORD-FORM)

Routes: `new`, `edit` ŌĆö manual order entry for phone/walk-in orders.

| Section | Fields |
|---------|--------|
| Customer | select or quick-create |
| Items | product picker, quantities |
| Delivery | pickup/dropoff places, scheduled time |
| Payment | method, amount |
| Notes | internal + customer-facing |

**Permissions:** `storefront create order` / update equivalents + FleetOps order permissions.

---

#### 6. Permissions matrix

| Action | storefront | fleet-ops |
|--------|------------|-----------|
| List | list order | view order |
| View panel | view order | view order |
| Dispatch | ŌĆö | dispatch order |
| Cancel | ŌĆö | cancel order |
| Delete | ŌĆö | delete order |

**REQ:** Hide FleetOps actions when user lacks fleet-ops permission even on storefront route.

---

#### 7. Realtime

- Company channel may patch `order.driver_assigned`
- Open panel should refresh status without closing

---

#### 8. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-ORD-001 | List loads with filters |
| TC-SF-ORD-002 | Row opens OrderPanel |
| TC-SF-ORD-003 | Accept ŌåÆ ready ŌåÆ completed flow |
| TC-SF-ORD-004 | Assign driver modal |
| TC-SF-ORD-005 | Bulk cancel with confirm |
| TC-SF-ORD-006 | Bulk dispatch |
| TC-SF-ORD-007 | Export orders |
| TC-SF-ORD-008 | Panel closes on ESC |
| TC-SF-ORD-009 | No view permission blocked |
| TC-SF-ORD-010 | Realtime status update in panel |
| TC-SF-ORD-011 | Mobile full-screen drawer |
| TC-SF-ORD-012 | Create manual order |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-SF-ORD` / `TC-SF-ORD-*`*


### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-CUSTOMERS-NETWORKS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 48ŌĆō49 |
| **Mount** | `/storefront` |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

##### Customers (4 screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| C1 | Customers list | `/storefront/customers` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| C2 | Customer panel (view) | `/storefront/customers?view=:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| C3 | Edit customer | `/storefront/customers/edit/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |

##### Networks (6+ screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| N1 | Networks list | `/storefront/networks` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| N2 | Network overlay | `/storefront/networks/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| N3 | Overview tab | `.../network/index` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| N4 | Stores tab | `.../network/stores` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| N5 | Orders tab | `.../network/orders` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| N6 | Customers tab | `.../network/customers` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-SF-CU-1 ŌĆö Support: find customer and view history

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open customers | `store.query('customer')` |
| 2 | Filter by email/phone | Query params update table |
| 3 | Row click | `viewCustomer` ŌåÆ `CustomerPanel` overlay (`?view=`) |
| 4 | Review orders tab in panel | Linked orders for customer |

**Success:** Panel shows profile + order history without full page navigation.

##### J-SF-CU-2 ŌĆö Admin: edit customer profile

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Panel ŌåÆ Edit | Transition to edit route |
| 2 | Update name, phone, email, address | Form validation |
| 3 | Save | PATCH `customer` ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ back to list/panel |

##### J-SF-NW-1 ŌĆö Operator: create multi-store network

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Networks ŌåÆ New | `createNetwork` modal |
| 2 | Enter name, branding | POST `network` |
| 3 | Manage network | `manageNetwork` ŌåÆ overlay with tabs |

##### J-SF-NW-2 ŌĆö Network admin: invite stores

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Network overlay ŌåÆ Stores tab | List linked stores |
| 2 | Send invites | `sendInvites` modal ŌĆö email list |
| 3 | Confirm | API sends invitations; toast success |

##### J-SF-NW-3 ŌĆö Review network orders

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Orders tab | Filtered `order` query scoped to network |
| 2 | Row click | May deep-link to storefront order panel or FleetOps order |

---

#### 3. Customers list (LLR-SF-CU-LIST)

**REQ-SF-CU-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront list customer`  
**API:** `store.query('customer')`  
**Redirect:** Unauthorized ŌåÆ warning toast + `console.storefront`

##### 3.1 Layout

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé Section header: Customers          [Export]             Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé FiltersPicker Ōöé VisibleColumnPicker Ōöé Search            Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Paginated table (Layout::Resource::Tabular)             Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

##### 3.2 Query params

| Param | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `page`, `limit`, `sort` | Pagination |
| `query` | Global search |
| `public_id`, `internal_id` | ID filters |
| `phone`, `email`, `address` | Contact filters |
| `status` | Active/inactive |
| `created_by`, `updated_by` | Audit filters |

##### 3.3 Table columns (implement per Tabular pattern)

| # | i18n key (typical) | valuePath | Notes |
|---|-------------------|-----------|-------|
| 1 | column.name | `name` | Primary link ŌåÆ view |
| 2 | column.email | `email` | |
| 3 | column.phone | `phone` | |
| 4 | column.internal-id | `internal_id` | |
| 5 | column.status | `status` | Badge |
| 6 | column.orders-count | `orders_count` | If API provides |
| 7 | column.created-at | `created_at` | Formatted datetime |
| 8 | column.updated-at | `updated_at` | |
| 9 | actions.view | ŌĆö | `viewCustomer` |

##### 3.4 Header actions

| Label | Handler | Permission |
|-------|---------|------------|
| storefront.common.export | Export CSV | `storefront export customer` (if gated) |

##### 3.5 Row behavior

| Behavior | Requirement |
|----------|-------------|
| Row click | `viewCustomer` sets `?view=public_id` |
| Double-click | Same as row click |
| Empty | Illustration + ŌĆ£No customers yetŌĆØ |
| Loading | Table skeleton rows |

---

#### 4. CustomerPanel overlay (LLR-SF-CU-PANEL)

**REQ-SF-CU-VIEW-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront view customer`  
**Component:** `CustomerPanel` (right overlay, mirrors `OrderPanel` pattern)

##### 4.1 Panel structure

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé [├Ś] Customer name            Ōöé
Ōöé TabNavigation                Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Overview Ōöé Orders Ōöé (ext)    Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé {{outlet}} tab content       Ōöé
Ōöé [Edit] if permitted          Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

##### 4.2 Overview fields

| Field | Binding |
|-------|---------|
| Name | `customer.name` |
| Email | `customer.email` |
| Phone | `customer.phone` |
| Address | `customer.address` formatted |
| Internal ID | `customer.internal_id` |
| Status | `customer.status` |
| Created / Updated | timestamps |

##### 4.3 Panel UX (FO-SF-CU-PANEL-001ŌĆ”005)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-CU-PANEL-001 | Right overlay ~480px desktop; full-screen drawer mobile |
| FO-SF-CU-PANEL-002 | Close via ├Ś, ESC, backdrop click ŌåÆ `transitionBack` clears `?view` |
| FO-SF-CU-PANEL-003 | Edit button visible only if `storefront update customer` |
| FO-SF-CU-PANEL-004 | Tab change updates nested route without closing panel |
| FO-SF-CU-PANEL-005 | Deep-link: `/customers?view=:id` restores panel on load |

##### 4.4 Controller actions

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| `transitionBack` | Remove `view` QP; return to list |
| `onTabChanged` | Transition nested tab route |

---

#### 5. Customer edit (LLR-SF-CU-FORM)

**REQ-SF-CU-EDIT-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront update customer`

##### 5.1 Form fields

| Field | Type | Validation |
|-------|------|------------|
| Name | text | required |
| Email | email | format |
| Phone | tel | optional |
| Address | address picker / text | optional |
| Status | select | enum from API |
| Notes | textarea | optional |

##### 5.2 Save flow

1. User submits ŌåÆ primary button loading state  
2. `crud` or direct `customer.save()`  
3. Success ŌåÆ `notifications.success` ŌåÆ navigate back  
4. Error ŌåÆ `notifications.serverError`  
5. Unsaved navigate away ŌåÆ confirm modal (`common.continue-without-saving`)

---

#### 6. Networks list (LLR-SF-NW-LIST)

**REQ-SF-NW-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront list network`  
**API:** `store.query('network')`

##### 6.1 Layout

Card grid or table (Ember uses image cards with dropdown per row):

| Element | Binding |
|---------|---------|
| Network logo | `network.logo_url` |
| Name | `network.name` |
| Store count | `network.stores_count` |
| Status | `network.status` |

##### 6.2 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`

##### 6.3 Header actions

| Label | Handler | Permission |
|-------|---------|------------|
| storefront.common.new | `createNetwork` | `storefront create network` |
| (row menu) Manage | `manageNetwork` | `storefront view network` |
| (row menu) Send invites | `sendInvites` | invite permission |
| (row menu) Delete | `deleteNetwork` | `storefront delete network` + confirm |

##### 6.4 Create network modal

| Field | Required |
|-------|----------|
| Name | yes |
| Description | no |
| Logo upload | no |
| Default currency / locale | if exposed |

**Flow:** `modalsManager` ŌåÆ `startLoading()` ŌåÆ POST ŌåÆ `done()` ŌåÆ refresh list.

---

#### 7. Network overlay (LLR-SF-NW-DETAIL)

**REQ-SF-NW-VIEW-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront view network`  
**Layout:** `Overlay` right panel with `TabNavigation`

##### 7.1 Tabs

| Tab | Route suffix | Content |
|-----|--------------|---------|
| Overview | `index` | Network metadata, stats |
| Stores | `stores` | Linked storefronts; invite CTA |
| Orders | `orders` | Orders across network stores |
| Customers | `customers` | Customers shared/linked to network |

##### 7.2 Overview tab fields

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Name, slug, status | |
| Owner / created by | |
| Store count, order volume | KPI cards if API provides |
| Branding preview | logo, colors |

##### 7.3 Stores tab

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| Send invites | `sendInvites` ŌĆö multi-email input |
| Remove store | confirm + DELETE link |
| View store | external or storefront settings link |

##### 7.4 Orders tab

- Reuse order table columns from this document  
- Scope: `network_id` filter on query  
- Row click: open OrderPanel or transition to order view

##### 7.5 Customers tab

- Subset of customer list columns  
- Scoped to network membership  
- Row click: CustomerPanel with network context

##### 7.6 Overlay UX (FO-SF-NW-OVERLAY-001ŌĆ”004)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-NW-OVERLAY-001 | Overlay width ~560px; scroll body independently |
| FO-SF-NW-OVERLAY-002 | `transitionBack` / `exit` closes and returns to card grid |
| FO-SF-NW-OVERLAY-003 | Delete network warns about store unlinking |
| FO-SF-NW-OVERLAY-004 | Mobile: full viewport overlay |

---

#### 8. Permissions matrix

| Action | Permission slug |
|--------|-----------------|
| List customers | `storefront list customer` |
| View customer panel | `storefront view customer` |
| Update customer | `storefront update customer` |
| Export customers | `storefront export customer` (if used) |
| List networks | `storefront list network` |
| Create network | `storefront create network` |
| View network overlay | `storefront view network` |
| Update network | `storefront update network` |
| Delete network | `storefront delete network` |
| Send invites | `storefront invite network` or equivalent |

**REQ:** Hide actions when `abilities.cannot(...)`; route `beforeModel` blocks entire screen.

---

#### 9. APIs & models

| Model | Endpoints (typical) |
|-------|---------------------|
| `customer` | GET list, GET record, PATCH |
| `network` | GET list, POST, GET, PATCH, DELETE |
| `network-store` | nested under network |
| `order` | filtered by network on Orders tab |

**Services:** `crud`, `fetch`, `filters`, `modalsManager`, `notifications`, `intl`, `hostRouter`

---

#### 10. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-CU-001 | Customer list loads with filters |
| TC-SF-CU-002 | Row opens CustomerPanel via `?view=` |
| TC-SF-CU-003 | Panel ESC closes and clears QP |
| TC-SF-CU-004 | Edit saves and shows toast |
| TC-SF-CU-005 | Export downloads CSV |
| TC-SF-CU-006 | No list permission ŌåÆ redirect |
| TC-SF-CU-007 | Mobile full-screen panel |
| TC-SF-NW-001 | Networks grid/list loads |
| TC-SF-NW-002 | Create network modal success |
| TC-SF-NW-003 | Manage opens overlay with 4 tabs |
| TC-SF-NW-004 | Send invites validates emails |
| TC-SF-NW-005 | Delete network confirm + refresh |
| TC-SF-NW-006 | Network orders tab scoped correctly |
| TC-SF-NW-007 | Network customers tab opens panel |
| TC-SF-NW-008 | Unauthorized create hidden |

---
