### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-CATALOGS-PROMOTIONS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 48ŌĆō49 |
| **Mount** | `/storefront` |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

##### Catalogs (2 screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| CAT1 | Catalogs hub | `/storefront/catalogs` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| CAT2 | Catalog list/manage | `/storefront/catalogs/` | (screen spec in this volume) |

##### Promotions (2 screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| PR1 | Promotions hub | `/storefront/promotions` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| PR2 | Push notifications | `/storefront/promotions/push-notifications` | (screen spec in this volume) |

##### Coupons (route only ŌĆö no per-screen spec in repo)

| Route | URL | Notes |
|-------|-----|-------|
| Coupons | `/storefront/coupons` | See COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES |

**Related:** Products hub assigns products to catalogs ŌĆö see this document.

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-SF-CAT-1 ŌĆö Merchandiser: create seasonal catalog

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Catalogs ŌåÆ New | `createCatalog` modal |
| 2 | Name, description, status, product assignment | POST `catalog` |
| 3 | Products engine | Link products to catalog via product edit |

**Success:** Catalog appears in list; products filterable by catalog in storefront API.

##### J-SF-CAT-2 ŌĆö Export catalog for partner

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Select catalog row | |
| 2 | Export | CSV/JSON download |
| 3 | Share file | Out of band |

##### J-SF-PR-1 ŌĆö Marketing: broadcast push notification

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Promotions ŌåÆ Push notifications | Form loads |
| 2 | Enter title + body | Character limits per platform |
| 3 | Select audience | All customers or `ModelSelectMultiple` subset |
| 4 | Send | API dispatches push; success toast |

##### J-SF-PR-2 ŌĆö Ops: manage coupons (when enabled)

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Coupons list | CRUD table |
| 2 | Create code | % or fixed discount, expiry, usage limits |
| 3 | Deactivate | Status ŌåÆ inactive |

---

#### 3. Catalogs list (LLR-SF-CAT-LIST)

**REQ-SF-CAT-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront list catalog`  
**API:** `store.query('catalog')`  
**Services:** `storefront`, `crud`, `modalsManager`, `notifications`, `hostRouter`

##### 3.1 Layout

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé Catalogs                    [New] [Export] [Edit] [Del]   Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Table or card list of catalogs                          Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

> Note: Edit/Delete may apply to **selected** catalog row (not global header-only).

##### 3.2 Table columns (typical)

| # | Column | valuePath | Notes |
|---|--------|-----------|-------|
| 1 | Name | `name` | Primary |
| 2 | Status | `status` | active/draft badge |
| 3 | Products count | `products_count` | If API provides |
| 4 | Created | `created_at` | |
| 5 | Updated | `updated_at` | |

##### 3.3 Header / row actions

| Label (i18n) | Handler | Permission |
|--------------|---------|------------|
| storefront.common.new | `createCatalog` | create catalog |
| storefront.common.export | export | export catalog |
| storefront.common.edit | `editCatalog` | update catalog |
| storefront.common.delete | `deleteCatalog` | delete catalog + confirm |

##### 3.4 Create / edit catalog modal

| Field | Type | Validation |
|-------|------|------------|
| Name | text | required |
| Description | textarea | optional |
| Status | select | enum |
| Slug / public id | text | unique if shown |
| Image / banner | file upload | optional |

**Flow:** `modalsManager` ŌåÆ loading ŌåÆ POST/PATCH ŌåÆ toast ŌåÆ refresh list.

##### 3.5 Catalog UX (FO-SF-CAT-001ŌĆ”004)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-CAT-001 | Delete confirms product unlinking impact |
| FO-SF-CAT-002 | Empty list CTA ŌåÆ create first catalog |
| FO-SF-CAT-003 | Cannot delete catalog referenced as default store catalog without warning |
| FO-SF-CAT-004 | Export shows progress for large catalogs |

---

#### 4. Promotions hub (LLR-SF-PR-HUB)

**REQ-SF-PR-HUB-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront view promotions`  
**Redirect:** Unauthorized ŌåÆ `console` (host), not storefront home

##### 4.1 Sub-navigation

Parent route (screen spec in this volume) exposes child:

| Child | Route | Label |
|-------|-------|-------|
| Push notifications | `promotions.push-notifications` | i18n push notifications |

**Future/extension:** Coupons may appear as sibling nav item when route is active.

##### 4.2 Hub UX

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-PR-HUB-001 | Sidebar or tab strip under promotions mount |
| FO-SF-PR-HUB-002 | Active child highlighted |
| FO-SF-PR-HUB-003 | Mobile: stacked nav pills |

---

#### 5. Push notifications (LLR-SF-PR-PUSH)

**REQ-SF-PR-PUSH-001**  
**URL:** `/storefront/promotions/push-notifications`  
**Permission:** `storefront send push notifications`

##### 5.1 Form fields

| Label (i18n key) | Binding | Type | Notes |
|------------------|---------|------|-------|
| push-notifications.title-label | `title` | text | max length ~65 |
| push-notifications.body-label | `body` | textarea | max length ~240 |
| push-notifications.customers-label | `customers` | `ModelSelectMultiple` | optional segment |
| (toggle) | `send_to_all` | Toggle | when true, disable customer picker |

##### 5.2 Actions

| Label | Handler | UX |
|-------|---------|-----|
| send-button | submit send | Primary; loading during API |
| (preview) | optional | Show title/body preview card |

##### 5.3 Validation

| Rule | Feedback |
|------|----------|
| Title required | warning toast |
| Body required | warning toast |
| No audience when not send-all | warning toast |
| API failure | `serverError` |

##### 5.4 Send flow

1. Validate form  
2. Confirm modal if audience > N (optional product rule)  
3. POST push campaign endpoint  
4. Success toast with recipient count  
5. Clear form or keep for audit log link  

##### 5.5 Push UX (FO-SF-PR-PUSH-001ŌĆ”005)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-PR-PUSH-001 | Character counter on title/body |
| FO-SF-PR-PUSH-002 | `send_to_all` toggle disables customer multiselect |
| FO-SF-PR-PUSH-003 | Disable send button while in flight |
| FO-SF-PR-PUSH-004 | No permission ŌåÆ route blocked in `beforeModel` |
| FO-SF-PR-PUSH-005 | Success does not navigate away (stay on form) |

---

#### 6. Coupons

Coupons moved to dedicated module: **this document** ┬¦3. Screen spec: (screen spec in this volume).

---

#### 7. Permissions matrix

| Action | Permission slug |
|--------|-----------------|
| List catalogs | `storefront list catalog` |
| Create / update / delete catalog | `storefront create/update/delete catalog` |
| View promotions hub | `storefront view promotions` |
| Send push | `storefront send push notifications` |
| Coupons | `storefront list/create/update/delete coupon` ŌĆö see COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES |

---

#### 8. APIs & models

| Model | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `catalog` | Catalogs index CRUD |
| `customer` | Push notification audience picker |
| `coupon` | Coupons route (when implemented) |

---

#### 9. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-CAT-001 | Catalog list loads |
| TC-SF-CAT-002 | Create catalog modal success |
| TC-SF-CAT-003 | Edit catalog updates row |
| TC-SF-CAT-004 | Delete catalog confirm |
| TC-SF-CAT-005 | Export downloads |
| TC-SF-CAT-006 | No list permission redirect |
| TC-SF-PR-001 | Promotions hub shows push child nav |
| TC-SF-PR-002 | Push form validation |
| TC-SF-PR-003 | Send to all customers |
| TC-SF-PR-004 | Send to selected customers |
| TC-SF-PR-005 | No send permission blocked |
| TC-SF-PR-006 | Character limits enforced |
| TC-SF-COUPON-001ŌĆ”005 | See COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES module |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-SF-CAT-*` / `REQ-SF-PR-*` / `TC-SF-CAT-*` / `TC-SF-PR-*`*


### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Doc 49 (Storefront routes) |
| **Related** | CATALOGS-PROMOTIONS, FOODTRUCKS-CMS |


---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| C1 | Coupons list | `/storefront/coupons` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| B1 | Broadcast composer | `/storefront/broadcast` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| P1 | CMS pages | `/storefront/pages` | (screen spec in this volume) |

**Sidebar:** Under Storefront engine ŌĆö Coupons near Promotions; Broadcast as marketing; Pages under CMS (with food trucks / content).

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-SF-COUPON-1 ŌĆö Create discount code

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open Coupons | List loads with filters |
| 2 | New | Modal with code, type, value, dates |
| 3 | Save | `POST coupons` ŌåÆ row in table |
| 4 | Customer redeems | `uses_count` increments (API) |

##### J-SF-BROADCAST-1 ŌĆö Email/SMS blast

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open Broadcast | Composer form |
| 2 | Select channels + audience | Validation |
| 3 | Send test | Test to current user |
| 4 | Confirm send | Bulk API; success toast |

##### J-SF-PAGE-1 ŌĆö Publish CMS page

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Pages list | Filter draft/published |
| 2 | New / edit | Rich body + slug |
| 3 | Preview | Consumer URL preview |
| 4 | Publish | `status=published` |

---

#### 3. Coupons (LLR-SF-COUPON)

**REQ-SF-COUPON-LIST-001**  
**URL:** `/storefront/coupons`  
**Permission:** `storefront list coupon`

##### 3.1 List columns

| Column | Field | Notes |
|--------|-------|-------|
| Code | `code` | case-insensitive search |
| Type | `discount_type` | percent / fixed |
| Value | `value` | format per type |
| Uses | `uses_count` / `max_uses` | show `3/100` |
| Validity | `valid_from`ŌĆō`valid_until` | expired row muted |
| Status | `status` | badge |

##### 3.2 Create / edit modal

| Field | Validation |
|-------|------------|
| code | required, unique |
| discount_type | required |
| value | > 0; percent Ōēż 100 |
| valid_until | Ōēź valid_from |
| max_uses | optional positive int |

##### 3.3 Row actions

| Action | Permission | Notes |
|--------|------------|-------|
| Edit | update coupon | modal |
| Delete | delete coupon | confirm; warn if uses_count > 0 |
| Export | export coupon | CSV |

##### 3.4 Coupon UX (FO-SF-COUPON-001ŌĆ”004)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-COUPON-001 | Code auto-uppercase on blur |
| FO-SF-COUPON-002 | Expired coupons sort last by default |
| FO-SF-COUPON-003 | Percent shows `%` suffix in table |
| FO-SF-COUPON-004 | No permission ŌåÆ redirect storefront home |

---

#### 4. Broadcast (LLR-SF-BROADCAST)

**REQ-SF-BROADCAST-001**  
**URL:** `/storefront/broadcast`  
**Distinct from:** push notifications at `/storefront/promotions/push-notifications`

##### 4.1 Form fields

| Field | Required when |
|-------|----------------|
| channels.email | optional toggle |
| channels.sms | optional toggle |
| subject | email channel on |
| body | always |
| send_to_all | default false |
| customers[] | not send_to_all |

**REQ-SF-BROADCAST-VAL-001:** At least one channel must be selected.

##### 4.2 Actions

| Action | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| sendTest | Sends to `currentUser` email/phone |
| sendBroadcast | Confirm modal with recipient count |
| preview | Optional HTML preview (email) |

##### 4.3 Broadcast UX (FO-SF-BROADCAST-001ŌĆ”005)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-BROADCAST-001 | SMS body character counter (160-segment) |
| FO-SF-BROADCAST-002 | send_to_all disables customer picker |
| FO-SF-BROADCAST-003 | Send disabled while task running |
| FO-SF-BROADCAST-004 | Success stays on page (reset form optional) |
| FO-SF-BROADCAST-005 | Confirm shows estimated recipient count |

---

#### 5. CMS Pages (LLR-SF-PAGE)

**REQ-SF-PAGE-LIST-001**  
**URL:** `/storefront/pages`

##### 5.1 List

| Column | Field |
|--------|-------|
| Title | `title` |
| Slug | `slug` |
| Status | `status` |
| Updated | `updated_at` |

##### 5.2 Editor

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| title | required |
| slug | unique; sync from title |
| body | rich text |
| meta_description | SEO |
| featured_image | upload |
| status | draft / published |
| published_at | set on publish |

##### 5.3 Page UX (FO-SF-PAGE-001ŌĆ”004)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-PAGE-001 | Slug uniqueness validated before save |
| FO-SF-PAGE-002 | Preview opens consumer URL in new tab |
| FO-SF-PAGE-003 | Unsaved navigate away ŌåÆ confirm |
| FO-SF-PAGE-004 | Delete published page ŌåÆ confirm + cache warning |

---

#### 6. Permissions matrix

| Action | Permission slug |
|--------|-----------------|
| List coupons | `storefront list coupon` |
| CRUD coupon | `storefront create/update/delete coupon` |
| View broadcast | `storefront view broadcast` |
| Send broadcast | `storefront send broadcast` |
| List pages | `storefront list page` |
| CRUD page | `storefront create/update/delete page` |

---

#### 7. APIs & models

| Model | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `coupon` | Coupons CRUD |
| `customer` | Broadcast audience |
| `storefront-page` / `page` | CMS pages |

| Endpoint (typical) | Method | Purpose |
|--------------------|--------|---------|
| `/storefront/coupons` | GET/POST | list/create |
| `/storefront/coupons/:id` | PATCH/DELETE | update/delete |
| `/storefront/broadcast` | POST | send |
| `/storefront/broadcast/test` | POST | test send |
| `/storefront/pages` | GET/POST | list/create |

---

#### 8. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-COUPON-001 | Coupons list loads |
| TC-SF-COUPON-002 | Create coupon success |
| TC-SF-COUPON-003 | Duplicate code rejected |
| TC-SF-COUPON-004 | Delete with uses warns |
| TC-SF-COUPON-005 | No list permission blocked |
| TC-SF-BROADCAST-001 | Channel validation |
| TC-SF-BROADCAST-002 | Send to all |
| TC-SF-BROADCAST-003 | Selected customers |
| TC-SF-BROADCAST-004 | Test send toast |
| TC-SF-BROADCAST-005 | No send permission blocked |
| TC-SF-PAGE-001 | Pages list loads |
| TC-SF-PAGE-002 | Create draft page |
| TC-SF-PAGE-003 | Publish sets published_at |
| TC-SF-PAGE-004 | Preview opens URL |
| TC-SF-PAGE-005 | Slug conflict error |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-SF-COUPON-*` / `REQ-SF-BROADCAST-*` / `REQ-SF-PAGE-*`*


### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-FOODTRUCKS-CMS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 47ŌĆō49 |
| **Mount** | `/storefront` |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

##### Food trucks (documented ŌĆö 2 screen specs)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| FT1 | Food trucks hub | `/storefront/food-trucks` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| FT2 | Food trucks list | `/storefront/food-trucks/` | (screen spec in this volume) |

##### Related routes (separate module)

| Route | URL | Module |
|-------|-----|--------|
| Broadcast | `/storefront/broadcast` | COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES |
| CMS pages | `/storefront/pages` | COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES |

**Virtual extensions:** `/storefront/:section/:slug` for plugin pages (doc 49) ŌĆö see COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES ┬¦5.3.

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-SF-FT-1 ŌĆö Operator: register mobile kitchen

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Food trucks ŌåÆ New | `createFoodTruck` modal |
| 2 | Name, location, hours, image | POST `food-truck` |
| 3 | Link catalog | `Catalogs` action ŌåÆ assign catalog |

##### J-SF-FT-2 ŌĆö Manage fleet of trucks

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | List/grid of trucks | `store.query('food-truck')` |
| 2 | Edit / delete | `editFoodTruck`, `deleteFoodTruck` |
| 3 | Export | CSV for ops review |

---

#### 3. Food trucks list (LLR-SF-FT-LIST)

**REQ-SF-FT-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront list food-truck`  
**API:** `store.query('food-truck')`  
**Services:** `storefront`, `crud`, `modalsManager`, `notifications`, `hostRouter`

##### 3.1 Layout

Card grid or table (template uses `Image`, `Badge` ŌĆö card layout likely):

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé Food Trucks    [New] [Export] [Edit] [Delete] [Catalogs]Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Grid of truck cards (image, name, status badge)         Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

##### 3.2 Card / row fields (typical)

| Element | Binding |
|---------|---------|
| Image | `food_truck.image_url` |
| Name | `food_truck.name` |
| Status | `food_truck.status` (Badge) |
| Location | `food_truck.location` or place |
| Catalog | linked catalog name |

##### 3.3 Header actions

| Label (i18n) | Handler | Notes |
|--------------|---------|-------|
| storefront.common.new | `createFoodTruck` | Modal or route |
| storefront.common.export | export | |
| storefront.common.edit | `editFoodTruck` | Selected row |
| storefront.common.delete | `deleteFoodTruck` | Confirm |
| Catalogs | navigate / modal | Link truck to product catalog |

##### 3.4 Create / edit food truck modal

| Field | Type | Validation |
|-------|------|------------|
| Name | text | required |
| Description | textarea | optional |
| Status | select | active/inactive |
| Location / place | place picker | optional |
| Operating hours | schedule | optional |
| Image | upload | optional |
| Catalog | select | link to `catalog` model |
| Phone / contact | text | optional |

**Flow:** `modalsManager` ŌåÆ POST/PATCH ŌåÆ success toast ŌåÆ refresh grid.

##### 3.5 Food truck UX (FO-SF-FT-001ŌĆ”004)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-FT-001 | Card grid responsive: 1 col mobile, 2ŌĆō3 desktop |
| FO-SF-FT-002 | Delete warns if active orders tied to truck |
| FO-SF-FT-003 | Catalogs action disabled without `storefront list catalog` |
| FO-SF-FT-004 | Empty state CTA ŌåÆ create first truck |

---

#### 4. Broadcast & CMS pages

See **this document** for broadcast composer and CMS pages (including virtual extension routes).

---

#### 5. Permissions matrix

| Resource | Verbs |
|----------|-------|
| food-truck | list, create, update, delete (prefix `storefront`) |

---

#### 6. APIs & models

| Model | Usage |
|-------|-------|
| `food-truck` | List CRUD |
| `catalog` | Linked via Catalogs action |

---

#### 7. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-FT-001 | Food trucks list loads |
| TC-SF-FT-002 | Create food truck |
| TC-SF-FT-003 | Edit updates card |
| TC-SF-FT-004 | Delete with confirm |
| TC-SF-FT-005 | Catalogs link action |
| TC-SF-FT-006 | Export |
| TC-SF-FT-007 | No list permission redirect |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-SF-FT-*`; broadcast/pages: COUPONS-BROADCAST-PAGES*


### Feature spec: STOREFRONT-SETTINGS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 47ŌĆō49 |
| **Mount** | `/storefront/settings` |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Tab / screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------------|-----|------|
| S0 | Settings parent | `/storefront/settings` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S1 | Store profile (default) | `/storefront/settings/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Locations | `/storefront/settings/locations` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | Payment gateways | `/storefront/settings/gateways` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | API keys | `/storefront/settings/api` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S5 | Notifications | `/storefront/settings/notifications` | (screen spec in this volume) |

**Shared component:** `SettingsContainer` ŌĆö wraps all tabs with consistent padding and save affordances.

---

#### 2. Settings hub navigation (LLR-SF-SET-HUB)

**REQ-SF-SET-HUB-001**  
**Permission:** `storefront view settings`  
**Redirect:** Unauthorized ŌåÆ `console` (host)

##### 2.1 Tab strip (parent screen)

| Tab route | Label (typical i18n) |
|-----------|----------------------|
| `settings.index` | Store / General |
| `settings.locations` | Locations |
| `settings.gateways` | Payment gateways |
| `settings.api` | API |
| `settings.notifications` | Notifications |

##### 2.2 Hub UX (FO-SF-SET-HUB-001ŌĆ”003)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-SET-HUB-001 | Horizontal tabs on desktop; dropdown on mobile |
| FO-SF-SET-HUB-002 | Active tab syncs with URL (deep-linkable) |
| FO-SF-SET-HUB-003 | Unsaved changes on one tab do not auto-save when switching tabs ŌĆö warn user |

---

#### 3. User journeys

##### J-SF-SET-1 ŌĆö Merchant: configure store branding

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Settings ŌåÆ General | Load store model |
| 2 | Upload logo + backdrop | `FileDropzone` queue |
| 3 | Set currency, phone, social links | |
| 4 | Save changes | PATCH store ŌåÆ success toast |

##### J-SF-SET-2 ŌĆö Ops: add pickup location + hours

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Locations tab | `store.query('store-location')` |
| 2 | New location | `createNewLocation` |
| 3 | Add hours | `ScheduleManager` ŌĆö `addHours` / `removeHours` |
| 4 | Save | Location visible to consumers |

##### J-SF-SET-3 ŌĆö Finance: connect payment gateway

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Gateways tab | List `gateway` records |
| 2 | Create gateway | `createGateway` modal |
| 3 | Copy callback/return URLs | Display read-only URLs for provider config |

##### J-SF-SET-4 ŌĆö Developer: rotate store API key

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | API tab | Show store key |
| 2 | Click to reveal | `ClickToReveal` component |
| 3 | Regenerate (if exposed) | Confirm breakage warning |

##### J-SF-SET-5 ŌĆö Alerts: Slack/email order notifications

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Notifications tab | `notification-channel` list |
| 2 | New channel | `createChannel` |
| 3 | Configure webhook/email | Test ping optional |

---

#### 4. Store profile tab (LLR-SF-SET-GENERAL)

**REQ-SF-SET-GENERAL-001**  
**URL:** `/storefront/settings/`

##### 4.1 Form fields (from template)

| Field (i18n) | Binding | Type |
|--------------|---------|------|
| Description | `@model.description` | textarea |
| Tags | tags | `TagInput` |
| Currency | currency | `CurrencySelect` |
| Phone | `@model.phone` | `PhoneInput` |
| Website | website | text |
| Facebook / Instagram / Twitter | social URLs | text |
| Logo | logo | `FileUpload` / dropzone |
| Backdrop | backdrop | `FileUpload` |
| New order alert | alert toggle/select | per template |
| Name display | `name-select` | select |
| Default order config | `@model.order_config_uuid` | select |

##### 4.2 Checkout / ops options (conditional toggles)

Shown when `@model.options.*` flags exist:

| Option flag | UI |
|-------------|-----|
| `tax_enabled` | Tax toggle + related fields |
| `required_checkout_min` | Minimum order `MoneyInput` |
| `require_pod` | Proof-of-delivery toggle |
| `integrated_vendors_enabled` | Integrated vendors toggle |

##### 4.3 File upload UX

| State | UI |
|-------|-----|
| `dropzone.active` | Highlight drop target |
| `queue.files.length` | Show `FileRecord` list per file |
| `isUploading` | `PageLoader` / disabled save |
| Upload complete | Preview thumbnail |

##### 4.4 Save

| Label | Handler |
|-------|---------|
| storefront.settings.index.save-changes | PATCH store model |

**Validation:** Required phone/currency per API; show `serverError` on failure.

---

#### 5. Locations tab (LLR-SF-SET-LOC)

**REQ-SF-SET-LOC-001**  
**API:** `store.query('store-location')`

##### 5.1 List / cards

Each location panel includes:

| Element | Notes |
|---------|-------|
| Address / map pin | text-location action |
| Hours | `ScheduleManager` component |
| Edit | `edit` action |
| Delete | `removeStoreLocation` + confirm |

##### 5.2 Actions

| Handler | Behavior |
|---------|----------|
| `createNewLocation` | Modal or inline form |
| `addHours` / `removeHours` | Schedule rows |
| `removeStoreLocation` | DELETE with confirm |

##### 5.3 ScheduleManager UX

- ŌĆ£Add hoursŌĆØ button adds day/open-close row  
- Validate close > open  
- Support multiple intervals per day if API allows  

---

#### 6. Payment gateways tab (LLR-SF-SET-GW)

**REQ-SF-SET-GW-001**  
**API:** `store.query('gateway')`  
**Note:** Distinct from Ledger engine gateways ŌĆö storefront consumer checkout only.

##### 6.1 Gateway card fields

| Field (i18n) | Purpose |
|--------------|---------|
| gateway-name | Display name |
| gateway-code | Provider code |
| callback-url | Webhook/callback (read-only copy) |
| return-url | Redirect after payment |
| Dynamic keys | `smart-humanize` credential fields |

##### 6.2 Actions

| Label | Handler | Permission |
|-------|---------|------------|
| create-new-gateway | `createGateway` | `storefront create gateway` |
| Edit Gateway | `editGateway` | `storefront update gateway` |
| delete-payment-gateway | `deleteGateway` | `storefront delete gateway` |

Template uses `{{#if (can "storefront update gateway")}}` and delete variant ŌĆö hide when `cannot`.

##### 6.3 Gateway UX (FO-SF-SET-GW-001ŌĆ”003)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-SET-GW-001 | Callback/return URLs copy-to-clipboard |
| FO-SF-SET-GW-002 | Empty state ŌåÆ create first gateway CTA |
| FO-SF-SET-GW-003 | Secrets never logged; mask on edit |

---

#### 7. API tab (LLR-SF-SET-API)

**REQ-SF-SET-API-001**  
**URL:** `/storefront/settings/api`

##### 7.1 Fields

| Field (i18n) | Component |
|--------------|-----------|
| storefront.settings.api.store-key | `ClickToReveal` |

##### 7.2 UX

- Key hidden by default  
- Reveal requires explicit click (audit log if API supports)  
- Regenerate (if present) uses confirm modal warning integrators  

---

#### 8. Notifications tab (LLR-SF-SET-NOTIF)

**REQ-SF-SET-NOTIF-001**  
**API:** `store.query('notification-channel')`

##### 8.1 Channel list

| Action | Handler |
|--------|---------|
| new-channel | `createChannel` |
| edit | `editChannel` |
| delete | `deleteChannel` + confirm |

##### 8.2 Channel form (modal)

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Name | e.g. ŌĆ£Kitchen SlackŌĆØ |
| Type | email, webhook, sms, etc. |
| Config | URL, headers, recipients |
| Events | order.created, order.ready, ŌĆ” (checkboxes) |

---

#### 9. Permissions matrix

| Action | Permission slug |
|--------|-----------------|
| View settings hub | `storefront view settings` |
| Update store profile | `storefront update settings` or `update store` |
| Manage locations | `storefront create/update/delete store-location` |
| Gateways | `storefront create/update/delete gateway` |
| API key view | `storefront view api` (verify) |
| Notification channels | `storefront create/update/delete notification-channel` |

---

#### 10. Cross-cutting UX

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-SF-SET-001 | All tabs use `SettingsContainer` max-width ~960px |
| FO-SF-SET-002 | Save button sticky footer on long forms |
| FO-SF-SET-003 | `afterModel` secondary load ŌĆö show skeleton until complete |
| FO-SF-SET-004 | Success toast on every save |
| FO-SF-SET-005 | Unsaved navigate away ŌåÆ confirm dialog |

---

#### 11. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-SF-SET-001 | Settings hub loads 5 tabs |
| TC-SF-SET-002 | Unauthorized redirect |
| TC-SF-SET-003 | Save store profile |
| TC-SF-SET-004 | Logo upload queue + preview |
| TC-SF-SET-005 | Toggle tax_enabled shows fields |
| TC-SF-SET-006 | Create location + hours |
| TC-SF-SET-007 | Delete location confirm |
| TC-SF-SET-008 | Create payment gateway |
| TC-SF-SET-009 | Gateway edit hidden without permission |
| TC-SF-SET-010 | API key click-to-reveal |
| TC-SF-SET-011 | Create notification channel |
| TC-SF-SET-012 | Tab deep-link `/settings/locations` |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-SF-SET-*` / `TC-SF-SET-*`*


### Feature spec: LEDGER-INVOICES

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 50ŌĆō51 |
| **MASTER** | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec file |
|---|--------|-----|-----------|
| S1 | Invoices list | `/ledger/billing/invoices` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S2 | Invoice detail | `/ledger/billing/invoices/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S3 | Details tab | default | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S4 | Line items tab | detail | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S5 | Transactions tab | detail | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S6 | Create invoice | `/ledger/billing/invoices/new` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| S7 | Edit invoice | `/ledger/billing/invoices/:id/edit` | (screen spec in this volume) |

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-INV-1 ŌĆö Finance: create and send invoice

| Step | Action | System | UX |
|------|--------|--------|-----|
| 1 | New invoice | Form with line items | Running total updates live |
| 2 | Save draft | Status `draft` | Toast |
| 3 | Open detail ŌåÆ Send | Email/API send | Status ŌåÆ `sent`; `sent_at` populated |
| 4 | Customer views | Status `viewed` | `viewed_at` timestamp |

##### J-INV-2 ŌĆö Finance: record payment

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open paid/overdue invoice | Balance due prominent |
| 2 | Record Payment tab/action | Payment method sub-routes (Cash, Card, Stripe, ŌĆ”) |
| 3 | Submit payment | `amount_paid` Ōåæ; status `partial` or `paid` |

##### J-INV-3 ŌĆö AR clerk: filter overdue

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | List status filter `overdue` | Red badge column |
| 2 | Sort by due date | Oldest first |
| 3 | Export | CSV download |

---

#### 3. Invoices list (LLR-INV-LIST)

**REQ-LDG-INV-LIST-001** URL: `/ledger/billing/invoices`  
**Permissions:** `ledger view invoice`, `ledger update invoice`, `ledger delete invoice`

##### 3.1 Layout

- `Layout::Resource::Tabular`
- **Status tabs** (filter shortcuts): Draft, Sent, Viewed, Partial, Paid, Overdue, Void, Cancelled

##### 3.2 Table columns

| # | i18n key | valuePath | Format | Sort | Filter |
|---|----------|-----------|--------|------|--------|
| 1 | column.number | `number` | link to detail | yes | yes |
| 2 | column.customer | `customerName` | text | yes | `customer_uuid` |
| 3 | column.status | `status` | colored badge | yes | `status` |
| 4 | column.total | `total` | currency | yes | ŌĆö |
| 5 | column.balance | `balance` | currency; bold if > 0 | yes | ŌĆö |
| 6 | column.due-date | `dueDate` | date; red if overdue | yes | ŌĆö |
| 7 | column.invoice-date | `invoiceDate` | date | yes | ŌĆö |
| 8 | column.created-at | `createdAt` | relative | yes | ŌĆö |

##### 3.3 Query parameters

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `status`, `customer_uuid`

##### 3.4 Header actions

| Label | Handler |
|-------|---------|
| common.refresh | `invoiceActions.refresh` |
| common.new | `invoiceActions.transition` ŌåÆ create |

##### 3.5 List-only actions (from enriched controller)

| Action | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| Record Payment | Quick payment entry |
| Preview Invoice | PDF/HTML preview |

**UX:** Overdue rows: subtle red row background; balance column shows remaining amount clearly.

##### 3.6 Data load

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| API | `GET ledger-invoices` (or adapter namespace) |
| Store | `store.query('ledger-invoice', {...})` |

---

#### 4. Invoice detail (LLR-INV-DETAIL)

**REQ-LDG-INV-DETAIL-001** URL: `/ledger/billing/invoices/:public_id`  
**Permission:** `ledger view invoice`

##### 4.1 Route lifecycle

| Hook | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `beforeModel` | Permission gate |
| `model` | `findRecord('invoice', public_id)` |
| `error` | `serverError` + redirect list if not found |

##### 4.2 Layout

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ
Ōöé [ŌåÉ Back]  Invoice #{number}  [status badge]  [Send] [Ōŗ»]    Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Tabs: Details | Line Items | Transactions | Payment methods Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Summary strip: Total | Paid | Balance Due                   Ōöé
Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöż
Ōöé Tab content                                                  Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

**Component shell:** `Layout::Resource::Panel` + `TabNavigation`

##### 4.3 Summary fields (all tabs ŌĆö header strip)

| Field | Binding | Display |
|-------|---------|---------|
| Invoice Number | `number` | H1 |
| Status | `status` | Badge (draft/sent/paid/overdue/ŌĆ”) |
| Total Amount | `total` | Large currency |
| Amount Paid | `amount_paid` | Secondary |
| Balance Due | `balance` | Primary emphasis if > 0 |
| Due Date | `due_date` | With overdue indicator |
| Invoice Date | `date` | ŌĆö |
| Currency | `currency` | ISO code |

##### 4.4 Tabs & panels

| Tab | Component | Content |
|-----|-----------|---------|
| Details | `Invoice::Details` | Customer bill-to, dates, URLs, metadata |
| Line items | `Invoice::LineItems` | Editable table: description, qty, rate, tax, amount |
| Transactions | `Invoice::Transactions` | Payment/refund ledger entries |
| Preview | preview component | PDF/HTML iframe or modal |
| Payment methods | sub-routes | Bank Transfer, Cash, Cheque, Credit Card, Debit Card, PayPal, Stripe, Other |

##### 4.5 Details tab fields

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Invoice Number | read-only after send |
| Status | read-only badge |
| Invoice Date, Due Date | formatted dates |
| Currency, Template | selects |
| Sent At, Viewed At, Paid At | timestamps when set |
| Invoice URL | external link button |
| Name, Email, Phone | customer contact |
| Internal ID | disabled |
| Created, Last Updated | audit |

##### 4.6 Line items tab UX (FO-INV-LI-001)

| Element | Requirement |
|---------|-------------|
| Table | Add row, delete row, drag reorder (if API supports) |
| Totals | Subtotal, tax, total ŌĆö recalc on change |
| Validation | qty > 0, rate Ōēź 0 |
| Mobile | Stacked cards per line item |

##### 4.7 Transactions tab UX

| Column | Content |
|--------|---------|
| Date | transaction date |
| Type | payment, refund, adjustment |
| Method | card, cash, stripe, ŌĆ” |
| Amount | signed currency |
| Reference | external id |

##### 4.8 Primary actions

| Action | When enabled | API effect |
|--------|--------------|------------|
| Send Invoice | status draft/sent | Marks sent, emails customer |
| Record Payment | balance > 0 | Creates payment transaction |
| Preview Invoice | always (view) | Opens preview |
| Edit | draft or policy | ŌåÆ edit route |
| Void / Cancel | per policy | status void/cancelled |
| Delete | draft only | DELETE invoice |

**Services:** `invoiceActions`, `modalsManager`, `fetch`

---

#### 5. Create / edit invoice (LLR-INV-FORM)

**Permission create:** `ledger create invoice`

##### 5.1 Invoice::Form

| Field | Binding | Control | Required |
|-------|---------|---------|----------|
| Invoice Number | `number` | text (auto-gen option) | yes |
| Invoice Date | `date` | date | yes |
| Due Date | `due_date` | date | yes |
| Customer | `customer` | select | yes |
| Currency | `currency` | CurrencySelect | yes |
| Notes | `notes` | textarea | no |
| Terms | `terms` | textarea | no |
| Template | `template` | select | no |

##### 5.2 Invoice::LineItems (embedded)

| Column | Binding |
|--------|---------|
| Description | line.description |
| Quantity | line.quantity |
| Unit price | line.unit_price |
| Tax | line.tax |
| Amount | computed |

**API:** `POST invoices` with nested line items payload.

**UX:** Show running total in sticky footer; Save disabled until valid.

---

#### 6. Status workflow

| Status | Badge color | Allowed next actions |
|--------|-------------|----------------------|
| draft | gray | edit, send, delete |
| sent | blue | record payment, void |
| viewed | blue | record payment |
| partial | amber | record payment |
| paid | green | view only |
| overdue | red | record payment, send reminder |
| void | gray strikethrough | view only |
| cancelled | gray | view only |

**UX:** Status change shows toast; detail badges update without full reload when possible.

---

#### 7. Financial UX requirements

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-INV-FIN-001 | All amounts use org `company.currency` formatting |
| FO-INV-FIN-002 | Balance due = total ŌłÆ amount_paid (display mismatch triggers warning) |
| FO-INV-FIN-003 | Payment amount cannot exceed balance (client validation) |
| FO-INV-FIN-004 | Export respects active filters |
| FO-INV-FIN-005 | PDF preview opens in new tab or modal with print button |

---

#### 8. Test cases

| TC ID | Requirement | Expected |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| TC-INV-001 | List loads | 8 columns; status tabs filter |
| TC-INV-002 | Filter overdue | Only overdue rows |
| TC-INV-003 | Create invoice | Draft saved with line items |
| TC-INV-004 | Send invoice | Status sent; sent_at set |
| TC-INV-005 | Record payment | Balance decreases; status partial/paid |
| TC-INV-006 | Line items edit | Totals recalculate |
| TC-INV-007 | No permission | Redirect + warning |
| TC-INV-008 | Preview | PDF/HTML renders |
| TC-INV-009 | Delete draft | Removed from list |
| TC-INV-010 | Delete sent | Blocked or void flow only |
| TC-INV-011 | Currency format | Matches org currency |
| TC-INV-012 | Transactions tab | Lists payment history |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-LDG-INV` / `TC-INV-*`*


### Feature spec: LEDGER-PAYMENTS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 50ŌĆō51 |

#### 1. Scope & screens

##### Wallets (6 screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |

##### Transactions (3 screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| T1 | Transactions parent | `/ledger/payments/transactions` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| T2 | Transactions list | `.../transactions/` | (screen spec in this volume) |

##### Payment gateways (5 screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| G1 | Gateways parent | `/ledger/payments/gateways` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| G2 | Gateways list | `.../gateways/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| G3 | Gateway detail | `.../:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |

| G5 | New / edit | `new`, `edit` | (screen spec in this volume), (screen spec in this volume) |

**Services:** , 

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-LDG-WAL-1 ŌĆö Finance: inspect driver wallet

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Wallets ŌåÆ filter type Driver | `type` / `subject_type` QP |
| 2 | Open wallet | Detail overview |
| 3 | Transactions tab | Ledger entries for wallet |

##### J-LDG-WAL-2 ŌĆö Ops: freeze suspicious wallet

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Wallet detail | `is_frozen` toggle or action |
| 2 | Confirm | Status frozen; debits blocked |
| 3 | Toast | Success |

##### J-LDG-TXN-1 ŌĆö Reconciliation: find failed card charge

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Transactions ŌåÆ filter status failed | |
| 2 | Filter payment_method Card | |
| 3 | Open detail | failure_reason, gateway reference |

##### J-LDG-GW-1 ŌĆö Admin: configure Stripe gateway

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Gateways ŌåÆ New | Sandbox vs Live environment |
| 2 | Enter credentials | Masked secret fields |
| 3 | Webhooks tab | Register endpoint URL |
| 4 | Test | Status active |

---

#### 3. Wallets list (LLR-LDG-WAL-LIST)

**REQ-LDG-WAL-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `ledger list wallet` (verify route)  
**Service:** `walletActions`

##### 3.1 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `name`, `type`, `status`, `currency`, `is_frozen`, `subject`, `subject_type`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

##### 3.2 Filter tabs (controller)

| Tab filter | Values |
|------------|--------|
| Subject type | Company, Driver, Customer, User |
| Status | Active, Inactive, Frozen, Suspended |
| Frozen | Yes / No |

##### 3.3 Table columns (typical)

| # | Column | valuePath | Notes |
|---|--------|-----------|-------|
| 1 | Name | `name` | Link to detail |
| 2 | Type | `type` | |
| 3 | Owner | `subject.name` | polymorphic |
| 4 | Currency | `currency` | |
| 5 | Balance | `balance` | right-align; sensitive |
| 6 | Status | `status` | badge |
| 7 | Frozen | `is_frozen` | icon if true |
| 8 | Updated | `updated_at` | |

##### 3.4 Header actions

| i18n | Handler |
|------|---------|
| common.refresh | `walletActions.refresh` |
| common.new | `walletActions.transition` (if create supported) |

---

#### 4. Wallet detail (LLR-LDG-WAL-DETAIL)

**REQ-LDG-WAL-VIEW-001**  
**Permission:** `ledger view wallet`  
**MASTER:** (screen spec in this volume)

##### 4.1 Overview (`Wallet::Details`)

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Wallet Name | |
| Type | company / driver / customer / user |
| Currency | ISO code |
| Status | active/inactive |
| Frozen | boolean |
| Current Balance | formatted money; FO-LDG-FIN-001: never float |
| Owner | subject display |
| Owner Type | |
| Email / Phone | from subject |
| Internal ID | |
| Created / Last Updated | |

##### 4.2 Transactions tab (`Wallet::TransactionHistory`)

Paginated ledger lines: date, description, direction (credit/debit), amount, balance after, reference.

##### 4.3 Wallet UX (FO-LDG-WAL-001ŌĆ”004)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-LDG-WAL-001 | Balance uses locale currency formatting |
| FO-LDG-WAL-002 | Frozen wallet shows banner on detail |
| FO-LDG-WAL-003 | Edit route guards frozen wallets if API disallows |
| FO-LDG-WAL-004 | Transaction tab empty state when no movements |

---

#### 5. Transactions list (LLR-LDG-TXN-LIST)

**REQ-LDG-TXN-LIST-001**  
**Service:** `transactionActions`

##### 5.1 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `description`, `type`, `status`, `direction`, `currency`, `gateway`, `payment_method`, `reference`, `period`, `failure_reason`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `settled_at`

##### 5.2 Filter tabs

| Dimension | Values |
|-----------|--------|
| Direction | Credit, Debit |
| Payment method | Card, Bank Transfer, Wallet, Cash |

##### 5.3 Table columns (typical)

| Column | Notes |
|--------|-------|
| ID | `public_id` |
| Description | |
| Direction | credit/debit color |
| Amount | signed display |
| Status | pending, completed, failed |
| Payment method | |
| Gateway | |
| Reference | |
| Settled at | |
| Created | |

##### 5.4 Header

Refresh only on list (read-heavy); no bulk delete unless API supports.

---

#### 6. Transaction detail (LLR-LDG-TXN-DETAIL)

**REQ-LDG-TXN-VIEW-001**  
**Permission:** `ledger view transaction`

Read-only panel:

| Section | Fields |
|---------|--------|
| Summary | amount, currency, direction, status |
| Parties | wallet, invoice link, customer |
| Gateway | gateway name, external id |
| Failure | `failure_reason` when failed |
| Timeline | created, settled, updated |
| Meta | raw JSON expandable (admin only) |

**Link:** If `invoice_id` present, deep-link to invoice detail.

---

#### 7. Gateways list (LLR-LDG-GW-LIST)

**REQ-LDG-GW-LIST-001**  
**Service:** `gatewayActions`

##### 7.1 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `name`, `code`, `driver`, `environment`, `status`, `created_at`, `updated_at`

##### 7.2 Filter tabs

Live / Sandbox ┬Ę Active / Inactive

##### 7.3 Table columns

| Column | valuePath |
|--------|-----------|
| Name | `name` |
| Code | `code` |
| Driver | `driver` (stripe, etc.) |
| Environment | live/sandbox badge |
| Status | active/inactive |
| Updated | `updated_at` |

##### 7.4 Header actions

Refresh, New (`gatewayActions.transition`)

---

#### 8. Gateway detail (LLR-LDG-GW-DETAIL)

**REQ-LDG-GW-VIEW-001**  
**Permission:** `ledger view gateway`  
**MASTER:** (screen spec in this volume)

##### 8.1 Overview (`Gateway::Details`)

Name, Code, Driver, Type, Environment, Status, Description, Webhook URL, Capabilities, Internal ID, Created, Last Updated.

##### 8.2 Webhooks tab

List registered events, delivery status, retry action if exposed.

##### 8.3 Gateway form (new/edit)

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Name, Code | required |
| Driver | select provider |
| Environment | live/sandbox |
| API keys | password inputs; never echo full secret on edit |
| Webhook secret | show once on create |

**Security (FO-LDG-GW-001ŌĆ”003):**

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-LDG-GW-001 | Secrets masked by default |
| FO-LDG-GW-002 | Sandbox badge distinct color from live |
| FO-LDG-GW-003 | Deactivate gateway warns about in-flight transactions |

---

#### 9. Permissions matrix

| Action | Permission slug |
|--------|-----------------|
| List/view wallet | `ledger list wallet`, `ledger view wallet` |
| Create/update wallet | `ledger create wallet`, `ledger update wallet` |
| List/view transaction | `ledger list transaction`, `ledger view transaction` |
| List/view gateway | `ledger list gateway`, `ledger view gateway` |
| Create/update gateway | `ledger create gateway`, `ledger update gateway` |

---

#### 10. Financial UX (shared with Invoices)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-LDG-FIN-001 | Money as integer minor units or decimal string from API ŌĆö no JS float math in UI |
| FO-LDG-FIN-002 | Credit green / debit red (theme tokens) |
| FO-LDG-FIN-003 | Failed transactions use error badge + reason tooltip |
| FO-LDG-FIN-004 | Export respects permission; no PII in client logs |

---

#### 11. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-LDG-WAL-001 | Wallets list + subject type filter |
| TC-LDG-WAL-002 | Wallet detail balance format |
| TC-LDG-WAL-003 | Transactions tab pagination |
| TC-LDG-WAL-004 | Frozen wallet banner |
| TC-LDG-WAL-005 | Create/edit wallet |
| TC-LDG-TXN-001 | Transactions list filters |
| TC-LDG-TXN-002 | Failed transaction shows reason |
| TC-LDG-TXN-003 | Link to invoice when present |
| TC-LDG-TXN-004 | Direction color coding |
| TC-LDG-GW-001 | Gateways list env tabs |
| TC-LDG-GW-002 | Create gateway sandbox |
| TC-LDG-GW-003 | Webhooks tab |
| TC-LDG-GW-004 | Secret masked on edit |
| TC-LDG-GW-005 | Deactivate confirm |
| TC-LDG-PAY-001 | Unauthorized wallet access blocked |

### Feature spec: LEDGER-JOURNALS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 50ŌĆō51 |
| **Mount** | `/ledger/accounting/journal` |
| **MASTER** | (screen spec in this volume) |
| **Related** | this document ┬Ę Chart of accounts:  |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| J1 | Journal parent | `/ledger/accounting/journal` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| J2 | Journal list | `.../journal/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| J3 | Entry detail | `.../journal/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| J4 | Overview tab | details index | (screen spec in this volume) |
| J5 | New entry | `.../new` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| J6 | Edit entry | `.../edit/:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |

**Service:**  (extends `resource-action` pattern)

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-LDG-JRN-1 ŌĆö Accountant: post manual journal entry

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Journal ŌåÆ New | `journalActions.transition` |
| 2 | Select debit + credit accounts | Must balance |
| 3 | Amount, date, memo, type | Validation |
| 4 | Save as draft or post | Status `draft` ŌåÆ `posted` |

##### J-LDG-JRN-2 ŌĆö Review payment-generated entries

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Filter type = Payment | Tab filter |
| 2 | Open detail | Source links to transaction/invoice |
| 3 | Read-only if posted | No edit |

##### J-LDG-JRN-3 ŌĆö Void incorrect entry

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open draft or posted entry | Permission check |
| 2 | Void action | Status ŌåÆ `voided` |
| 3 | Reversal entry | Auto-created if API supports |

##### J-LDG-JRN-4 ŌĆö Period close prep

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Filter status Posted | |
| 2 | Export | CSV for GL reconciliation |
| 3 | Match to general ledger report |

---

#### 3. Journal list (LLR-LDG-JRN-LIST)

**REQ-LDG-JRN-LIST-001**  
**Permission:** `ledger list journal` (verify route `beforeModel`)  
**API:** `store.query('ledger-journal')`  
**Service:** `journalActions`

##### 3.1 Layout

`Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö header, filters, paginated table.

##### 3.2 Table columns (from screen spec)

| # | i18n column | valuePath | Sort | Filter |
|---|-------------|-----------|------|--------|
| 1 | column.number | `number` | yes | yes |
| 2 | column.date | `entryDate` | yes | yes |
| 3 | column.type | `type` | yes | yes |
| 4 | column.status | `status` | yes | yes |
| 5 | column.amount | `amount` | yes | yes |
| 6 | column.debit-account | `debit_account.code` | yes | yes |
| 7 | column.credit-account | `credit_account.code` | yes | yes |
| 8 | column.reference | `reference` | yes | yes |
| 9 | column.memo | `memo` | yes | yes |

##### 3.3 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `type`, `status`, `currency`

##### 3.4 Filter tabs (controller)

**Type:**

| Tab | Value |
|-----|-------|
| General | general |
| Payment | payment |
| Refund | refund |
| Adjustment | adjustment |
| Deposit | deposit |
| Withdrawal | withdrawal |
| Transfer | transfer |

**Status:**

| Tab | Value |
|-----|-------|
| Posted | posted |
| Draft | draft |
| Voided | voided |

##### 3.5 Header actions

| i18n | Handler |
|------|---------|
| common.refresh | `journalActions.refresh` |
| common.new | `journalActions.transition` (new) |
| common.export | `journalActions.export` (if exposed) |
| common.import | `journalActions.import` (if exposed) |

##### 3.6 Row behavior

- Row click ŌåÆ detail route  
- Bulk delete (if supported) only for **draft** entries  
- Amount column: right-aligned; use `FO-LDG-FIN-001` from Payments LLRD

---

#### 4. Journal detail (LLR-LDG-JRN-DETAIL)

**REQ-LDG-JRN-VIEW-001**  
**Permission:** `ledger view journal`  
**MASTER:** (screen spec in this volume)

##### 4.1 Overview (`Journal::Details`)

| Field | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Entry Number | `number` |
| Type | payment, refund, etc. |
| Entry Date | `entryDate` |
| Source | linked entity (invoice, transaction) |
| Amount | formatted money |
| Currency | ISO code |
| Description | |
| Debit Account | name + code |
| Debit Account Code | |
| Credit Account | name + code |
| Credit Account Code | |
| Internal ID | |
| Created / Last Updated | |

##### 4.2 Status badges

| Status | Color semantics |
|--------|-----------------|
| draft | neutral |
| posted | success |
| voided | muted/strike |

##### 4.3 Header actions

| Action | When allowed |
|--------|--------------|
| Edit | `draft` only + `ledger update journal` |
| Post | draft ŌåÆ posted |
| Void | posted ŌåÆ voided + confirm |
| Delete | draft only |

##### 4.4 Source links

If `source` references invoice or transaction, render deep-link to Invoices or Payments detail.

---

#### 5. Journal form (new / edit) (LLR-LDG-JRN-FORM)

**REQ-LDG-JRN-FORM-001**

##### 5.1 Fields

| Field | Type | Validation |
|-------|------|------------|
| Entry date | date picker | required; not future if policy |
| Type | select | enum from API |
| Amount | money input | required; > 0 |
| Currency | select | required |
| Debit account | account picker | required |
| Credit account | select | required; ŌēĀ debit |
| Reference | text | optional |
| Memo / description | textarea | optional |

##### 5.2 Double-entry validation

**REQ-LDG-JRN-BAL-001:** UI must enforce debit amount = credit amount (single amount field with two accounts is typical pattern).

| Error | Message |
|-------|---------|
| Same account | Cannot debit and credit same account |
| Unbalanced | Debits must equal credits |
| Missing account | Account required |

##### 5.3 Save flows

| Action | Result |
|--------|--------|
| Save draft | status `draft` |
| Save & post | status `posted`; confirm if period closed |
| Cancel | unsaved guard |

---

#### 6. Integration with chart of accounts

**REQ-LDG-JRN-COA-001**  
Account picker loads from `ledger-account` model ((screen spec in this volume)).

| UX | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| Picker search | by code and name |
| Inactive accounts | disabled in picker |
| Account detail link | opens account detail in new tab |

---

#### 7. Permissions matrix

| Action | Permission slug |
|--------|-----------------|
| List | `ledger list journal` |
| View | `ledger view journal` |
| Create | `ledger create journal` |
| Update | `ledger update journal` |
| Delete | `ledger delete journal` |
| Post / void | `ledger post journal` / `ledger void journal` (verify exact slugs) |

---

#### 8. Financial UX

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-LDG-JRN-001 | Posted entries read-only in UI |
| FO-LDG-JRN-002 | Void shows reason prompt |
| FO-LDG-JRN-003 | Type filter persists in URL query |
| FO-LDG-JRN-004 | Export includes account codes |
| FO-LDG-JRN-005 | No floating-point in amount display |

---

#### 9. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-LDG-JRN-001 | Journal list loads with 9 columns |
| TC-LDG-JRN-002 | Type tab filter Payment |
| TC-LDG-JRN-003 | Status tab Draft |
| TC-LDG-JRN-004 | Create balanced entry |
| TC-LDG-JRN-005 | Reject same debit/credit account |
| TC-LDG-JRN-006 | Post draft entry |
| TC-LDG-JRN-007 | Void posted entry |
| TC-LDG-JRN-008 | Edit blocked on posted |
| TC-LDG-JRN-009 | Detail source link to invoice |
| TC-LDG-JRN-010 | Export CSV |
| TC-LDG-JRN-011 | Refresh updates list |
| TC-LDG-JRN-012 | Unauthorized redirect |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-LDG-JRN-*` / `TC-LDG-JRN-*`*


### Feature spec: LEDGER-ACCOUNTING

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 50ŌĆō51 |

#### 1. Scope & screens

##### Chart of accounts (6 screens)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| A1 | Accounts parent | `/ledger/accounting/accounts` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A2 | Accounts list | `.../accounts/` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A3 | Account detail | `.../:public_id` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A4 | Overview tab | details index | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A5 | Account ledger tab | details/ledger | (screen spec in this volume) |
| A6 | New / edit | `new`, `edit` | (screen spec in this volume), (screen spec in this volume) |

##### General ledger report (1 screen)

| # | Screen | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| G1 | General ledger | `/ledger/accounting/general-ledger` | (screen spec in this volume) |

**Services:**  ┬Ę GL: `loadGeneralLedger` task via `fetch`

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-LDG-COA-1 ŌĆö Accountant: add GL account

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Accounts ŌåÆ New | `accountActions.transition` |
| 2 | Code, name, type, currency | Validation unique code |
| 3 | Save | Appears in list |

##### J-LDG-COA-2 ŌĆö Review account activity

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Open account detail | `Account::Details` |
| 2 | Ledger tab | `Account::GeneralLedger` entries |
| 3 | Drill to journal | Link to journal entry detail |

##### J-LDG-GL-1 ŌĆö Period close: run GL report

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | General ledger | Set date range |
| 2 | Filter by type (Asset, Liability, ŌĆ”) | `setType` |
| 3 | Expand accounts | `toggleAccount` / `toggleExpandAll` |
| 4 | Export | Download if exposed |

---

#### 3. Accounts list (LLR-LDG-COA-LIST)

**REQ-LDG-COA-LIST-001**  
**API:** `store.query('ledger-account')`  
**Service:** `accountActions`

##### 3.1 Columns (6)

| Column | valuePath |
|--------|-----------|
| column.name | `name` |
| column.code | `code` |
| column.type | `type` |
| column.currency | `currency` |
| column.balance | `balance` |
| column.status | `status` |

##### 3.2 Filter tabs

**Account type:** Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense  
**Status:** Active, Inactive

##### 3.3 Query params

`page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `type`, `status`, `currency`

##### 3.4 Header actions

| i18n | Handler |
|------|---------|
| common.refresh | `accountActions.refresh` |
| common.new | `accountActions.transition` |

---

#### 4. Account detail (LLR-LDG-COA-DETAIL)

**REQ-LDG-COA-VIEW-001**  
**Permission:** `ledger view ledger-account`  
**MASTER:** (screen spec in this volume)

##### 4.1 Tabs

| Tab | Component | Content |
|-----|-----------|---------|
| Overview | `Account::Details` | code, name, type, currency, balance, status |
| General Ledger | `Account::GeneralLedger` | journal lines for this account |

##### 4.2 Overview fields

Name, Code, Type (asset/liability/equity/revenue/expense), Currency, Current balance, Status, Parent account (if hierarchy), Created/updated.

##### 4.3 Account form (new/edit)

| Field | Validation |
|-------|------------|
| Code | required, unique |
| Name | required |
| Type | required enum |
| Currency | required |
| Parent account | optional |
| Status | active/inactive |

**REQ-LDG-COA-INACTIVE-001:** Inactive accounts cannot be selected in journal forms.

---

#### 5. General ledger report (LLR-LDG-GL-RPT)

**REQ-LDG-GL-RPT-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/accounting/general-ledger`

##### 5.1 Controls

| Control | Handler | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Date range | `onDateRangeChanged` | `date_from`, `date_to` |
| Account type filter | `setType` | All, Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense |
| Reload | `reload` | Re-run `loadGeneralLedger` task |
| Expand all | `toggleExpandAll` | Expand/collapse tree |

##### 5.2 Report structure

Hierarchical rows per account:

| Level | Shows |
|-------|-------|
| Account row | code, name, summary balance |
| Summary | `row.summary.entry_count` |
| Expanded entries | `row.entries[]` when `expandedMap[acct.id]` |

**Loading:** `loadGeneralLedger.isRunning` ŌåÆ spinner; disable filters during load.

##### 5.3 Entry row fields (when expanded)

Date, journal number, description, debit, credit, running balance.

##### 5.4 GL UX (FO-LDG-GL-001ŌĆ”005)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-LDG-GL-001 | Date range required before first load |
| FO-LDG-GL-002 | Expand chevron per account row |
| FO-LDG-GL-003 | Empty period shows friendly message |
| FO-LDG-GL-004 | Balances use `FO-LDG-FIN-001` money formatting |
| FO-LDG-GL-005 | Click journal number ŌåÆ journal detail route |

---

#### 6. Permissions matrix

| Action | Permission slug |
|--------|-----------------|
| List accounts | `ledger list ledger-account` |
| View account | `ledger view ledger-account` |
| Create / update | `ledger create/update ledger-account` |
| View GL report | `ledger view general-ledger` or `ledger list ledger-account` (verify route) |

---

#### 7. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-LDG-COA-001 | Accounts list + type tabs |
| TC-LDG-COA-002 | Create account unique code |
| TC-LDG-COA-003 | Detail ledger tab entries |
| TC-LDG-COA-004 | Inactive account disabled in journal picker |
| TC-LDG-GL-001 | GL report date range required |
| TC-LDG-GL-002 | Expand account shows entries |
| TC-LDG-GL-003 | Type filter Asset only |
| TC-LDG-GL-004 | Expand all / collapse all |
| TC-LDG-GL-005 | Loading spinner during task |
| TC-LDG-GL-006 | Journal link from entry row |

---

*Traceability: this document ŌĆö `REQ-LDG-COA-*` / `REQ-LDG-GL-*` / `TC-LDG-COA-*` / `TC-LDG-GL-*`*


### Feature spec: LEDGER-REPORTS

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| | **Overview** | Docs 50ŌĆō52 |
| **Mount** | `/ledger/reports` |
| **Related** | LEDGER-INVOICES ┬Ę LEDGER-ACCOUNTING ┬Ę LEDGER-PAYMENTS |

---

#### 1. Scope & screens

| # | Report | URL | Spec |
|---|--------|-----|------|
| R0 | Reports hub (multi-report) | `/ledger/reports` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| R1 | Income statement (P&L) | `/ledger/reports/income-statement` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| R2 | Balance sheet | `/ledger/reports/balance-sheet` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| R3 | Cash flow | `/ledger/reports/cash-flow` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| R4 | AR aging | `/ledger/reports/ar-aging` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| R5 | Trial balance | `/ledger/reports/trial-balance` | (screen spec in this volume) |
| R6 | Wallet summary | `/ledger/reports/wallet-summary` | (screen spec in this volume) |

**Components:** `Report::BalanceSheet`, `Report::IncomeStatement`, `Report::CashFlow`, `Report::ArAging`

---

#### 2. User journeys

##### J-LDG-RPT-1 ŌĆö CFO: monthly P&L

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Reports ŌåÆ Income statement | Route or hub tab |
| 2 | Select date range | `onDateRangeChanged` |
| 3 | Run report | `loadReport` task |
| 4 | Review revenue/expense sections | Rendered table |
| 5 | Export PDF/CSV | If exposed in header |

##### J-LDG-RPT-2 ŌĆö Accountant: trial balance before close

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Trial balance | Set **as-of** date |
| 2 | Run | Debit/credit columns per account |
| 3 | Verify debits = credits | Totals row |

##### J-LDG-RPT-3 ŌĆö AR clerk: aging buckets

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | AR aging | As-of date |
| 2 | Run | 30/60/90+ buckets |
| 3 | Drill to invoice | Link from row (if API provides) |

##### J-LDG-RPT-4 ŌĆö Ops: wallet summary

| Step | Action | System |
|------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Wallet summary | Period range |
| 2 | View period stats + top wallets | `periodStats`, `top_wallets` |
| 3 | Link to wallet detail | PAYMENTS LLRD |

---

#### 3. Reports hub (LLR-LDG-RPT-HUB)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-HUB-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/reports`  
**Service:** `fetch` ┬Ę **Task:** `loadReport`

##### 3.1 Report type selector

Controller tabs / `activeReport` values:

| Tab label | `activeReport` key | Component |
|-----------|-------------------|-----------|
| Balance Sheet | `balance-sheet` | `Report::BalanceSheet` |
| Income Statement | `income-statement` | `Report::IncomeStatement` |
| Cash Flow | `cash-flow` | `Report::CashFlow` |
| AR Aging | `ar-aging` | `Report::ArAging` |

##### 3.2 Actions

| Action | Handler | Behavior |
|--------|---------|----------|
| selectReport | `selectReport` | Switch active report component |
| runReport | `runReport` | Re-fetch data for current selection |

##### 3.3 Hub UX (FO-LDG-RPT-HUB-001ŌĆ”003)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-LDG-RPT-HUB-001 | `isLoading` / `loadReport.isRunning` shows spinner over report body |
| FO-LDG-RPT-HUB-002 | Only one report component mounted at a time |
| FO-LDG-RPT-HUB-003 | Shared date controls apply to active report before run |

---

#### 4. Shared report pattern (all standalone routes)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-COMMON-001**

Each standalone report route follows the same shell:

```
ŌöīŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöÉ

Ōöé  ŌĆö empty: no data for period                             Ōöé
ŌööŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöĆŌöś
```

##### 4.1 Common controls

| Control | Reports using it |
|---------|------------------|
| Date range (`onDateRangeChanged`) | Income statement, Cash flow, Wallet summary |
| As-of date (`onDateChanged`) | Balance sheet, Trial balance, AR aging |
| Reload | All ŌĆö `reload` action |
| Run / Refresh | Triggers `loadReport.perform()` |

##### 4.2 Common services

| Service | Usage |
|---------|-------|
| `fetch` | API report endpoints |
| `currentUser` | Company/currency context |

##### 4.3 Financial display rules

Apply FO-LDG-FIN-001 from Payments LLRD:

- Money formatted with locale + currency  
- Debit/credit columns right-aligned  
- Section subtotals bold; grand total double-rule  

---

#### 5. Income statement (LLR-LDG-RPT-IS)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-IS-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/reports/income-statement`

##### 5.1 Parameters

| Param | UI | Required |
|-------|-----|----------|
| Period start / end | DatePicker range | yes |
| Currency | from company | ŌĆö |

##### 5.2 Output structure

| Section | Typical rows |
|---------|--------------|
| Revenue | line items + subtotal |
| Cost of goods sold | line items + subtotal |
| Gross profit | computed |
| Operating expenses | line items + subtotal |
| Net income | computed |

**Conditional:** Render when `data.period` present after load.

##### 5.3 Validation

| Rule | Feedback |
|------|----------|
| End before start | warning toast |
| Future period | warn or block per policy |

---

#### 6. Balance sheet (LLR-LDG-RPT-BS)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-BS-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/reports/balance-sheet`

##### 6.1 Parameters

| Param | UI |
|-------|-----|
| As-of date | DatePicker |

**Conditional:** `data.as_of_date` gates body render.

##### 6.2 Output structure

| Section | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Assets | current + non-current |
| Liabilities | current + long-term |
| Equity | retained earnings, etc. |
| Check | Assets = Liabilities + Equity |

---

#### 7. Cash flow (LLR-LDG-RPT-CF)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-CF-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/reports/cash-flow`

##### 7.1 Parameters

Date range ŌĆö same as income statement.

##### 7.2 Output structure

| Section | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Operating activities | inflows/outflows |
| Investing activities | |
| Financing activities | |
| Net change in cash | |
| Opening / closing cash | |

---

#### 8. AR aging (LLR-LDG-RPT-AR)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-AR-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/reports/ar-aging`

##### 8.1 Parameters

As-of date.

##### 8.2 Output structure

| Column / bucket | Notes |
|-----------------|-------|
| Customer | name |
| Current | 0ŌĆō30 days |
| 31ŌĆō60 | |
| 61ŌĆō90 | |
| 90+ | |
| Total | row total |

**Conditional:** `data.grand_total` shown in footer.

**Links:** Row may link to invoice detail when `invoice_id` provided.

---

#### 9. Trial balance (LLR-LDG-RPT-TB)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-TB-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/reports/trial-balance`

##### 9.1 Parameters

As-of date ŌĆö `onDateChanged`.

##### 9.2 Table columns

| Column | Notes |
|--------|-------|
| Account code | |
| Account name | link to COA detail |
| Debit | `row.debit` ŌĆö show only if non-zero |
| Credit | `row.credit` ŌĆö show only if non-zero |

##### 9.3 Footer

| Row | Validation |
|-----|------------|
| Totals | Sum debits = sum credits |
| Out of balance | Error banner if mismatch |

---

#### 10. Wallet summary (LLR-LDG-RPT-WS)

**REQ-LDG-RPT-WS-001**  
**URL:** `/ledger/reports/wallet-summary`

##### 10.1 Parameters

Date range ŌĆö period.

##### 10.2 Output sections

| Section | Binding | Notes |
|---------|---------|-------|
| Period stats | `periodStats` | KPI cards per period slice |
| Top wallets | `data.top_wallets` | ranked list |
| Empty | `!periodStats.length` | friendly empty state |

**Links:** Wallet name ŌåÆ wallet detail route.

---

#### 11. Permissions

| Action | Expected slug |
|--------|---------------|
| View reports hub | `ledger view report` or `ledger list report` |
| Run income statement | `ledger run income-statement-report` (verify) |
| Export | `ledger export report` |

**REQ:** Hide report nav item when user lacks view permission.

---

#### 12. Export & print (FO-LDG-RPT-EXP)

| ID | Requirement |
|----|-------------|
| FO-LDG-RPT-EXP-001 | Export uses same filters as on-screen run |
| FO-LDG-RPT-EXP-002 | Print stylesheet hides sidebar and chrome |
| FO-LDG-RPT-EXP-003 | Large reports show progress indicator |

---

#### 13. Relationship to accounting modules

| Report | Data source |
|--------|-------------|
| Trial balance, GL | Journal entries, COA |
| AR aging | Invoices |
| Wallet summary | Wallets / transactions |

---

#### 14. Test cases

| TC ID | Expected |
|-------|----------|
| TC-LDG-RPT-001 | Reports hub loads 4 tabs |
| TC-LDG-RPT-002 | selectReport switches component |
| TC-LDG-RPT-003 | runReport shows loading spinner |
| TC-LDG-RPT-004 | Income statement date range required |
| TC-LDG-RPT-005 | P&L shows net income row |
| TC-LDG-RPT-006 | Balance sheet as-of date |
| TC-LDG-RPT-007 | Balance sheet balances |
| TC-LDG-RPT-008 | Cash flow three sections |
| TC-LDG-RPT-009 | AR aging buckets + grand total |
| TC-LDG-RPT-010 | Trial balance debits = credits |
| TC-LDG-RPT-011 | Trial balance account link |
| TC-LDG-RPT-012 | Wallet summary top wallets |
| TC-LDG-RPT-013 | Empty period message |
| TC-LDG-RPT-014 | serverError on failed API |
| TC-LDG-RPT-015 | Unauthorized hides reports nav |

---

#### 15. Composed components (full UI)

##### `StoreSelector`

##### `ContextPanel`

---


---

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `storefront see extension` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `willTransition`: cleanup listeners, map controls, restore sidebar
- `afterModel`: secondary loads after primary model
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `storefront`, `hostRouter`, `loader`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action createNewStorefront
- **Setup/teardown:** @action switchActiveStore

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports


#### Screen: broadcast ŌĆö `/storefront/broadcast`

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Engine** | Storefront |
| **Route name** | `storefront.broadcast` |
| **URL** | `/storefront/broadcast` |

---

#### 1. Layout structure

- Single-page composer (not under promotions child route)
- `SettingsContainer` or section body with form

```
[Section Header: Broadcast]
[Channel toggles: Email | SMS]
[Subject (email)]
[Body]
[Audience: All customers | Select customers]
[Send] [Send test]
```

---

#### 2. Fields (form inputs)

| Label | Binding | Type | Notes |
|-------|---------|------|-------|
| Send email | `channels.email` | checkbox | |
| Send SMS | `channels.sms` | checkbox | at least one required |
| Subject | `subject` | text | email only |
| Body | `body` | textarea | SMS segment counter |
| Send to all | `send_to_all` | Toggle | disables multiselect |
| Customers | `customers` | ModelSelectMultiple | when not send_to_all |

---

#### 5. Buttons & actions

| Label | Handler | Conditions |
|-------|---------|------------|
| storefront.broadcast.send | `sendBroadcast` | valid form |
| storefront.broadcast.send-test | `sendTest` | to current user |
| storefront.broadcast.preview | `preview` | optional modal |

---

#### 9. API & data

| Interaction | Detail |
|-------------|--------|
| Send | `POST storefront/broadcast` or equivalent |
| Test | `POST storefront/broadcast/test` |

---

#### 10. Permissions

- `storefront view broadcast`
- `storefront send broadcast`

---

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Distinct from promotions/push-notifications (mobile push). Re-trace from source when available.

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `storefront send broadcast` or `view broadcast` | gate in beforeModel |

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `notifications`, `intl`, `fetch`, `modalsManager`, `storefront`, `currentUser`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action sendBroadcast
- **Setup/teardown:** @action sendTest

##### Validation

- At least one channel selected
- Body required; subject required for email
- Audience required when not send_to_all

##### UX

- Confirm modal with recipient count before send
- `isLoading` on send button during API

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `store`, `intl`, `storefront`, `modalsManager`, `notifications`, `crud`, `hostRouter`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action createCatalog
- **Setup/teardown:** @action editCatalog
- **Setup/teardown:** @action deleteCatalog

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports


#### Screen: coupons (index) ŌĆö `/storefront/coupons`

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Engine** | Storefront |
| **Route name** | `storefront.coupons` |
| **URL** | `/storefront/coupons` |

---

#### 1. Layout structure

- Section header with title/actions
- Resource tabular list + filters

```
[Section Header: Coupons] [New] [Export]
[Filters row]
[Data table with pagination]
```

---

#### 2. Fields (form inputs)

_Create/edit via modal or overlay ŌĆö typical coupon form:_

| Label | Binding | Type | Notes |
|-------|---------|------|-------|
| Code | `code` | text | unique, uppercase |
| Discount type | `discount_type` | select | percent / fixed |
| Value | `value` | number / MoneyInput | |
| Max uses | `max_uses` | number | optional |
| Valid from | `valid_from` | date | |
| Valid until | `valid_until` | date | |
| Status | `status` | select | active / inactive |
| Minimum order | `min_order_amount` | money | optional |

---

#### 3. Tables

| Column (i18n) | valuePath | Sort | Filter |
|---------------|-----------|------|--------|
| column.code | `code` | yes | yes |
| column.type | `discount_type` | yes | yes |
| column.value | `value` | yes | no |
| column.uses | `uses_count` | yes | no |
| column.max-uses | `max_uses` | yes | no |
| column.valid-from | `valid_from` | yes | yes |
| column.valid-until | `valid_until` | yes | yes |
| column.status | `status` | yes | yes |

---

#### 5. Buttons & actions

| Label | Handler | Permission |
|-------|---------|------------|
| storefront.common.new | `createCoupon` | create coupon |
| storefront.common.export | export | export coupon |
| Edit (row) | `editCoupon` | update coupon |
| Delete (row) | `deleteCoupon` | delete coupon |

---

#### 9. API & data

| Interaction | Detail |
|-------------|--------|
| Data load | `store.query('coupon')` |

---

#### 10. Permissions

- `storefront list coupon`
- `storefront create coupon`
- `storefront update coupon`
- `storefront delete coupon`

---

> Pattern-aligned with catalogs/products list controllers. Re-trace when `packages/storefront` is available.

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `storefront list coupon` | redirect/warning ŌåÆ `console.storefront` |

**Injected services:** `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `crud`, `fetch`, `filters`, `intl`, `hostRouter`

**Query params:** `page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `code`, `status`, `valid_from`, `valid_until`

- `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö row click ŌåÆ edit modal
- Delete confirm if `uses_count > 0` (warn but allow per policy)

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `storefront list customer` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console.storefront`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `crud`, `fetch`, `filters`, `intl`

**Query params:** `page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `public_id`, `internal_id`, `phone`, `email`, `address`, `created_by`, `updated_by`, `status`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action viewCustomer

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop
