- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 15. Composed components (full UI)

##### `Widget::StorefrontMetrics`

##### `Widget::Orders`

**Layout:** Collapsible content panels

**Buttons:** t "storefront.common.view", if order.has_driver_assigned (t "storefront.component.widget.orders.change-driver") (t "storefront.component.widget.orders.assign-driver"), t "storefront.component.widget.orders.accept-order", t "storefront.component.widget.orders.mark-as-preparing", if order.meta.is_pickup (t "storefront.component.widget.orders.mark-as-ready") (t "storefront.component.widget.orders.dispatch"), t "storefront.component.widget.orders.mark-as-completed", t "storefront.component.widget.orders.cancel-order", if
                                                    order.has_driver_assigned
                                                    (t "storefront.component.modals.incoming-order.change-driver")
                                                    (t "storefront.component.modals.incoming-order.assign-driver")
                                                , t "storefront.component.widget.orders.accept-order", t "storefront.component.widget.orders.mark-as-preparing", if order.meta.is_pickup (t "storefront.component.widget.orders.mark-as-ready") (t "storefront.component.widget.orders.dispatch"), t "storefront.component.widget.orders.mark-as-completed"

- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### Screen: pages/index ŌĆö `/storefront/pages`

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Engine** | Storefront |
| **Route name** | `storefront.pages` |
| **URL** | `/storefront/pages` |

---

#### 1. Layout structure

- Section header + list table or card grid
- Edit opens full-page editor or right overlay

```
[Section Header: Pages] [New page]
[Table: title, slug, status, updated]
```

---

#### 2. Fields (form inputs)

_Editor route/modal:_

| Label | Binding | Type | Notes |
|-------|---------|------|-------|
| Title | `title` | text | required |
| Slug | `slug` | text | auto from title |
| Body | `body` | rich text | HTML/markdown |
| Meta description | `meta_description` | textarea | SEO |
| Featured image | `featured_image` | file upload | |
| Status | `status` | select | draft / published |
| Published at | `published_at` | datetime | |

---

#### 3. Tables

| Column (i18n) | valuePath | Sort | Filter |
|---------------|-----------|------|--------|
| column.title | `title` | yes | yes |
| column.slug | `slug` | yes | yes |
| column.status | `status` | yes | yes |
| column.updated | `updated_at` | yes | yes |

---

#### 5. Buttons & actions

| Label | Handler | Permission |
|-------|---------|------------|
| storefront.common.new | `createPage` | create page |
| storefront.pages.preview | `previewPage` | view page |
| Edit | `editPage` | update page |
| Delete | `deletePage` | delete page |

---

#### 9. API & data

| Interaction | Detail |
|-------------|--------|
| Data load | `store.query('storefront-page')` or `page` model |

---

#### 10. Permissions

- `storefront list page`
- `storefront create page`
- `storefront update page`
- `storefront delete page`

---

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `storefront list page` | redirect ŌåÆ `console.storefront` |

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `crud`, `hostRouter`, `intl`

**Query params:** `page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `status`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action createPage
- **Setup/teardown:** @action editPage
- **Setup/teardown:** @action deletePage
- **Setup/teardown:** @action previewPage

##### Virtual consumer URLs

Published pages render on consumer storefront at `/{slug}` ŌĆö out of console scope but link in preview button.

##### Registry

Extension pages may register via `/storefront/:section/:slug` virtual routes (see overview doc 49).

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `storefront list product` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `willTransition`: cleanup listeners, map controls, restore sidebar
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- On failure redirects to `console.storefront`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `intl`, `modalsManager`, `fetch`, `hostRouter`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action deleteCategory
- **Setup/teardown:** @action editCategory
- **Setup/teardown:** @action deleteProduct

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.category}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Loading / empty states

- Empty state: `{{else}}` branch on `#each` when no records

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `ledger update account` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.accounting.accounts.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.accounting.accounts.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `hostRouter`, `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `intl`, `events`

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action cancel
- **Setup/teardown:** @action view

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `fetch`

**Tasks:** `loadGeneralLedger` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action reload
- **Setup/teardown:** @action setType
- **Setup/teardown:** @action onDateRangeChanged
- **Setup/teardown:** @action toggleAccount
- **Setup/teardown:** @action toggleExpandAll

##### Template conditionals

- `{{#if this.loadGeneralLedger.isRunning}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if row.summary.entry_count}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if (get this.expandedMap acct.id)}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if row.entries.length}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility
- `{{#if this.date_from}}` ŌĆö branch UI visibility

##### Loading / empty states

- Spinner shown during upload/async operations
- Task `.isRunning` disables UI during ember-concurrency task
- Empty state: `{{else}}` branch on `#each` when no records

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle


##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `journalActions`, `tableContext`, `intl`

**Query params:** `page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`, `type`, `status`, `currency`

##### Action menu / header buttons

| Action | Handler | Disabled when |
|--------|---------|---------------|
| common.refresh | `journalActions.refresh` | `ŌĆö` |
| common.new | `journalActions.transition` | `ŌĆö` |


##### Service action flows

###### `journal-actions.refresh()`


**Navigation:**
- `router.refresh()` after success

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### List resource behavior

- Uses `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö search debounced via controller task
- Pagination: `page` query param updates model
- Bulk actions from `bulkActions` getter on controller
- Row click ŌåÆ transition to details route
- Export/import via `*Actions.export/import`

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `ledger update journal-entry` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.accounting.journal.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.accounting.journal.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `hostRouter`, `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `intl`, `events`

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action cancel
- **Setup/teardown:** @action view

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

**Injected services:** `invoiceTemplateActions`, `tableContext`, `intl`

**Query params:** `page`, `limit`, `sort`, `query`

##### Action menu / header buttons

| Action | Handler | Disabled when |
|--------|---------|---------------|

##### Service action flows

###### `invoice-template-actions.refresh()`


**Navigation:**
- `router.refresh()` after success

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

##### List resource behavior

- Uses `Layout::Resource::Tabular` ŌĆö search debounced via controller task
- Pagination: `page` query param updates model
- Bulk actions from `bulkActions` getter on controller
- Row click ŌåÆ transition to details route
- Export/import via `*Actions.export/import`

- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `ledger update invoice` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.billing.invoices.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.billing.invoices.index`

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `ledger update gateway` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.payments.gateways.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.payments.gateways.index`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action view

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`

#### 17. Runtime behavior 

> Specified runtime behavior. 

##### Route lifecycle

| Permission | Effect |
|------------|--------|
| `ledger update wallet` | redirect/warning ŌĆö see route for target |

**beforeModel:** unauthorized users get warning toast + redirect (see specification below)
- `beforeModel`: auth/permission gate before fetch
- `error` action: `notifications.serverError` + redirect
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.payments.wallets.index`
- On failure redirects to `console.ledger.payments.wallets.index`

##### Controller state & services

**Injected services:** `hostRouter`, `notifications`, `modalsManager`, `intl`, `events`

**Tasks:** `save` ŌĆö use `.perform()`, UI bound via `.isRunning`

- **Setup/teardown:** @action cancel
- **Setup/teardown:** @action view

##### Notifications pattern (global)

- Success: `notifications.success(intl.t(...))`
- Warning: `notifications.warning(...)` ŌĆö validation/precondition failed
- Error: `notifications.serverError(error)` ŌĆö parses API error payload

##### Realtime / sockets

- Realtime only where `orderSocketEvents` or SocketCluster is injected on this screen (see Part II)
- Company channel `company.{companyId}` may patch models (e.g. `order.driver_assigned`) ŌĆö see Part II (Platform runtime patterns)

##### Permission branching

- Use `abilities.can('fleet-ops <verb> <resource>')` / `cannot` in routes and column definitions
- Table row actions inherit `permission` on column definitions

##### Registry / extensions

- Dynamic tabs/components from `menuService.getMenuItems(registryName)`
- `RegistryYield` renders extension components with `@permission` prop

##### Mobile / responsive

- Console `hiddenSidebarRoutes` forces header-only nav on home, notifications, virtual pages
- Order detail hides sidebar entirely; map layout uses full width
- Tables: fixed footer pagination; horizontal scroll on narrow viewports

#### Test case template

```markdown
##### TC-XXX-NNN: [Short title]
- **REQ:** REQ-ID
- **Screen:** section in this document
- **Preconditions:** logged in as [role], permission [x]
- **Steps:**
  1. ...
  2. ...
- **Expected:**
  - ...
- **UX checks:** loading skeleton, toast, a11y focus
```

## Per-screen definition of done

- [ ] URL and route name match **Part IVŌĆōIX** screen block
- [ ] All fields, tables, and buttons from sections 2ŌĆō5 implemented
